**Thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you, my campaign hit our $5,000 February fundraising goal _out of the park!_**

I couldn’t have done this without you. This is EXACTLY the kind of momentum we need to defeat MAGA Jim Jordan and save the House from GOP extremism. body:
BREAKING: Capping the cost of insulin |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557285/394506242/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDU4YmU1YS01NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CvDhJjzKARMfjq5izulvUk7fjpVKEdCPf38DWLlGSe4=)
In January, Michael's bill to cap the out-of-pocket cost of insulin for all Medicare recipients went into effect capping insulin at $35 per month for millions of senior citizens across the country. Last year, Michael and Senator Raphael Warnock introduced _The Affordable Insulin Now Act_ to cap the monthly cost of insulin for _**everyone**_. Yesterday, pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly announced it will cap the out-of-pocket cost of its insulin at $35 per month, for both insured and uninsured people. This will lower health care costs for hundreds of thousands of Coloradans with diabetes and millions nationwide. But, folks, the work doesn't stop here. No one, regardless of age, income, or insurance provider, should have to choose between paying for insulin and paying for groceries. That's why last year, Michael introduced _The Affordable Insulin Now Act_ to cap ALL patients' out-of-pocket costs for insulin at $35 per month. **Passing this bill won't be easy, but if we consolidate enough support behind it, we can make sure every American has affordable access to insulin.[Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my plan to cap insulin prices for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557287/394506244/1166032298?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDU4YmU1YS01NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CvDhJjzKARMfjq5izulvUk7fjpVKEdCPf38DWLlGSe4=&emci=eeb8a1da-76b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e058be5a-56b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)** | **[Sign The Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557290/394506253/1166032298?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDU4YmU1YS01NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CvDhJjzKARMfjq5izulvUk7fjpVKEdCPf38DWLlGSe4=&emci=eeb8a1da-76b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e058be5a-56b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)**
---
Michael commends Eli Lilly's new policy, but knows Congress must take this a step further to ensure every working American can afford their life-saving insulin medication and is ready to double down in his fight to make this happen.
[**Please add your name alongside Michael's and call on Congress to cap insulin prices for everyone. Each signature brings us a tiny bit closer to lowering health care costs for millions of Americans with diabetes >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557292/394506262/1166032298?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDU4YmU1YS01NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CvDhJjzKARMfjq5izulvUk7fjpVKEdCPf38DWLlGSe4=&emci=eeb8a1da-76b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e058be5a-56b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)

name: Letitia James
subject: 63 cents to every dollar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557488/394508846/475085866?refcode=jtk992-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDdlMDEwZS01N2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gg_CUW7P2mRg_Hdlc7OKTjrOe5H7nwiSZTiZnL3gWps=)
---
Peter, as Black History Month ends and Women’s History Month begins, I wanted to take a moment to highlight a group that is too often overlooked in conversations around gender equality: **Black women.**
**I will never just be New York’s attorney general. I will always ****be New York’s first Black, female attorney general**. And don’t get me wrong, Peter. I’m proud of that fact – but I need to be honest about what going through life as a Black woman means.
Even today, in 2023, Black women and pregnant people are **_four times_** more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than those in any other racial group. Even today, Black women make only **_63 cents_** to every dollar a white man earns. Even today, the poverty rate for Black women is **_22.5%_** , while the poverty rate for white women is 9%. Even today, Black women are **_three times_** more likely to be incarcerated than white women and hold **_significantly fewer_** college degrees than white women. I could go on because, **_even today, we are fighting for a place at the table._**
I’m determined to keep fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable for as long as it takes – and I hope you’ll join me, Peter. So please, as we wrap up Black History Month and head into Women’s History Month:
**[Will you donate any amount you can spare to help power my fight for gender and racial equality? I’m up against some of the most powerful forces in the nation, and I need your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557489/394508847/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk992-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDdlMDEwZS01N2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gg_CUW7P2mRg_Hdlc7OKTjrOe5H7nwiSZTiZnL3gWps=)**

body:
Please take a few minutes to fill out my team’s priorities survey: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557945/394513481/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTYyZTVjMS01OGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OrsIJZ2Z-vCq6sYKIliQlbqkwJh1THcl0_dNaezxPg=&emci=d2dfd5a1-3ab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4162e5c1-58b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, March has started out on a positive note — with pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly finally capping the out-of-pocket cost of lifesaving insulin at $35 a month. This would never have been possible without our work in Congress to cap the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare with the _Inflation Reduction Act_ or President Biden’s pressure on Big Pharma. And we couldn’t have elected a Democratic Senate majority or sent President Biden to the White House without consistent grassroots support from folks like you. Building on our work to lower prescription drug costs across the board is a top priority for me. And today, I want to hear from you about your priorities. [**Can you take a moment to fill out my team’s March Priorities Survey? You can see a preview of the first question here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557946/394513483/560972955?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTYyZTVjMS01OGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OrsIJZ2Z-vCq6sYKIliQlbqkwJh1THcl0_dNaezxPg=&emci=d2dfd5a1-3ab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4162e5c1-58b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=252045) | **Do you support Martin’s work to advance policies that protect our public lands and waters, address climate change, and lower everyday costs for New Mexicans and folks across the country?**
Yes
No | [PROCEED TO SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59557948/394513484/560972955?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTYyZTVjMS01OGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OrsIJZ2Z-vCq6sYKIliQlbqkwJh1THcl0_dNaezxPg=&emci=d2dfd5a1-3ab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4162e5c1-58b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=252045)

Thank you for speaking up about the issues that matter to you most.
— Martin

name: Kash Patel
subject: I led the Russiagate investigation, and what I discovered changed me forever
body:
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gZIAeRxy2Ha1PVTqvUeTmJI22bCBFeLvm6CqsmXLY2tmjJpyISTpCOW11cBhQls7zQjrSAlCJRUt5QbBAFFAKOFKVT3BAM63QHdIKcbQmhjqWaOkBmTPB6uQj8QgToPpp1EOChWOsvZ63rZlrbpLxW45VzTPhO3u7gltIcmYjXfYcIsWjjz9wDo3WaUpMnXSdtmd927lIrv4Ol0UbQiLd9OhK_FSMTY7u-Z2yrDH5x7S8zu8vzWRjs2Df4ShLNlrrtux4P_lH0l7PldQcf0FkbBZBg)

Friend,

When Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered, good or bad about President Trump, it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever.**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation, and what I found makes me believe that they did it on purpose to get rid of President Trump. **

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

_To this day, most Americans still aren 't aware that Russiagate was a hoax_.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know what protection whistle-blowers need when they expose corrupt government gangsters. That's why I started Fight with Kash, a foundation to offer legal help to whistle-blowers.

[_**Fight for Kash is counting on people like you to help whistle-blowers in court, so I 've set a goal to raise $33,000 before the end of February. Will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to protect whistle-blowers? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gZIAeRxy2Ha1PVTqvUeTmJI22bCBFeLvm6CqsmXLY2tmjJpyISTpCOW11cBhQls7zQjrSAlCJRUt5QbBAFFAKOFKVT3BAM63QHdIKcbQmhjqWaOkBmTPB6uQj8QgToPpp1EOChWOsvZ63rZlrbpLxW45VzTPhO3u7gltIcmYjXfYcIsWjjz9wDo3WaUpMnXSdtmd927lIrv4Ol0UbQiLd9OhK_FSMTY7u-Z2yrDH5x7S8zu8vzWRjs2Df4ShLNlrrtux4P_lH0l7PldQcf0FkbBZBg)

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gZIAeRxy2Ha1PVTqvUeTmJI22bCBFeLvm6CqsmXLY2tmjJpyISTpCOW11cBhQls7zQjrSAlCJRUt5QbBAFFAKOFKVT3BAM63QHdIKcbQmhjqWaOkBmTPB6uQj8QgToPpp1EOChWOsvZ63rZlrbpLxW45VzTPhO3u7gltIcmYjXfYcIsWjjz9wDo3WaUpMnXSdtmd927lIrv4Ol0UbQiLd9OhK_FSMTY7u-Z2yrDH5x7S8zu8vzWRjs2Df4ShLNlrrtux4P_lH0l7PldQcf0FkbBZBg)

I am on a mission to root out all government gangsters from positions without our bureaus. I know these people are still in positions of power, and we must expose them to the American people. Without legal protections in place, whistle-blowers will not come forward.

With the new Congressional Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, you and I have a unique opportunity to hold these thugs accountable.

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gZIAeRxy2Ha1PVTqvUeTmJI22bCBFeLvm6CqsmXLY2tmjJpyISTpCOW11cBhQls7zQjrSAlCJRUt5QbBAFFAKOFKVT3BAM63QHdIKcbQmhjqWaOkBmTPB6uQj8QgToPpp1EOChWOsvZ63rZlrbpLxW45VzTPhO3u7gltIcmYjXfYcIsWjjz9wDo3WaUpMnXSdtmd927lIrv4Ol0UbQiLd9OhK_FSMTY7u-Z2yrDH5x7S8zu8vzWRjs2Df4ShLNlrrtux4P_lH0l7PldQcf0FkbBZBg)

Fight for Kash is helping whistle-blowers to expose the deep state. But the process of being a whistle-blower is costly.

[_**Will you join my fight to protect whistle-blowers with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount?**__**Click here >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gZIAeRxy2Ha1PVTqvUeTmJI22bCBFeLvm6CqsmXLY2tmjJpyISTpCOW11cBhQls7zQjrSAlCJRUt5QbBAFFAKOFKVT3BAM63QHdIKcbQmhjqWaOkBmTPB6uQj8QgToPpp1EOChWOsvZ63rZlrbpLxW45VzTPhO3u7gltIcmYjXfYcIsWjjz9wDo3WaUpMnXSdtmd927lIrv4Ol0UbQiLd9OhK_FSMTY7u-Z2yrDH5x7S8zu8vzWRjs2Df4ShLNlrrtux4P_lH0l7PldQcf0FkbBZBg)

An anti-democratic Deep State has infiltrated the highest levels of government. We can never again allow the deep state to undermine a presidency as they did with President Trump.

A sinister cabal of corrupt law enforcement personnel, intelligence agents, and military officials at the highest levels of government plotted to interfere with a presidential election. They spoon-fed misinformation and disinformation to news organizations to cover it up. Lie on top of lie.

Even after they failed, they continued to secretly pull the levers of power without any accountability to the American people.

**But more whistle-blowers are coming forward, and I am calling on your immediate support to help us. Be prepared for major revelations with the new subcommittee in Congress. **

clean_body: Friend, When Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered, good or bad about President Trump, it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever. Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation, and what I found makes me believe that they did it on purpose to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. To this day, most Americans still aren 't aware that Russiagate was a hoax. As a former federal prosecutor, I know what protection whistle-blowers need when they expose corrupt government gangsters. That's why I started Fight with Kash, a foundation to offer legal help to whistle-blowers. I am on a mission to root out all government gangsters from positions without our bureaus. I know these people are still in positions of power, and we must expose them to the American people. Without legal protections in place, whistle-blowers will not come forward. With the new Congressional Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, you and I have a unique opportunity to hold these thugs accountable. Fight for Kash is helping whistle-blowers to expose the deep state. But the process of being a whistle-blower is costly. An anti-democratic Deep State has infiltrated the highest levels of government. We can never again allow the deep state to undermine a presidency as they did with President Trump. A sinister cabal of corrupt law enforcement personnel, intelligence agents, and military officials at the highest levels of government plotted to interfere with a presidential election. They spoon-fed misinformation and disinformation to news organizations to cover it up. Lie on top of lie. Even after they failed, they continued to secretly pull the levers of power without any accountability to the American people. But more whistle-blowers are coming forward, and I am calling on your immediate support to help us. Be prepared for major revelations with the new subcommittee in Congress. Can you help reach our goal of raising $33,000 by the end of the month, Friend? Click below to rush your support. Thank you, Kash Patel

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Cleaning up Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
literally, with a sponge
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18673%2E3422442%2EPBNF7l)
Derek,
One of Katie’s top priorities is cleaning up corruption _**[(you can support our campaign and buy one of these sponges all at the same time!)](https://shop.katieporter.com/products/ktichen-kit?source=em20230302-1&akid=18673%2E3422442%2EPBNF7l)**_
[](https://shop.katieporter.com/products/ktichen-kit?source=em20230302-1&akid=18673%2E3422442%2EPBNF7l)
Cleaning up corruption means fighting for legislation that will hold power to account and increase transparency, but for Katie, it also means leading by example:
She’s leading the fight to **ban Members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks**.
Katie is the only Democrat in this race who has never taken money from corporate PACs.
She is one of less than a dozen Members of Congress who **rejects federal lobbyist money.**
Katie was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way of funding pet projects.
Our elected officials should work for the people they represent, not their biggest donors and Wall Street friends. **From combating climate change to lowering the cost of healthcare, we can’t make real progress unless we address corruption in Washington.**
**[Make a contribution today to help elect Katie Porter to the United States Senate.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/16074?source=em20230302-1&t=2&akid=18673%2E3422442%2EPBNF7l)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/16074?amount=5&refcode=EMAF02_1_SPO_20230302_V1_F&t=21&akid=18673%2E3422442%2EPBNF7l)**
Thanks for being a part of our team!
—KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF02_1_SPO_20230302_V1_F&t=22&refcode2=18673_3422442_PBNF7l&akid=18673%2E3422442%2EPBNF7l)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I want to hear from Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Hey Peter, I can’t believe we are already in March. Time is really flying by – and with it the amount of work that’s being done in the Senate. That’s why today, I am personally reaching out to our most dedicated supporters, to make sure your priorities are being acted on every single day. Over the last few months, I've been working tirelessly to pass federal protections for marriage equality, defend our reproductive freedoms and our right to vote, and so much more. But hearing directly from you is a critical tool for my work — knowing what your most pressing issues are allows me to plan my work to continue moving our country forward. You might be surprised, but the responses we receive to surveys like this one shift all the time. That’s why we check in from time to time to see where our movement stands on the issues you care about the most. [**So Peter, what issues are most important to you and your family right now? I want to know what I should continue to prioritize, and any feedback you’re willing to share is incredibly valuable to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558289/394523229/-340362118?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230302_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk4NTA0ZS01Y2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8vNpGjqZHFeCS2WXXpxadqVZarZl5LP9CydQNY4DQ4=&emci=e498504e-5cb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e698504e-5cb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35007871) | | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558290/394523230/-340362118?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230302_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk4NTA0ZS01Y2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8vNpGjqZHFeCS2WXXpxadqVZarZl5LP9CydQNY4DQ4=&emci=e498504e-5cb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e698504e-5cb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35007871)

body:
I am holding George Santos accountable |
#

Breaking news, Peter, The House Ethics Committee just announced that they are opening an official investigation into George Santos’ campaign finances. **This investigation is a direct result of the complaint that Representative Ritchie Torres and I filed in January,** calling for a full investigation into his financial disclosures including whether highly suspicious loans Santos made to his own campaign violated federal law. The bipartisan investigation must be thorough. It must be truthful. **And it must bring accountability for George Santos and Republican leaders like Kevin McCarthy who knowingly went along with his scheme to defraud the voters of NY-3.** Peter, we can never give House Republicans a free pass to lie to the American public. subject: BREAKING: Conservative School Board Candidates under Attack, Pritzker Funds $500k to Liberals
body:
The Democratic Party of Illinois just reported a $500K contribution from Pritzker's campaign, in an effort to boost a liberal extremist agenda.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c3ccfa060eda/breaking-conservative-school-board-candidates-under-attack-pritzker-funds-500k-to-liberals?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Grassroots Parents and School Board Candidates Under Attack, While Pritzker Directs $500K to Fund Liberal Extremists with a Partisan Agenda (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/grassroots-parents-and-school-board-candidates-under-attack-while-pritzker-directs-500k-to-fund-liberal-extremists-with-a-partisan-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/grassroots-parents-and-school-board-candidates-under-attack-while-pritzker-directs-500k-to-fund-liberal-extremists-with-a-partisan-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Opponents of Critical Race Theory protest outside of the Loudoun County School Board headquarters, in Ashburn, Virginia. (REUTERS)

With school board races dominating local headlines, the Democratic Party of Illinois just reported a $500,000 contribution (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=3OcFPLY%2fa71WtJhQL9vet0It9NfMOqk%2fu3yhMjV38wUSpbNb0K4gp0vU%2fhLIfSKJ6fv3Nnmv4NyHm7N2zislmQ%3d%3d&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) from the JB for Governor campaign, in an effort to boost a liberal extremist agenda that promotes inappropriate sexual education curriculum and divisive concepts that only further deepen racial divides.

School board races are generating widespread attention throughout the country and in Illinois as liberal districts are promoting a sexual education
curriculum (https://www.newsweek.com/republicans-declare-war-sex-education-seek-restrictions-public-schools-1777650?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that teaches young children about gender identity and hormone blockers – subjects completely inappropriate for children.
https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=3OcFPLY%2fa71WtJhQL9vet0It9NfMOqk%2fu3yhMjV38wUSpbNb0K4gp0vU%2fhLIfSKJ6fv3Nnmv4NyHm7N2zislmQ%3d%3d&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Gov. Pritzker donates $500,000 to the Democratic Party of Illinois to support liberal extremist school baord candidates on Feb. 27, 2023. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

These same school districts are also teaching about critical race theory (https://www.foxnews.com/us/what-is-critical-race-theory?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a divisive concept that teaches about race superiority and that the United States is fundamentally a racist country, among other things. Often, it is titled “culturally, responsive teaching,” “social/restorative justice,” “equity/gender support plans” and “social emotional learning.”

Several weeks ago, Gov. Pritzker went on the attack during a
press conference (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FPkUhtMAs0&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , calling Illinois-based conservative grassroots organizations that recruit and support local school board candidates’ “racists” and “anti-LGBTQ.”

“There are organizations that are anti-LGBTQ, that are racist, that are anti-Muslim, that are supporting candidates for these local [school] boards, and they’re trying to take over at a local level and build up candidates at the local level that they can then run for the state legislature.”

Awake Illinois (https://www.awakeil.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , a conservative grassroots organization and their founder Shannon Adcock, a local mother, has been on the receiving end of Pritzker’s attacks over the last year.

Adcock’s profile was elevated during the pandemic, when she joined thousands of parents across Illinois protesting the shutting down of schools and opposing the masking requirement for children upon their return.

During the pandemic, school board meetings were flooded with angry parents, advocating on behalf of their children.

In response, these parents were demonized, silenced, and they were even labeled as “
domestic terrorists (https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/news/releases/ag-paxton-sues-biden-administration-silencing-parents-labeling-them-terrorists?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ” by senior officials within the Biden administration.

Stand up for children, and you’re labeled an “extremist” and “domestic terrorist.”

Oppose mask mandates and you’re labeled an “extremist” and “domestic terrorist.”

Advocate for in-person learning and you’re labeled an “extremist” and “domestic terrorist.”

Oppose disgustingly inappropriate sexual education curriculum, and you’re labeled an “extremist” and “domestic terrorist.”

Oppose a curriculum that teaches children about racist concepts, and you’re labeled an “extremist” and “domestic terrorist.”

To throw these terms around is an insult to the brave men and women who wear the uniform and serve our country – who are out there in harm’s way protecting us every day from the real terrorists.

The Democrats are the extremists, not the grassroots. Not just in their words, but by their ideologies that they want taught in our classrooms.

Consider the
FBI’s (https://www.fbi.gov/wanted/wanted_terrorists?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Most Wanted Terrorist list here in the United States and you’ll find the real terrorists – people who want to murder thousands of innocent people and repeat another September 11; who want to destroy our national defense facilities; and who are in-training at this very moment on how to bring bombs and explosives aboard civilian aircraft and take them down midair.

But as it turns out, the parents were right – they were always right.

In a paper published in
2022 (https://caldercenter.org/sites/default/files/CALDER%20Working%20Paper%20267-0522_0.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on the consequences of remote and hybrid learning during the pandemic, the research concluded that the shift away from classroom instruction during the pandemic, “had profound consequences for student achievement.”

A Ohio State University study published in 2022 had the same findings – remote learning and virtual instruction had devastating effects on children.

In
Chicago (https://chicago.suntimes.com/education/2021/12/2/22814922/illinois-report-card-cps-test-scores-pandemic-state-board-education-search?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , test scores dropped significantly during the pandemic, and children have fallen so far behind in reading, writing and arithmetic – they are past the point of no return, unless drastic measures are taken immediately.

The
Chicago Teachers Union (https://chicago.suntimes.com/education/2021/12/2/22814922/illinois-report-card-cps-test-scores-pandemic-state-board-education-search?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) were successful in their lobbying efforts to keep the schools closed during the pandemic, and the end result continues to prove catastrophic.

And if there was ever a case for educational malpractice, this would be it.

In June, Pritzker doubled down on his extremism talk, tweeting,

“So long as I’m governor, our state will be a bulwark of progress, equity, and justice. We’re in a battle between an extremist GOP and a Democratic party that offers a future of strong leadership and possibility.Thank you for entrusting me in this fight, Illinois.”
https://twitter.com/JBPritzker/status/1541991660871188480?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1541991660871188480%7Ctwgr%5Eed6f2a3c6f618f4b205f4c026064a16edd2fc8eb%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F03%2Fgrassroots-parents-and-school-board-candidates-under-attack-while-pritzker-directs-500k-to-fund-liberal-extremists-with-a-partisan-agenda.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

So far, Awake Illinois is supporting over 70 school board candidates across 12 districts – working tirelessly since 2021 to recruit and train these everyday moms and dads with zero support from the IL GOP and GOP-establishment donors.

And all of the support so far has come from their own members and candidates.

Meanwhile, Pritzker is funneling $500,000 and the Democratic Party of Illinois has targeted over 100 conservative grassroots school board candidates across 60 districts – to viciously attack and call them “extremists” for opposing a liberal extremists and partisan agenda.

The Democrats continue to prove by their rhetoric and the school curriculum that they are promoting – that they are the extremists.

And they’re running scared.

https://youtu.be/K9jWzIEPrMU?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax and Chicago Alderman Lopez to discuss Mayor Lightfoot's defeat.

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=878b7d7179-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_12_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-878b7d7179-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

body:
| | | **ALERT: Experts warn that Social Security could be on the Supreme Court's chopping block**

_We urgently need to know where you stand on this issue -- but we have**NO RECORD** of your answer:_

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9995%2E9716520%2EWeKo8e)
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9995%2E9716520%2EWeKo8e)

---

Team -- By overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court has proven that **_NOTHING_** is safe from the conservative justices' right-wing majority.

**In fact, experts warn that Social Security could be in danger, too.** During her confirmation hearings, Amy Coney Barrett famously REFUSED to say if Social Security was constitutional -- and if the Court strikes it down, **_65 million Americans_ will LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t risk losing this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support upholding Social Security -- _but we’re still short 36 responses in Pennsylvania! _

**Please, answer before midnight:**
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9995%2E9716520%2EWeKo8e)

| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230302-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9995%2E9716520%2EWeKo8e)

body:
I wouldn't be where I am today without the support of folks like you who help me keep this grassroots movement going.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59559684/394540077/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU2YTJhMzctNjliOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M7ZH-0l0GmQJe3q0iVXrdH2QLh98tLNiifCAelKY11E=&emci=cfb6979a-12b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=456a2a37-69b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

I want to express my gratitude to everyone on this grassroots team for all that you do to support me and this campaign.

On Tuesday, we faced an ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal for the month. **And thanks to everyone who stepped up and donated, we've hit our goal and are ready to hit the ground running in March!**

I know that 2024 may seem far away, _but it's just around the corner._ Building up our resources from now until Election Day will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and take back our Democratic majority in the House.

I wouldn’t be where I am today without the support of folks like you who help keep this grassroots movement strong. And while our work is far from over, it is because of your generosity that we are ready to take on whatever challenges are thrown at us in the months ahead.

**I am grateful to have you on my side.**

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: I’m fighting to secure our border
body:
- - - |

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/69b5b6818a08/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8118275?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/secure-border?utm_source=Mailchimp&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=20230228_Lori_secure-border

Peter,

As a former mayor and mother, I am deeply troubled by the humanitarian crisis unfolding at the border and the impact it's having on our local communities.

Drug trafficking created the largest fentanyl bust in Oregon's 5th District last year. Law enforcement seized 150,000 pills containing fentanyl and enough fentanyl powder to cause harm to 4.5 million people in our district alone. The drug trade is not just happening at the border; it is affecting our communities as well.

We need to act now and address the root causes of this problem.

We need policies that secure our border, provide resources to local law enforcement, and work with our partners in Mexico to crack down on drug trafficking.

Can you contribute $100, $50, or even $25, to join my fight and support policies that can make a real difference in addressing the drug crisis? name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Left vs. Anna Paulina Luna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

U.S. Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) has only been in Congress a few weeks, but she is already proving to conservatives around the country why we were right to support her candidacy last year.
Luna was a leader for conservative reform in the House Speaker race. She has been appointed to the crucial House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, where she is helping to lead congressional investigations into Covid relief corruption, the Hunter Biden coverup, and
censorship of conservative speech on social media.
Rep. Luna is off to a great start in what promises to be a great career in public service. But you don't need to take my word for it. The left-wing media is vouching for her too!
Over Super Bowl weekend, the Washington Post and other liberal outlets launched a coordinated attack against Anna Paulina Luna that shows just how much they fear her. It was the typical Fake News playbook: first came the hit job, then follow-up articles promoting the hit job,
and then hit jobs about Luna's response to the hit job.

Stand with Anna Paulina Luna today!
But the media got more than they bargained for. Anna Paulina Luna didn't buckle under the Left's lies - she fought back with the truth.
Within 48 hours of publication, the Post had to run not one but two corrections about false assertions in the article. The sources were biased and ignorant. The reporting was sloppy and slanted.
And when the dust settled, Rep. Luna emerged not just unscathed but stronger and more determined than ever.
The liberal media took their first shot at her, and they whiffed.
This is the kind of lawmaker and leader America needs - and the kind House Freedom Fund supports every election cycle.
Please support Anna Paulina Luna now!
HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation directly to her campaign.
The GOP establishment doesn't like her, and the Left is terrified of her. But she doesn't care. She's not fighting for their approval. She's fighting for the future of our country.
House Freedom Fund has Anna's back. And we will continue to scour the country for more candidates like her, in primaries and general elections, in 2024 and beyond.
Please help Anna Paulina Luna fight for America's future.
Thank you for being part of our grassroots team and for considering this important request.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

 

 

STAND WITH ANNA PAULINA LUNA

 

Please support Anna Paulina Luna. The Left hates her and the Republican establishment won't defend her. It's up to the grassroots to stand with her in the fight for America's future.

 

DONATE NOW

 

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status
are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

name: Corey DeAngelis, Senior Fellow AFC
subject: Gov. Katie Hobbs is targeting school choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
I don’t know what I’m more surprised by, the fact that Katie Hobbs is blatantly lying

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsgnlo09agkk39lvmt43i7rs4iro4o6fcv3do6d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj1chh2bs)
---
| | Hi friend, Corey DeAngelis here, Senior Fellow at the American Federation for Children. I don’t know what I’m more surprised by, the fact that Katie Hobbs is blatantly lying about school choice bankrupting her state **or** that she wants to rip away education freedom from vulnerable families in Arizona. She has attempted to paint school choice as an unfair system and a detriment to public schools **which is simply not true**. The reality is that school choice provides opportunity and hope for families who otherwise would not have access to quality education for their children. As a beneficiary of a private school education herself, you would think she wouldn’t fight to prevent other students from having that same opportunity.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6al2jbtsfj82i7vumi3qsl8kiqd3ag86se22t60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj1chh2bs)

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znk6tr243ipv13ejcahrd3ksbiphf0ncn5q3q7jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ggrr9na377ef71k037c6v7sc7m0659421l6d28_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jvt8knslv6vaplpjd830drht860dqum0ok7218_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5579shvfrcvqbuun1gl5fopg0kusgjbbbujpb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlmopn7pkhsfi07and6j0d0tmv6fq8ap4o1ctq60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8k0gm1eqr1l4fm12asagmmufi9diirsmbhfe2r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg69gc3o4ohtnif7aaf9v0lom3vq0o8pom31r1o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z27c9gc8pr7qrq9pklffqpvjk2l6eppca8v8qc5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55ts1f3o6oq7gqtr7urtjn0ckmkqfajj0k0vnhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3l5bu0rlgch5bsjcqi7lvulaen3c9ce19pu9d3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm8oj5cdh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

body:
Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden’s ridiculous anti-America agenda

| |
---
| | |
Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

I'm only sending this hail mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the end zone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of stopping Biden and Schumer's radical agenda are gone.

Can you rush $8 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the left in their tracks?

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Bottom-up, grassroots support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zibr5086tcgtdik5na408n0scr1niidhtpkbr7h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs9otc64fbf5t8na8835n3fkma39rupo3lu1nv5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkc1mj9rd20kdje2vnu174afmjngrhc7egb5luto_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z18b648taqg5mrg1cnk2p1krl264jovgooufm92o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu6hnf85apvobc365o0736g2nkj1mqpsb4tscmro_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi3ar6nrnk5kbt8k0rojihldll1dcsdb1ccnlrs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdo9aheb7ov8aarkalm8p8928n334d6mi8cu82j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8b8u2dces6ijhvj74mn6usgju8fo4ikj9adjph0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg2a8id7i5ngrdhu1tl0bs4sns7n3rc2v7unarbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9deise9g7j4bc6s1go6q312bdpsi22s2f4gld7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74cjh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: All these soft-on-China Democrats...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We aren’t messing around.

| |
---
| | Friend,

So many seem to be dancing around the issue but I'm not afraid to say this clearly and directly:

**Soft-on-China Democrats are turning a blind eye to the Chinese Communist Party invading our American way of life.**
1. Chinese businesses have bought up 350,000+ acres of American farmland - even near our classified military bases
2. Joe Biden let a Chinese spy balloon hover over our missile silos and nuclear facilities - he could have shot it down immediately
3. China-owned TikTok has collected the data from 80M Americans - and Democrats have attacked efforts to ban the app

_**[Majority Leader Scalise and I are working together, as a united front, to elect more tough Conservatives who actually have the guts to stand up to these Communists. If you agree we can't afford more spineless, weak-on-China Democrats in office, I'm personally asking you to make a donation to fuel our critical efforts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqh5e3e1abt33ph180246jm9gs4l9upmadpab820_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74chh2bs "Majority Leader Scalise and I are working together, as a united front, to elect more tough Conservatives who actually have the guts to stand up to these Communists. If you agree we can't afford more spineless, weak-on-China Democrats in office, I'm personally asking you to make a donation to fuel our critical efforts.")**_

**Unfortunately, the weak-on-China special interests are DEEPLY entrenched so this won't be easy...**

_Adam Schiff just took to TikTok to beg for campaign cash... The Biden Administration admitted tracking the spy balloon from mainland China, but still did nothing for over a week... and Democrats attack me RELENTLESSLY for saying China is our biggest national security threat - they think climate change is more urgent... _

---
| | | [SUPPORT TOUGH-ON-CHINA REPUBLICANS >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1a53dv8bv5jk571njsjgio7u9aeus8iho2ltm4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74chh2bs "SUPPORT TOUGH-ON-CHINA REPUBLICANS")
---

Look.

As the former Secretary of State and Director of the CIA, I know how important it is to have a strong Congress that understands what's at stake. There's no doubt about it: Republicans are the only ones with the courage to go toe-to-toe with the Communists.

_**[That's why we need MORE of them in Congress. That's also why I'm teaming up with the Majority Leader- tomorrow is too late, we need your help right here and right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zprghc8l28iv317u3p3dcd183reu7orhvv56iqag_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm2o74chh2bs "That's why we need MORE of them in Congress. That's also why I'm teaming up with the Majority Leader – tomorrow is too late, we need your help right here and right now.")**_

Onward,
Thank you,
Mike Pompeo,
_70th Secretary of State_

subject: Official 2023 Border Security Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What do YOU think about our border’s security?

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09656%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kBV9%2fV84GmIIcC841VQG0A&sysid=1)

**[OFFICIAL 2023 BORDER SECURITY SURVEY](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09657%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lEVDrDhKs6tcKwUl5Bqe%2bQ&sysid=1)**
**DO YOU AGREE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER IS IN DANGER?**

******************************************************[YES](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x%2fbOoZgXq0AEMZs6JsSlAg&sysid=1)******************************************************

******************************************************[NO](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09659%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WAYekTxNStsXN3uYlux%2fsg&sysid=1)******************************************************

Friend,

**Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.**_Just look at the southern border. _

We all know that the border is _wide open_ and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won’t stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals.

We can build a wall around the Capitol to keep pretending our citizens are an ongoing threat, but we can’t build a wall at our border where we know there are actual threats. _That tells you everything you need to know about the government._

_With everything happening in our country right now, we must secure our border again._

Friend, I’m reaching out to YOU, a dedicated Republican, to complete the **Official 2023 Border Security Survey.**

clean_body: What do YOU think about our border’s security? DO YOU AGREE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER IS IN DANGER? ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Friend, Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.Just look at the southern border. We all know that the border is wide open and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won’t stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals. We can build a wall around the Capitol to keep pretending our citizens are an ongoing threat, but we can’t build a wall at our border where we know there are actual threats. That tells you everything you need to know about the government. With everything happening in our country right now, we must secure our border again. Friend, I’m reaching out to YOU, a dedicated Republican, to complete the Official 2023 Border Security Survey. body:
How can I help Amanda?

---
| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter SIGNS, SIGNS SIGNS 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK?
---
| WEEK 1: CAMPAIGN UPDATE 2
---
| How Can I Help Amanda?
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979.
She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| | |
---
| MY OFFICE IS A TRUCK
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters, There's no place like home, and better yet riding around the district in our pick up truck. While I'm thankful for the opportunity to represent you in Richmond, I love being back in the district spending time with many of you. This was my first full week back home in the district.
Now that session is over, Mike and I have been driving across the district putting up 4 by 8 signs. Why? So that you know an election is coming and remember to get out and vote. I believe signs ARE important. The Republican Primary is just around the corner in less than 3 1/2 months on Tuesday, June 20 and I humbly ask for your vote.
We've really enjoyed stopping by many of your homes and businesses throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Honestly, we've spent more time talking with you, than putting up signs. And we love it. If you have a great location for a sign, please let Mike know at mike@chaseforva.com. We've enjoyed talking to many of you who have come out and talked to us while we put up the sign on your property. I enjoy listening to what's on your mind and what's important to you.
At every stop, people are telling us to keep up the good work and keep fighting. You're telling us that we've compromised so much that we're giving our country away and that you're tired of it. You're telling us to continue to stand strong and don't back down. You're telling us that you like that I don't go along to along and that you appreciate that I don't back down. What we love most is when you tell us that you're praying for us and particularly for our protection. Mike and I return home each day reinvigorated and determined to stand strong for you and our conservative values.
Many of you also expressed that you were confused over the new legislative lines and were concerned as to whether or not you could still vote for me after redistricting. So I've included this information in this newsletter. You've also asked how can you help. So we have information about that as well.
We are looking forward to seeing many of you Monday night at the Chesterfield VA Tea Party meeting for a legislative update. All legislators and candidates are invited and will be given an opportunity to speak. However, speakers will need to RSVP to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com.
If you can't stay but want to pick up a yard sign, bumper sticker or want to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot, that's fine too. We also have t-shirts and hats for a donation of $50 or more. I look forward to seeing you Monday!
If you're unsure if you can vote for me, please check the map below to see if you live in the district.
---
| How can I help Amanda?
---
| Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary?
---
| | | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bgy_C6sReXqgMR8lak4sRGUbsBCEbTh5zCW4rjD1Co34iA1DKRuvlOtCsS0QR4PgN53mq3oMTbB0mP-e2eYV_31E5EaUk954uYMTZTngisdRhTgbMf9KJCxaOuOEuUXdsmZiiOcQBXPcS1MiigU1DABHfnjssgy4XOZqp4Xc58aWpuYyRSv8fiqvaM39HXnXPNSdHhJFGXyZGrYetY4Jzg==&c=JCwmwL3teRZpuZ9tpEj5Q3YqSTckUOOkFSQ1LMoJRdAZwLyQE4doTA==&ch=6pEVEdWRFN_3NlWQiKtET-sizYVOhdLDVbOhT_AkG3ZfSucn5uZ-LA==)
---
| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. I can still vote for you.
Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out.
Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign. Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able?
---
| | | [VOLUNTEER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bgy_C6sReXqgMR8lak4sRGUbsBCEbTh5zCW4rjD1Co34iA1DKRuvlGQlA_NOLcoFlMPXt1_-P408QlAJDMpxPoUw9rFAlp32kwdHCT5mjEF-nNBmpTV7cLqzEGa8fUbCiHhflgUjmYhzSzUvc91PwNOdLtb9pkXiS6B1lRuB4Ck=&c=JCwmwL3teRZpuZ9tpEj5Q3YqSTckUOOkFSQ1LMoJRdAZwLyQE4doTA==&ch=6pEVEdWRFN_3NlWQiKtET-sizYVOhdLDVbOhT_AkG3ZfSucn5uZ-LA==)
---
|
Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week.
Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts.
For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm.
For the second shift please arrive at 1:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm.
We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112
---
| | | [HOST A MEET & GREET](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bgy_C6sReXqgMR8lak4sRGUbsBCEbTh5zCW4rjD1Co34iA1DKRuvlGQlA_NOLcoFlMPXt1_-P408QlAJDMpxPoUw9rFAlp32kwdHCT5mjEF-nNBmpTV7cLqzEGa8fUbCiHhflgUjmYhzSzUvc91PwNOdLtb9pkXiS6B1lRuB4Ck=&c=JCwmwL3teRZpuZ9tpEj5Q3YqSTckUOOkFSQ1LMoJRdAZwLyQE4doTA==&ch=6pEVEdWRFN_3NlWQiKtET-sizYVOhdLDVbOhT_AkG3ZfSucn5uZ-LA==)
---
|
What is a "Meet and Greet"? I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors.
Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors?
Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best.
If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at [debbie@chaseforva.com](mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com) to schedule a date.
---
|
---
| Can I vote for Amanda?
---
| Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes
---
| Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes
---
| If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me.

| WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT?

In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12.

Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot
| In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in [Senate District 12 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bgy_C6sReXqgMR8lak4sRGUbsBCEbTh5zCW4rjD1Co34iA1DKRuvlIGpAihQcP-PdA0AKNKpxMbAUkSL3B8iJzYNkKXz-kFuL8mPf0K1R2mTqBuWIy_nm1I3Lxd4l8Br20cAlhmzPS3kRn9TQnP-azhSpD3Pr-_7QlgXcb2LrtFp_6gqm4HHKs2QfazrYoyQf5TIx1i-FDZmuarbyOIv1i9tVwMEOOaWIa2Wr1CoLEROAZTp38JpFl850nsvFHAQ&c=JCwmwL3teRZpuZ9tpEj5Q3YqSTckUOOkFSQ1LMoJRdAZwLyQE4doTA==&ch=6pEVEdWRFN_3NlWQiKtET-sizYVOhdLDVbOhT_AkG3ZfSucn5uZ-LA==) to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election.
Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above.
You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online.
You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address:
Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com.

"Today, I'm announcing my official endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate.

---
| "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people.
She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents.
She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally to include election integrity, protecting our constitutional rights, like the Second Amendment, pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates and voting against all tax increases. We need to send our known fighter and firebrand back to the Virginia Senate so she can continue to make a difference in the lives of every Virginian."

| Former Congressman Dave Brat
---
| |
---
"Today, I'm announcing my endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Chase supported me before it was cool to be Pro Faith, Pro Constitution, Pro Free Markets and Pro American. She has courage. I ran on and supported the Republican Creed of Virginia.

---
| "Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase. • Free enterprise system - No special interests • All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities • Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels • Observing Constitutional limitations • Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense • Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation

"We the People" are tired of politicians who do not see the dangers right in front of us; from out of control schools to election integrity. We want people that can clearly articulate what these issues are and boldly lead the people to action. If we elect leaders that hold fast to the Virginia Republican Creed, there is no way we can end up with runaway spending, crime in the streets, crushing regulations and an economy that favors the Big and Powerful over small business and our great citizens. "We the People" overwhelmingly love God, Country and our fellow citizens. But love does not mean that anything goes. We the People demand that politicians are accountable to us.
They work for us. Senator Amanda Chase will listen to the vast majority who want truth and sanity back in Government.
Unfortunately, that will take a fight, and we have someone who will fight the good fight to ensure that the City on a Hill remains bright for us and a light for generations to come."

"Amanda is not a typical politician, she's a mom of 4 who deeply cares for the people in her community.
Education and school choice is a top priority. She homeschooled her children when they were young and truly understands the importance of parents having input in their children's education and fully supports parental rights and choice in education over government mandates. She not only supports school choice, she lived it.
As a senator, Amanda Chase has an impeccable 7 year conservative voting record.
Whether you're talking about pro-life, gun rights, defending our Constitution and individual rights, fighting for real election integrity, voting for limited government, voting against all tax increases and fully funding our law enforcement, Senator Chase checks all the boxes.
I stand with Senator Amanda Chase and I encourage you to do so too."
---
| Bishop E.W. Jackson
---
| |
---
"I have known Senator Amanda Chase personally and professionally for over 15 years. It is my pleasure and honor to endorse her for re-election to the Virginia Senate in District 12.
Senator Chase is a courageous Christian voice for faith, family, and freedom.
---
|
"Amanda is a bold champion for our conservative values and has an impeccable 7-year voting record to prove it. She is pro-God, pro-life, pro-2A, pro-family, pro-election integrity, pro-business, and pro-law and order.

She is a pro-life leader for legislation in the Virginia Senate such as the pain capable and heart beat bills, and she has a 100 percent lifetime rating with the Family Foundation.

Amanda exposed and spoke against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment that would enshrine abortion as well as gender identity politics into the Virginia Constitution.

Senator Chase is not just a Republican placeholder; she's a conservative firebrand who is not afraid to speak truth to power. I stand with Amanda because she's a true conservative who stands with us."
---
| Pennsylvania Senator Doug Mastriano
---
| |
---
|

"I'm honored to endorse Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. As the founder of the National Election Integrity she's a champion for election integrity both nationally and in Virginia. She's a pleasure to work with and knows how to get the job done."
Pennsylvania State Senator and Republican nominee Doug Mastriano

---
| Arizona Senator Sonny Borelli
---
| |
---
"Senator Amanda Chase is the only Virginia legislator who actually came out to Arizona to watch our full forensic audit, and again when our full report was released to the Senate.
She has my full support as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate."
---
| "It makes no sense that anyone claiming to be a Republican and who truly cares about election integrity would challenge her given everything she's done for election integrity, not just in Virginia but nationally.
She's been actively engaged in getting answers to what happened in 2020, implementing those solutions in legislation for Virginia, to include a full forensic audit, and founding the National Election Integrity Caucus to support other legislators across the country.
While we welcome anyone who wants to expose the lies and deception that took place in 2020, Amanda has been the leading work horse for election integrity in Virginia , not a show horse like her opponents who have recently taken an interest in putting the guardrails back on Virginia elections.
If you truly support real election integrity I highly recommend you support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate."
---

---
| |
---
|
"I am honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate."

---
| |
---
"As a small business owner, professor, and a member of the Colonial Heights City Council, I'm proud to stand with and endorse Senator Chase in her run for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Senate District 12."
---
| Senator Chase has represented my district since her election in 2016 and continues to push legislation to protect our individual freedoms and rights, such as overreaching COVID mandates, voting against tax increases, and preservation of the election process.
She stands firm in her faith and positions amidst controversy and challenges.
Her voting record is consistent and matches the promises she makes to her constituents. I support her continued service for District 12 as our Senator and provide her with my full endorsement."
---
| Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker
---
| |
---
"I endorse Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12.
Senator Chase has represented Amelia County for the past 7 years and I've had the pleasure to work with her on a number of issues."
---
| "She's present in the community, an active listener who cares about public safety and keeping our community safe. She's an effective legislator who fully supports public safety, our sheriffs and law enforcement.
Her 7 year voting record shows she supports the tools that help our sheriffs and law enforcement effectively do what they were trained to do to keep our communities safe.
She's co-patroned pay raises for our sheriffs, voted to support qualified immunity, protected our law enforcement from personal financial devastation and spoken on the Senate floor about the importance of fully funding our law enforcement and against defunding the police.
I stand with Senator Amanda Chase because she has a 7 year voting record of supporting our law enforcement."

---
| Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder
---
| |
---
| "I endorse Amanda Chase for a continuation of her successful results in putting the needs of her constituents ahead of going with the flow.
We need Virginia Senators who put partisan politics aside and focus on people rather than politics. Amanda is just that person.
She is courageously ahead of the curve in introducing and shepherding into law issues that meet peoples needs rather than seeking out easy and non-controversial issues.
We need Amanda for another term in the Virginia Senate."
---
| Former Chesterfield Commonwealth Attorney Billy Davenport
---
| |
---
"I have had the pleasure of knowing Senator Amanda Chase for the past fifteen years.
She is a Christian lady who lives her life by "Founding Father Values", the values that made our Country great."
---
| "She stands firm on our Constitutional Rights and amid much adversity she never wavers on the First and Second Amendments which give us the free exercise of religion, freedom of speech, the press, and the right to peacefully assemble to and petition the government for a redress of grievances, and the right to keep and bear arms.
Without the first two amendments all the other amendments would have much less effect.
She will not be silenced as she forcefully and effectively represents the people of her district.
She is a true Statesman who will not violate her oath of office and the trust of her constituents."
---
| Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal
---
| |
---
"I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Senate of Virginia in Senate District 12.
I've known Amanda both professionally and personally for over 15 years and know her to be a person of good character and integrity. "
---
| "Even before she was in the state senate she consistently stood up for what was right and wasn't afraid to challenge the status quo.
That said, she knows how to get things done and is a reliable and consistent vote for the people.
She stands strongly for the Constitution and doing right by the people she represents.
Amanda has been an effective Virginia State Senator who has consistently represented us well and without influence by special interest groups.
She has accomplished much since she was first elected in 2015. She works tirelessly for the people to represent their needs and we need to re-elect her to the Virginia Senate to be our voice."

Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month.
We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. You will want to turn in your notarized forms well before this date, as this is the date we must turn all forms into the chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com if you have questions or call our campaign cell at 804 380 0009.
