clean_body: How can I help Amanda? | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter SIGNS, SIGNS SIGNS 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20 | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK? | WEEK 1: CAMPAIGN UPDATE 2 | How Can I Help Amanda? | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979. She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | | | | MY OFFICE IS A TRUCK | Dear Friends and Supporters, There's no place like home, and better yet riding around the district in our pick up truck. While I'm thankful for the opportunity to represent you in Richmond, I love being back in the district spending time with many of you. This was my first full week back home in the district. Now that session is over, Mike and I have been driving across the district putting up 4 by 8 signs. Why? So that you know an election is coming and remember to get out and vote. I believe signs ARE important. The Republican Primary is just around the corner in less than 3 1/2 months on Tuesday, June 20 and I humbly ask for your vote. We've really enjoyed stopping by many of your homes and businesses throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Honestly, we've spent more time talking with you, than putting up signs. And we love it. If you have a great location for a sign, please let Mike know at mike@chaseforva.com. We've enjoyed talking to many of you who have come out and talked to us while we put up the sign on your property. I enjoy listening to what's on your mind and what's important to you. At every stop, people are telling us to keep up the good work and keep fighting. You're telling us that we've compromised so much that we're giving our country away and that you're tired of it. You're telling us to continue to stand strong and don't back down. You're telling us that you like that I don't go along to along and that you appreciate that I don't back down. What we love most is when you tell us that you're praying for us and particularly for our protection. Mike and I return home each day reinvigorated and determined to stand strong for you and our conservative values. Many of you also expressed that you were confused over the new legislative lines and were concerned as to whether or not you could still vote for me after redistricting. So I've included this information in this newsletter. You've also asked how can you help. So we have information about that as well. We are looking forward to seeing many of you Monday night at the Chesterfield VA Tea Party meeting for a legislative update. All legislators and candidates are invited and will be given an opportunity to speak. However, speakers will need to RSVP to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com. If you can't stay but want to pick up a yard sign, bumper sticker or want to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot, that's fine too. We also have t-shirts and hats for a donation of $50 or more. I look forward to seeing you Monday! If you're unsure if you can vote for me, please check the map below to see if you live in the district. | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. I can still vote for you. Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out. Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign. Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able? | | | == | Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week. Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts. For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm. For the second shift please arrive at 1:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm. We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | | == | What is a "Meet and Greet"? I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors. Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors? Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best. If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com to schedule a date. | | Can I vote for Amanda? | Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes | Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes | If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me. | | | | == | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm. In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12. | | | == | List of 51 Chesterfield Precincts in SD12 | == at Carver College and Career Academy at 12400 Branders Bridge Rd == at Gates Elementary at 10001 Courthouse Road == at Ironbridge Baptist Church at 10900 Iron Bridge Rd VSU Multipurpose Center at 20809 Second Ave == at Cloverhill Library Matoaca Middle School == at Chesdin Landing Golf == at Second Branch Baptist Church == at Bethia United Methodist Church == at Cosby High School == at Manchester High School == at Mt Herman Baptist Church == at Cosby High School == at Matoaca High School == at Bailey Bridge Middle School == at Alberta Smith Elementary == at Spring Run Elementary == at Second Branch Baptist == at Chesterfield Baptist Church == at Swift Creek Baptist Church == at Brandermill Church Swift Creek Elementary Gordon Elementary == at Monacan High School == at Reams Elementary School == at Central Chesterfield Ruritan Swift Creek Middle == at Cloverhill High School == at Shenandoah Community Evergreen Elementary == at Tomahawk Middle School == at Tomahawk Middle School Woolridge Elementary School == == at Cloverhill Elementary == at Brighton Green Pool Crestwood Elementary School == at Midlothian High School == at Robious Elementary School St Michael's School == at Greenfield Elementary School Church of the Redeemer == at Robious Middle School == at Community of Grace == at Midlothian Middle School == at Salisbury Presbyterian Watkins Elementary School == == the Islamic Center == | List of Colonial Heights Precincts in SD12 | Colonial Heights Precinct 1 at Community Building 157 Roanoke Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 2 at Colonial Heights Middle School 500 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 3 at Lakeview Elementary School 401 Taswell Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 4 at Colonial Heights High School Technical Center 3451 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 5 at Tussing Elementary School 5501 Conduit Rd. | | | == | Still not sure? Click below | | | == | How can I help Amanda? | | | ---|--- | Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above. You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online. You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address: Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112 If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com. | DO YOU HAVE A GOOD SIGN LOCATION? | | Mike and I are putting up 4 by 8s across Senate District 12 which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights and will continue until all of our 4 by 8s have been placed. Please reach out to Mike if you have a good 4 by 8 location on a main road or want to help put up 4 by 8s at mike@chaseforva.com. Please remember to include the contact information of the property owner. We respect property rights and only put up signs where we have permission from the home or business owner. Thanks to all who've already provided such great locations on main thoroughfares throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. The primary is Tuesday, June 20. If you'd like to add your business as a pick up location, please reach out to Mike at mike@chaseforva.com | | | ---|--- | Want a Yard Sign for your Yard? | Yard signs are also available for pick up at these location during their business hours: Bob Moate's Sports Shop 10418 Hull Street Road Midlothian, VA 23112 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30-6pm Friday 9-7pm Saturday 8-5pm Sunday 8-4pm Dance's Sporting Goods 570 Southpark Blvd Colonial Heights, VA 23834 Hours: Weekdays 8am to 6pm Saturday 10-4pm Sunday 12-4pm Or click here to request a sign: mailto:mike@chaseforva.com | ENDORSEMENTS | President Donald J Trump Congressman Bob Good Former Congressman Dave Brat Former Congressman Virgil Goode Bishop EW Jackson Delegate John McGuire Colonial Heights City Council John Wood Colonial Heights City Council Dr. Laura Poe Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker Arizona Senator Sonny Borrelli Pennsylvania Senator and Republican Nominee for Governor Doug Mastriano Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder Former Chesterfield Commonwealth's Attorney Billy Davenport Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal John Frederick, The John Frederick Radio Network Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | President Donald J Trump | == | "You're doing a great job... I'm going to be with YOU on your next campaign. Just let me know when you're ready." \- President Donald J Trump | Congressman Bob Good | | "Today, I'm announcing my official endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. | "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people. She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents. She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally to include election integrity, protecting our constitutional rights, like the Second Amendment, pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates and voting against all tax increases. We need to send our known fighter and firebrand back to the Virginia Senate so she can continue to make a difference in the lives of every Virginian." | Former Congressman Dave Brat | | "Today, I'm announcing my endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Chase supported me before it was cool to be Pro Faith, Pro Constitution, Pro Free Markets and Pro American. She has courage. I ran on and supported the Republican Creed of Virginia. | "Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase. • Free enterprise system - No special interests • All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities • Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels • Observing Constitutional limitations • Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense • Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation "We the People" are tired of politicians who do not see the dangers right in front of us; from out of control schools to election integrity. We want people that can clearly articulate what these issues are and boldly lead the people to action. If we elect leaders that hold fast to the Virginia Republican Creed, there is no way we can end up with runaway spending, crime in the streets, crushing regulations and an economy that favors the Big and Powerful over small business and our great citizens. "We the People" overwhelmingly love God, Country and our fellow citizens. But love does not mean that anything goes. We the People demand that politicians are accountable to us. They work for us. Senator Amanda Chase will listen to the vast majority who want truth and sanity back in Government. Unfortunately, that will take a fight, and we have someone who will fight the good fight to ensure that the City on a Hill remains bright for us and a light for generations to come." | Former Congressman Virgil Goode | | | " "I'm honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. " | Delegate John McGuire | | "I'm proud to endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. " | "She has a lifelong 7 year voting record you can trust. 100 percent rating with the Family Foundation, 100 percent rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League and an 'A' rating with the NRA. As Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus she has led the efforts in Virginia to put the guardrails back on our elections and even introduced a bill calling for a full forensic audit of Virginia. It was an honor to work with her and successfully pass legislation that Governor Youngkin asked us to both carry to exempt retired military benefits for our veterans up to $40,000. This was a bill she originally introduced in the Senate in 2021 and I was proud to work with her and see this bill finally pass under a Republican Governor. " | Former Delegate Brenda Pogge | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Distict 12. As a former delegate, I have served together with Amanda in the General Assembly and also on a commission. She is a strong reliable conservative voice and vote, and a woman of strong faith in God and the founding of our country on Judeo-Christian values. She not only votes to protect the unborn, she introduces legislation to defend life and clearly articulates why it's never the government's role to fund abortions with taxpayer dollars." | "Amanda is not a typical politician, she's a mom of 4 who deeply cares for the people in her community. Education and school choice is a top priority. She homeschooled her children when they were young and truly understands the importance of parents having input in their children's education and fully supports parental rights and choice in education over government mandates. She not only supports school choice, she lived it. As a senator, Amanda Chase has an impeccable 7 year conservative voting record. Whether you're talking about pro-life, gun rights, defending our Constitution and individual rights, fighting for real election integrity, voting for limited government, voting against all tax increases and fully funding our law enforcement, Senator Chase checks all the boxes. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase and I encourage you to do so too." | Bishop E.W. Jackson | | "I have known Senator Amanda Chase personally and professionally for over 15 years. It is my pleasure and honor to endorse her for re-election to the Virginia Senate in District 12. Senator Chase is a courageous Christian voice for faith, family, and freedom. | "Amanda is a bold champion for our conservative values and has an impeccable 7-year voting record to prove it. She is pro-God, pro-life, pro-2A, pro-family, pro-election integrity, pro-business, and pro-law and order. She is a pro-life leader for legislation in the Virginia Senate such as the pain capable and heart beat bills, and she has a 100 percent lifetime rating with the Family Foundation. Amanda exposed and spoke against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment that would enshrine abortion as well as gender identity politics into the Virginia Constitution. Senator Chase is not just a Republican placeholder; she's a conservative firebrand who is not afraid to speak truth to power. I stand with Amanda because she's a true conservative who stands with us." | Pennsylvania Senator Doug Mastriano | | | "I'm honored to endorse Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. As the founder of the National Election Integrity she's a champion for election integrity both nationally and in Virginia. She's a pleasure to work with and knows how to get the job done." Pennsylvania State Senator and Republican nominee Doug Mastriano | Arizona Senator Sonny Borelli | | "Senator Amanda Chase is the only Virginia legislator who actually came out to Arizona to watch our full forensic audit, and again when our full report was released to the Senate. She has my full support as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate." | "It makes no sense that anyone claiming to be a Republican and who truly cares about election integrity would challenge her given everything she's done for election integrity, not just in Virginia but nationally. She's been actively engaged in getting answers to what happened in 2020, implementing those solutions in legislation for Virginia, to include a full forensic audit, and founding the National Election Integrity Caucus to support other legislators across the country. While we welcome anyone who wants to expose the lies and deception that took place in 2020, Amanda has been the leading work horse for election integrity in Virginia , not a show horse like her opponents who have recently taken an interest in putting the guardrails back on Virginia elections. If you truly support real election integrity I highly recommend you support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman John Wood | | | "I am honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman Dr. Laura Poe | | "As a small business owner, professor, and a member of the Colonial Heights City Council, I'm proud to stand with and endorse Senator Chase in her run for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Senate District 12." | Senator Chase has represented my district since her election in 2016 and continues to push legislation to protect our individual freedoms and rights, such as overreaching COVID mandates, voting against tax increases, and preservation of the election process. She stands firm in her faith and positions amidst controversy and challenges. Her voting record is consistent and matches the promises she makes to her constituents. I support her continued service for District 12 as our Senator and provide her with my full endorsement." | Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Senator Chase has represented Amelia County for the past 7 years and I've had the pleasure to work with her on a number of issues." | "She's present in the community, an active listener who cares about public safety and keeping our community safe. She's an effective legislator who fully supports public safety, our sheriffs and law enforcement. Her 7 year voting record shows she supports the tools that help our sheriffs and law enforcement effectively do what they were trained to do to keep our communities safe. She's co-patroned pay raises for our sheriffs, voted to support qualified immunity, protected our law enforcement from personal financial devastation and spoken on the Senate floor about the importance of fully funding our law enforcement and against defunding the police. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase because she has a 7 year voting record of supporting our law enforcement." | Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder | | | "I endorse Amanda Chase for a continuation of her successful results in putting the needs of her constituents ahead of going with the flow. We need Virginia Senators who put partisan politics aside and focus on people rather than politics. Amanda is just that person. She is courageously ahead of the curve in introducing and shepherding into law issues that meet peoples needs rather than seeking out easy and non-controversial issues. We need Amanda for another term in the Virginia Senate." | Former Chesterfield Commonwealth Attorney Billy Davenport | | "I have had the pleasure of knowing Senator Amanda Chase for the past fifteen years. She is a Christian lady who lives her life by "Founding Father Values", the values that made our Country great." | "She stands firm on our Constitutional Rights and amid much adversity she never wavers on the First and Second Amendments which give us the free exercise of religion, freedom of speech, the press, and the right to peacefully assemble to and petition the government for a redress of grievances, and the right to keep and bear arms. Without the first two amendments all the other amendments would have much less effect. She will not be silenced as she forcefully and effectively represents the people of her district. She is a true Statesman who will not violate her oath of office and the trust of her constituents." | Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal | | "I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Senate of Virginia in Senate District 12. I've known Amanda both professionally and personally for over 15 years and know her to be a person of good character and integrity. " | "Even before she was in the state senate she consistently stood up for what was right and wasn't afraid to challenge the status quo. That said, she knows how to get things done and is a reliable and consistent vote for the people. She stands strongly for the Constitution and doing right by the people she represents. Amanda has been an effective Virginia State Senator who has consistently represented us well and without influence by special interest groups. She has accomplished much since she was first elected in 2015. She works tirelessly for the people to represent their needs and we need to re-elect her to the Virginia Senate to be our voice." | Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | | | "I know of no harder working person in Virginia so capable and willing to fight for freedom and our foundational God-given natural rights through self-preservation through our United States Constitutional Second Amendment than Senator Amanda Chase." | You are invited to Join Team Chase | | Now that session is over, I can fully focus on running for re-election. If you're interested in scheduling a meet and greet please email Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com. Also, if you'd like to help out, we're looking for people to collect signatures so that I can get my name on the ballot. I need 250 signatures. If you're interested, please reach out to Mike at mailto:mike@chaseforva.com. We hope to see you soon! For God & Country, | | SAVE THE DATE | GIVE TODAY | | | | == | MARCH 6 | Legislative Update for the 2023 Session | Please join us for an overview of the 2023 General Assembly Session. What happened during the legislative session? How does the legislation passed effect you? Things you need to know. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh4p0sjbn7jbtljbalg7casuofa58qgiv5bdke68_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm1ob6cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd381v3qkfnmv5hhhd7erto3d37bd8u3a8blai3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm1ob6cph2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0m54me6jpt8th995sccvgqla0vhfisl482l5f5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm1ob6cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6hja9uhi4kr90r22jt81hvtjbtvoiojqqkh9bfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm1ob6cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zme1lrefkq6np1e2ieov98rfur7ghj9r1nl6ahpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3gm1ob6cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zm2cfs4d4k96a7n6q40k7eq4qlbqobc3ama94ino).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs56ib7naqbf443baaevjcfuobcdmkcleggmiqh8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctge2o71cpj649fg)

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution." Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387787:JYtgO3GNJ:m:1:3331421248:020ACF52CA8E286E87878D688F8FBB79:r "Balloon") Peter: So far, we know there's no little green men flying around us, but that's all the Biden Administration wants to tell us. Unacceptable. Like you, I'm grateful for the men and women of our Armed Forces who are keeping our skies safe, but that's not enough. Are we being invaded? Are the Chinese spying on us? Has anything or anyone been harmed? The American people deserve far more answers than we have. **[Will you help me demand answers accountability from the Biden Administration? Chip in $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and let's get to the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387787:JYtgO3GNJ:m:1:3331421248:020ACF52CA8E286E87878D688F8FBB79:r "Will you help me demand answers accountability from the Biden
Administration? Chip in $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and let’s get to the truth.")** I know what you're thinking. Joe Biden has been so weak on national security that it's probably China or Russia testing our national security apparatus. We live in a dangerous world and having a weak leader sitting in the Oval Office is not making us any safer. **They 're probably laughing at us right now--it took almost a week for us to shoot down the first one.** We shouldn't have to look out our windows and wonder if that's a bird, a plane or a Chinese balloon flying overhead, and it shouldn't have the opportunity to traverse the continental United States like there's not a worry to be found. **[I'm demanding accountability and leadership in Washington. Donate at least $50 TODAY and let me know you're on my side.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387786:JYtgO3GNJ:m:1:3331421248:020ACF52CA8E286E87878D688F8FBB79:r "I’m demanding accountability and leadership in Washington.
Donate at least $50 TODAY and let me know you’re on my side.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387787:JYtgO3GNJ:m:1:3331421248:020ACF52CA8E286E87878D688F8FBB79:r "Headline")It's bad enough we've got drug dealers and terrorists coming through our Southern Border. Now we've got an air invasion to monitor like nothing our nation has ever seen. **I 'm demanding answers on your behalf, and I won't give up!** If it's from China, then I demand Biden call his friend Xi Jinping and let him know this nation won't tolerate their games. We'll shoot down each and every UFO they send our way, and we'll punish them for it--the Biden family needs to push our nation's security above their financial interests. **Shooting down these UFOs is NOT enough!** **[Join the Bergman Brigade and let's force Biden to take a strong stand against China's balloon invasion! Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387787:JYtgO3GNJ:m:1:3331421248:020ACF52CA8E286E87878D688F8FBB79:r "Join the Bergman Brigade and let’s force Biden to take a
strong stand against China’s balloon invasion! Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY!")** Brazenly flying anything over our sovereign nation is unacceptable whether it's from little green men or another nation on this planet--even if that makes me "trigger-happy." With over 40 years of service in the Marine Corps, you can be assured that I'm fulfilling my oath to protect this nation whether Biden will or not. No excuse will be tolerated. These incidents cannot go unpunished or cause our nation to panic. Let's get the answers we deserve and put an end to the UFOs flying over our nation. **[Help me show Biden what decisive action in defense of our nation looks like. Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387787:JYtgO3GNJ:m:1:3331421248:020ACF52CA8E286E87878D688F8FBB79:r "Help me show Biden what decisive action in defense of our nation
looks like. Donate TODAY!")** For our safety,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd1a56ec-b7be-46ed-b5bd-8fdf0e7fcaaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**[YES»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387854:J-r9g3G3N:m:1:3365131770:83ED6ED2294B24C08A4B0D4690FBC33F:r)**

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387854:J-r9g3G3N:m:1:3365131770:83ED6ED2294B24C08A4B0D4690FBC33F:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387854:J-r9g3G3N:m:1:3365131770:83ED6ED2294B24C08A4B0D4690FBC33F:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387854:J-r9g3G3N:m:1:3365131770:83ED6ED2294B24C08A4B0D4690FBC33F:r)**
While the anti-gunners rely on _**dark-money billionaires**_ to set their agenda, the NRA gets its input from red-blooded American patriots. It's grassroots supporters like you who power our movement.

**[Please use this personalized link to take the NRA's Official Survey on Gun Verification and help protect YOUR rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62387854:J-r9g3G3N:m:1:3365131770:83ED6ED2294B24C08A4B0D4690FBC33F:r)**

Thank you,

NRA

# There's No Place Like Home
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N_1djJ0wE3vj3Zbn1b6_5CSoIKwA93VWeQSq3ztYJa_g06VAsahK9qocl1IgLS_6WOWeFE8xn5Ub3hogya-TB1QhXRQelOgHXtM0kizfnFEMOP9TbIh0U0dOH69QGw_Nqe7ErZ8TVqPjRmXbW-6ZaQ==&c=NsqR9Y_pCyWpjVFqaPH28QR_32GHm1q-fjXx-KfWu67uX_3FHO9pjA==&ch=YW9Y9P5AGtY38eu8DZmFxDwy8NFf8rrFBtjuS-cGVxa0JmvakrwnIg==)
---
| 'Karen and Jay share thoughts about the importance of making a house a home'
---
| Remember Dorothy in the Wizard of Oz? Saying 'There's no place like home. There's no place like home.' I think almost everyone can identify with that deep human sentiment. That yearning in each of us to return to a safe, warm, loving place - a place that we call 'home.' Sometimes we think of home as a certain place - perhaps where we grew up. Or perhaps where we are today. Or maybe, i's not so much a particular place - but 'going home' may mean being together with our family, our loved ones. But whatever it means to you, the idea of 'going home' is so very special. It's one of life's true treasures.
Have you ever gotten home after a long day and thought to yourself, there is truly, no place like home? The word home itself can evoke so much for each of us. Sometimes we may think it's just a place with walls and a roof over our head, but the truth is, our homes, and how we make them, are environments that have much deeper meaning and value. What we define, or how we make a home, is often the biggest reflection of who we are and what we've both experienced and what we value.
Home in our lexicon here in the States tends to be a physical place, shelter, and sanctuary, that gives us refuge from everything that happens outside of it. Interestingly enough though, throughout the world, home has different meanings or even translations across different cultures, once again reflecting its diverse interpretation. To really explore how we define the word home can do wonders for cultivating and developing our own understanding of the word and even who we are as individuals. For example, Karen's dad used to say how 'at home' he felt when he was sailing up in Maine. Not a dwelling, but still a place that he felt most comfortable in. Home is a memory, a feeling, part of our imagination that helps us tell the story of ourselves and gives us context for our place in the world. In another sense, the United States is our home here, and with that comes a whole different contextualization for the understanding of home. When we travel abroad and share that we are American, it impacts our interactions, for better or for worse, but 'home' in this case once again grounds us with a sense of identity and self unlike few other things in life.
Perhaps when we were younger, we didn't like making the bed in the morning or doing the dishes, but now you can't live without it. Or maybe you grew up in one place you once thought you'd never leave, but did, and now call another place your home. The point being, where we make home, call home, or feel home is ultimately a place where we not only show our most vulnerable and comfortable selves, but where we make memories that tell each of our unique stories. And whether we want to believe it or not, a home is a home not just because it's where we might sleep, or where we might feel most comfortable, but it's where we are able to catch the best glimpse of who we really are. And because of this, yes, it's true - there's no place like home!
---

| Positive Profile of the Week - Harold and Gerry LaValley - Builders of Homes, Community Leaders
---
| | |
---|---
|
This week we are delighted to highlight a spectacular couple and great friends of mine - Harold and Gerry LaValley of Newport. Successful in business, unparalleled leaders in our community and genuinely wonderful people.

Harold and Gerry founded LaValley Building Supply in 1962 with a single store in Newport, New Hampshire. Reliable service and honest dealing were the underpinnings of their success as they grew the company to include eight locations throughout New Hampshire and Vermont. Together they have built one of the most respected and trusted building supply companies in the entire region. The company, now a third-generation family business, is known today as LaValley-Middleton Building Supply with 12 retail locations.

Over the years, LaValley Building Supply has been a reliable partner for individuals and contractors looking to build or renovate their homes. In addition to the wide range of high-quality products in their retail stores they offer truss and wall panel fabrication, a top-of-the-line paint and decorating center along with one of the largest most modern Easter White Pine sawmills in New England. Add to all this a very knowledgeable staff and you have a recipe for a great organization!

Despite their significant growth and success, LaValley Building Supply has remained committed to their roots and to their local community. The company sponsors numerous events and organizations throughout the year, and the LaValley family has been actively involved in local charities and civic organizations for decades. This giving back to the community has greatly helped Newport as it looks to reimagine itself for an exciting future. In fact, there have been no more generous supporters of the community and no greater friends of the Sunshine Initiative than Harold and Gerry.

Despite all their success, there's a good chance you'll still find them at the business [www.LaValleys.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N_1djJ0wE3vj3Zbn1b6_5CSoIKwA93VWeQSq3ztYJa_g06VAsahK9qocl1IgLS_6nu84jl25PMBs2F4eib4rq4cPPuXMEXVZx0ouRBKhFnNmbAcv7CuOC5o4IyQy1YcQaHPRzQsNTcvuPcm9kHwycQ==&c=NsqR9Y_pCyWpjVFqaPH28QR_32GHm1q-fjXx-KfWu67uX_3FHO9pjA==&ch=YW9Y9P5AGtY38eu8DZmFxDwy8NFf8rrFBtjuS-cGVxa0JmvakrwnIg==) where you can learn how to transform your home...or just stop in - they'll be glad to listen and talk with you about how your vision is their passion!
We thank you, Harold and Gerry, for all you do!
|

| Quote of the Week
---
| "Home is the place where, when you have to go there, they have to take you in." \- Robert Frost

Reliable service and honest dealing were the underpinnings of their success as they grew the company to include eight locations throughout New Hampshire and Vermont. Together they have built one of the most respected and trusted building supply companies in the entire region. The company, now a third-generation family business, is known today as LaValley-Middleton Building Supply with 12 retail locations. Over the years, LaValley Building Supply has been a reliable partner for individuals and contractors looking to build or renovate their homes. In addition to the wide range of high-quality products in their retail stores they offer truss and wall panel fabrication, a top-of-the-line paint and decorating center along with one of the largest most modern Easter White Pine sawmills in New England. Add to all this a very knowledgeable staff and you have a recipe for a great organization! Despite their significant growth and success, LaValley Building Supply has remained committed to their roots and to their local community. The company sponsors numerous events and organizations throughout the year, and the LaValley family has been actively involved in local charities and civic organizations for decades. This giving back to the community has greatly helped Newport as it looks to reimagine itself for an exciting future. In fact, there have been no more generous supporters of the community and no greater friends of the Sunshine Initiative than Harold and Gerry. Despite all their success, there's a good chance you'll still find them at the business == where you can learn how to transform your home...or just stop in - they'll be glad to listen and talk with you about how your vision is their passion! We thank you, Harold and Gerry, for all you do! | | Quote of the Week | "Home is the place where, when you have to go there, they have to take you in." \- Robert Frost | Jay Lucas | == | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | | | | Jay Lucas | 7 Portwalk Pl, Portsmouth, NH 03801 | | == Sent by mailto:info@jaylucas.us

name: Indiana Republican Party HQ
subject: Gov. Holcomb pushes back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/73fbaa6d136c7173/71deee39daf47828c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, Just a few weeks ago, the EPA announced that they were _taking control_ of the cleanup of the East Palestine train derailment. **And ever since, it’s been disaster after disaster. ** The latest? At a press conference earlier this week, the agency _promised_ to notify elected officials and state agencies before approving the shipment of any waste from the derailment site to another state — **they didn’t.** On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb _pushed back_ on the agency’s decision to transport hazardous materials from the derailment to an Indiana facility without advance notice and after the state conveyed it should be transported to the nearest facility to the derailment. Here's what he had to say — “I continue to object to the EPA Administrator’s decision, from Washington, D.C., to move hazardous waste from the East Palestine train derailment to Indiana. Further, there has been a lack of communication with me and other Indiana officials about this decision. “**After learning third-hand** that materials may be transported to our state yesterday [Monday], I directed my environmental director to reach out to the agency. The materials should go to the nearest facilities, not moved from the far eastern side of Ohio to the far western side of Indiana. I have made a request to speak to the administrator to discuss this matter. I want to know exactly what precautions will be taken in the transport and disposition of the materials.” **Governor Holcomb is right** — the materials should go to the nearest facilities, **not** hundreds of miles across state lines, and not without increased oversight. The Biden administration has once again shown its incompetence and must be held accountable. — Indiana Republican Party HQ
---
| | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP.
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
I don't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3df1f7c3abc4b07be3a60441d35275b&_e=lopVM-co9r8v44R9K6B_cUck5xJmNbuvTcC8cY7FN1-zqL9Vah9f9RUvFv5sw7zXYz5nu4LFQe_n-B4rxmtU2sRibEiGuy8c6L2xVAfTz_6Cnd74bpesqXDW7pGllpxK1MTfyTngyz_171QdHi2BX78s9Cilwm9Q3cO_AEy1UfbY6Jvc9z_0r14ssk9lqozqqf6Iz7SDlzLLm7jIuaLZat1UdkEEWh_gD1sFXyuMaHZ8lQWY-3mbOULl4x86nVZNSrp_S2nYJKhSPkFb9dYrmm8zW4KBuCpDRegqQ4-Z8Nh084r6ymm69QYYnWjyq6oKrIrP0gqWgGu8aDJ-8hsGDCddYWRUWlQgOmzOQoybCPx92zstdosTPwG3Cj85BIq4qzikINLb8UMak022ZikPrg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's [**RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3df1f7c3abc4b07be3a60441d35275b&_e=lopVM-co9r8v44R9K6B_cUck5xJmNbuvTcC8cY7FN1-zqL9Vah9f9RUvFv5sw7zXYz5nu4LFQe_n-B4rxmtU2sRibEiGuy8c6L2xVAfTz_6Cnd74bpesqXDW7pGllpxK1MTfyTngyz_171QdHi2BX78s9Cilwm9Q3cO_AEy1UfbY6Jvc9z_0r14ssk9lqozqqf6Iz7SDlzLLm7jIuaLZat1UdkEEWh_gD1sFXyuMaHZ8lQWY-3mbOULl4x86nVZNM6g96ZeomwIAEbncnnL4918FPcJhRDcNUwYYo43uRlZlHmpiu9X4ZTp5Ojk0ma7c-uyxENa_GEuf_vj14ItkZAt-wmnn24VGuHZEnIspFV0_KzumMrK2SVeycDkxtHrVhNzHKUz5pDST-ljq-I2J0w%3D%3D) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times'_ "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." **" Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written."** Outrageous! _The New York Times '_ stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2023. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times '_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3df1f7c3abc4b07be3a60441d35275b&_e=lopVM-co9r8v44R9K6B_cUck5xJmNbuvTcC8cY7FN1-zqL9Vah9f9RUvFv5sw7zXYz5nu4LFQe_n-B4rxmtU2sRibEiGuy8c6L2xVAfTz_6Cnd74bpesqXDW7pGllpxK1MTfyTngyz_171QdHi2BX78s9Cilwm9Q3cO_AEy1UfbY6Jvc9z_0r14ssk9lqozqqf6Iz7SDlzLLm7jIuaLZat1UdkEEWh_gD1sFXyuMaHZ8lQWY-3mbOULl4x86nVZN7vhC9WhAgim39V9mVCeUbdbhDWNuxMaEBkWylwkUatxGiK6Qgm4-CEO_7I8bZUpPft6CCFbuegemald76hC-daU9MwZm9M8Tsd9E9VRmnAn6a0xhRjMvA7zOmg0MCjpmXJ12nqXN212T5_ou86Zc1Q%3D%3D)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3df1f7c3abc4b07be3a60441d35275b&_e=lopVM-co9r8v44R9K6B_cUck5xJmNbuvTcC8cY7FN1-zqL9Vah9f9RUvFv5sw7zXYz5nu4LFQe_n-B4rxmtU2sRibEiGuy8c6L2xVAfTz_6Cnd74bpesqXDW7pGllpxK1MTfyTngyz_171QdHi2BX78s9Cilwm9Q3cO_AEy1UfbY6Jvc9z_0r14ssk9lqozqqf6Iz7SDlzLLm7jIuaLZat1UdkEEWh_gD1sFXyuMaHZ8lQWY-3mbOULl4x86nVZN2xCHP7oWlBohMMMrcgBJCjXisa_bVyO8GCdiJXj0zIhQrLQ_0QCSpuvrMFYg8tte1rGK2V6-SO5xwNijEITUSZDv_JRIlvDXeen1t8uG1OWF4v4yLeH-MkPEk30xp4ZciiMGRHokHmM4NEo5MEDlrA%3D%3D)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." This free course is called **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the "fake news" _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We've now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3df1f7c3abc4b07be3a60441d35275b&_e=lopVM-co9r8v44R9K6B_cUck5xJmNbuvTcC8cY7FN1-zqL9Vah9f9RUvFv5sw7zXYz5nu4LFQe_n-B4rxmtU2sRibEiGuy8c6L2xVAfTz_6Cnd74bpesqXDW7pGllpxK1MTfyTngyz_171QdHi2BX78s9Cilwm9Q3cO_AEy1UfbY6Jvc9z_0r14ssk9lqozqqf6Iz7SDlzLLm7jIuaLZat1UdkEEWh_gD1sFXyuMaHZ8lQWY-3mbOULl4x86nVZNTiqtYL5cFVQSvHaYg0bIZyWOX2RVQ7h4Okrfbiaw-vMPuR7jK8EZPqS-9MhgJ2bl0i8DFdPpQhjrIw70V9te-L6PcMysZVKNNSmXnzdGmg6t2J_7zpsGIfGPRglQj64Qf3E438RvWkNr2xs7EM1_hg%3D%3D)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we're doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3df1f7c3abc4b07be3a60441d35275b&_e=lopVM-co9r8v44R9K6B_cUck5xJmNbuvTcC8cY7FN1-zqL9Vah9f9RUvFv5sw7zXYz5nu4LFQe_n-B4rxmtU2sRibEiGuy8c6L2xVAfTz_6Cnd74bpesqXDW7pGllpxK1MTfyTngyz_171QdHi2BX78s9Cilwm9Q3cO_AEy1UfbY6Jvc9z_0r14ssk9lqozqqf6Iz7SDlzLLm7jIuaLZat1UdkEEWh_gD1sFXyuMaHZ8lQWY-3mbOULl4x86nVZNZHUfs7pwdUp0XECN2fsyky2KSiKXjlIHjvZF3EQpC2FF_C01wgpmULMOo9XltBDh01WI21ouM695KfFADQjM0WKrw1V3jWvRFYhH3JURCFc0EtmRZ2WIT9y3mlYOyvrjJptyc1UN9sLkAREWAG_YUg%3D%3D) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives' attack on American history and liberty. Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

clean_body: I don't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times' "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." " Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written." Outrageous! The New York Times ' stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2023. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times ' efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times ' "1619 Project." This free course is called " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the "fake news" New York Times. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We've now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we're doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives' attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College's defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
