body:
I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=332e907cc8734b7091b2df6e29cf8dfb&_e=co0IOqVxEhCv43Jc-s6ekGruOGHfF0H0do_pWb2JBhsNJcd0U9aL4Ddgcbw888qbTOn5Rt_b118F8W9yAJyog4DresYVChw4qscE1xRziw80nq2z0hnP5OZ-RvteVcUnowjbVSLQ-NsvL37DZjZrFMTAJSYPxqnD5g45bAF6fslysNsPFolHrgpq40EgEmF-C9qkqk2xN-bsnQLPx-v67YQa5P7t_cFAf7qb8PGNNRdEW7TfNJ9SvvQc6aKlQWiYuXy42IgnaZg2sk86yawzpjxHqnEoQ6nnE7RhdfzqQ3tQlk1gLRSqTIv5BMj5cgMf4X-8IAA07SeQAQMqTzGcZBRAQxZ3bJ1WVzGuLf7_cGHIpV22FYmaI7ddVzbK5Q4DqwM2MRSkuuMGKxkBWbYMLVVPgaVEqp3hKbr1CSgnBGDKKgCK_z0VPxWUVrUjrKua)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=332e907cc8734b7091b2df6e29cf8dfb&_e=co0IOqVxEhCv43Jc-s6ekGruOGHfF0H0do_pWb2JBhsNJcd0U9aL4Ddgcbw888qbTOn5Rt_b118F8W9yAJyog4DresYVChw4qscE1xRziw80nq2z0hnP5OZ-RvteVcUnowjbVSLQ-NsvL37DZjZrFMTAJSYPxqnD5g45bAF6fslysNsPFolHrgpq40EgEmF-C9qkqk2xN-bsnQLPx-v67YQa5P7t_cFAf7qb8PGNNRdEW7TfNJ9SvvQc6aKlQWiYuXy42IgnaZg2sk86yawzpkVVVfNWmaYHKw43Ep0N_ATEMxXGoscYfr-dsogR28j1FqQnGy9NgKbsRL8IlfOqvpaP_eGnePFATMe6RBRuot08NWyIfQVnTD32zVjWJo-aTB0O_JyXaDs5BTK5RjhZ2bMY1s7LCsFUxNkVGsfCpQcCWV2ay8jj9qsx-05bCaIg)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=332e907cc8734b7091b2df6e29cf8dfb&_e=co0IOqVxEhCv43Jc-s6ekGruOGHfF0H0do_pWb2JBhsNJcd0U9aL4Ddgcbw888qbTOn5Rt_b118F8W9yAJyog4DresYVChw4qscE1xRziw80nq2z0hnP5OZ-RvteVcUnowjbVSLQ-NsvL37DZjZrFMTAJSYPxqnD5g45bAF6fslysNsPFolHrgpq40EgEmF-C9qkqk2xN-bsnQLPx-v67YQa5P7t_cFAf7qb8PGNNRdEW7TfNJ9SvvQc6aKlQWiYuXy42IgnaZg2sk86yawzplwPypbpYPY5EwCcyaBMBA8myL_DYdfv1WD5SQZZZEEBhP1sPNUAppO3dWnCqS38ggWD5ayZEYNfiO-x8hv0m2uTADMBCcNAY-PlfTwr4hXA9PbhHk_TlK_Ip1pCNwfCxyB5lByF4zLBWnQU9_woOktWDlBpjGmCp8ytAKpAgBkI)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593244/394598381/-100636749?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3970-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThhYTcyYS1kZGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdi-TmUfyCnlCeMlOa-X8tA2HdheTzEdtLzI_mv4WCA=)
Friend, you may know that I’m celebrating my 65th birthday, and I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for the thoughtful birthday wishes that you’ve sent my way. It’s certainly a milestone, and one I feel lucky to be marking.

Another milestone I’m marking this year is the kickoff of my re-election campaign to the Senate, just over 10 years after being sworn in for the first time in January of 2013. I feel deeply honored to serve the people of Virginia — I love the Commonwealth, and I love its citizens. Nothing would make me happier than the opportunity to keep delivering results for families across VA and the USA.
So I have a personal request for you today: **[_If you’re able, will you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and my re-election campaign? Your support will help us build the strongest possible foundation to keep Virginia blue amid a strong GOP push to regain power. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593245/394598389/-100636749?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3970-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThhYTcyYS1kZGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdi-TmUfyCnlCeMlOa-X8tA2HdheTzEdtLzI_mv4WCA=)**
**You can donate at this link: [_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_timkaine_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593246/394598396/-100636749?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3970-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThhYTcyYS1kZGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdi-TmUfyCnlCeMlOa-X8tA2HdheTzEdtLzI_mv4WCA=)**
Thank you very much.

TK

Tim Kaine
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593247/394598398/1575385346?refcode=jtk3970-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThhYTcyYS1kZGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdi-TmUfyCnlCeMlOa-X8tA2HdheTzEdtLzI_mv4WCA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593248/394598399/1575385346?refcode=jtk3970-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThhYTcyYS1kZGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdi-TmUfyCnlCeMlOa-X8tA2HdheTzEdtLzI_mv4WCA=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593251/394598401/1575385346?refcode=jtk3970-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThhYTcyYS1kZGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdi-TmUfyCnlCeMlOa-X8tA2HdheTzEdtLzI_mv4WCA=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: re: reaching out again

body:

name: Tim Scott
subject: If you only open one email today, I pray it’s this one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Trust me, you’re gonna want to see this!

| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651845%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M1pGQTM%2f1Iao99DJLnoHgA&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---
It’s Senator Tim Scott. I’ve been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I’ve always been able to count on you in the past, so please don’t let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651846%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SU7cevdLOv%2b7Qdc6hBW%2fUA&sysid=1 "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651847%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t4IS7TA5Ed5v1mus53WWeA&sysid=1)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651848%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cLEuo%2brLUNJFPyqstoQlXg&sysid=1 "Can I count on you to join
my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651847%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t4IS7TA5Ed5v1mus53WWeA&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp3hp52aljjkt8geaqfpo91snl4l2hs0u17cfahg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm8pb6c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh2n81don6k31la640ifd4vueh2301eqai0gnsjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm8pb6c9h2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze7199fv0oj8fp84snu2n3r2775j16j8uot1v0po_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm8pb6c9h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zujqmr8bo72difh7i84g5uv0okev2gu9j4orf4e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm8pb6c9h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjrpuc5pp3c1mghar7k8bb01ugg28lpsgbagqi5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm8pb6c9h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z8bdi4n97ia26t9atlpqij36r510q4230ivegeb0).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcn62v8ctveu77ub22593sq312sklq6mrfna9e6g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctge6p35cph649fg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Not your typical political email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4539ad8613ef44d69eac25db35b2b23c&_e=mmfy52r_NzQrHw1r0R4lY2tCGz3EbtSNTRNAtIPtMFhXTglC-IeZiKc1g4prMGRdLJBLKf7DVNPZs3eW_-wi3FuLDLgT-JPgbsnnQCLBn3LCwkiBON5YMghBE2GuFMdWK8apNw5FRF0tAoB1CemrJfElrLFFiwUS6ZRhIFqV_2OsnZa1OgWbPZ8bQcHRP5nrgCG6j23uFk2Y2gBNsz3SYM6_t2-BkNYfbMlN3TA4y0hAxvPbKGXnkorTrxNOCSJoabbPDB9VxfkM4PhAhDnzIy4MqjcKjSYOX27IA1KZoaLEOwEwl7IYuKS5FlMLxQheF4z0CbWmrCPkbLdn4poee6WBLXpTBIis0pRZjv6NPynslx19ay7YDDiL37YhKqj4zXWVw6TovnpUFqhouJKtpDky_dA1eoiWvUpp2OPgvPMkyllsk_x5Y-8BOCndghKT)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4539ad8613ef44d69eac25db35b2b23c&_e=mmfy52r_NzQrHw1r0R4lY2tCGz3EbtSNTRNAtIPtMFhXTglC-IeZiKc1g4prMGRdLJBLKf7DVNPZs3eW_-wi3FuLDLgT-JPgbsnnQCLBn3LCwkiBON5YMghBE2GuFMdWK8apNw5FRF0tAoB1CemrJfElrLFFiwUS6ZRhIFqV_2OsnZa1OgWbPZ8bQcHRP5nrgCG6j23uFk2Y2gBNsz3SYM6_t2-BkNYfbMlN3TA4y0hAxvPbKGXnkorTrxNOCSJoabbPDB9VxfkM4PhAhDnzI9OdaTVS6hFRguisDnvyDp-x5ODyQoY06wZYG2nUopuL35ikTMWNIfxgYJde4uj9AZBigIzo8JL90JstS97ROValF7NzFl-kXYein0uVhjrudwCWDTJpwhru5gURg-eiSR0pIoTL8Zz1N8wqshTzftzHYIvnC3aay78Nb2punyWY)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4539ad8613ef44d69eac25db35b2b23c&_e=mmfy52r_NzQrHw1r0R4lY2tCGz3EbtSNTRNAtIPtMFhXTglC-IeZiKc1g4prMGRdLJBLKf7DVNPZs3eW_-wi3FuLDLgT-JPgbsnnQCLBn3LCwkiBON5YMghBE2GuFMdWK8apNw5FRF0tAoB1CemrJfElrLFFiwUS6ZRhIFqV_2OsnZa1OgWbPZ8bQcHRP5nrgCG6j23uFk2Y2gBNsz3SYM6_t2-BkNYfbMlN3TA4y0hAxvPbKGXnkorTrxNOCSJoabbPDB9VxfkM4PhAhDnzI8ZB4DMKLVuJon_dzNH7aAboJoe-jDKGzwoQ1uM-y7MAUoI47_dt2c_N42muQwm5ZreRkyJCeJr6jds3Ms3J4VGTcOJ1Erpczs_hoVp3LTA_trwlD_0gS93Yv0Wz-LsNrYPTWjL2RcRX6U8FVZHHw0ob9HsjsX3CbdUDdsLFLWYG)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4539ad8613ef44d69eac25db35b2b23c&_e=mmfy52r_NzQrHw1r0R4lY2tCGz3EbtSNTRNAtIPtMFhXTglC-IeZiKc1g4prMGRdLJBLKf7DVNPZs3eW_-wi3FuLDLgT-JPgbsnnQCLBn3LCwkiBON5YMghBE2GuFMdWK8apNw5FRF0tAoB1CemrJfElrLFFiwUS6ZRhIFqV_2OsnZa1OgWbPZ8bQcHRP5nrgCG6j23uFk2Y2gBNsz3SYM6_t2-BkNYfbMlN3TA4y0hAxvPbKGXnkorTrxNOCSJoabbPDB9VxfkM4PhAhDnzI7hyQ_P1Dda21Otnb2UEPI9M-AlZMgnqL1EkYM7Bu7rq0QQ15cHjdmvn2rxAS1mJJ8KoYinZvfKxApeH1RwI1PeThLrHHzcRUR4U9WqsgW6cllT_BV0ahUp3aCUD6ZGFS4lB5FS37sxw3inPGgAWag54NahyOiE7qc_TUaAmGc3U)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4539ad8613ef44d69eac25db35b2b23c&_e=mmfy52r_NzQrHw1r0R4lY2tCGz3EbtSNTRNAtIPtMFhXTglC-IeZiKc1g4prMGRdLJBLKf7DVNPZs3eW_-wi3FuLDLgT-JPgbsnnQCLBn3LCwkiBON5YMghBE2GuFMdWK8apNw5FRF0tAoB1CemrJfElrLFFiwUS6ZRhIFqV_2OsnZa1OgWbPZ8bQcHRP5nrgCG6j23uFk2Y2gBNsz3SYM6_t2-BkNYfbMlN3TA4y0hAxvPbKGXnkorTrxNOCSJoabbPDB9VxfkM4PhAhDnzIzI0ecNPJLPLNyNR5rukgIp3Svyq_j5OyPjjaym4l_6xZUFvpCsl3ESg7fhkxZOKNDsCwkPTJu1QMFPr1_ddox-Wbcr1g5QmxhUCHyH-VwgcfUqXZb4Usd4uXhu-JJBC_hJRqLKWCnvaEwLfnrTJVkL2cVneoZZpo-R8J9PWfC5f)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: American Defense News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcm2ad4lmlail956aa9p6e6cohv36hk3ap2bilk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm4pr5cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqt8sjjo1cb7i1pupadmlbr979g26cue75dk2edo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm4pr5cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpn1urqp23sj46rd6di9h1s2c2s608cfq7tt2ob0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm4pr5cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z43vf01lml6m6q21fcu1hcllfkq8fr4ovgva1uvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm4pr5cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z3ejddhouke6fqrashmeri43ocfqc0fj4vqj0jrg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrpvl6knqvahhnek7lanq17kd3q47hpgvel190q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm4pr5cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

**WATCH: Ron DeSantis Bans and Calls Cops on Trump Supporters at His Florida Book Signing**
As you may have heard, earlier this week, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis launched his new book, _" The Courage to be Free: Florida's Blueprint For America's Revival." _DeSantis's book deal is through Harper Collins, a publishing company owned by Rupert Murdoch's media conglomerate, NewsCorp, and the deal is reported to be over $2 million.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZBU9SZXa9KhJvJMtlDkpstSjs6kQO9A0J1u-KWLX8kg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=106047925)
As part of his book launch, DeSantis is currently on a media and book tour throughout the country and the state of Florida. While the Florida legislative session begins in Tallahassee next week on March 7, 2023, it appears that DeSantis couldn't care less, as he is more focused on selling his book, giving out of state speeches, and attending exclusive retreats at posh resorts with GOP Establishment insiders, billionaire donors, and social media influencers, who were [recently accused of being paid to promote Ron DeSantis and trash President Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/90f46f45-3d2a-4ec7-98b2-09c9b31c7b9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
One can't help but wonder why DeSantis is aggressively fundraising at secretive retreats and trying to garner national media attention just weeks after being inaugurated for his second term as Governor. Florida Governors are only allowed to serve two full terms, and although DeSantis won a second term and doesn't need to fundraise for a re-election campaign, he continues to fundraise outside of Florida.
Well, the cat is out of the bag. The worst kept secret in Florida for the last two years has been the fact that DeSantis and the GOP establishment are, and have been actively planning and laying the groundwork for DeSantis to launch a 2024 primary challenge for the GOP nomination against President Donald Trump.
For two years, I have known that DeSantis is planning on launching a 2024 campaign against Donald Trump, because some of my former campaign donors from Palm Beach approached me in 2021 and told me they were asked to help bundle money for DeSantis's 2024 Presidential campaign.
While DeSantis himself continues to dodge questions when asked about whether or not he'a running for President in 2024, the manufactured hype surrounding DeSantis 2024 couldn't be more obvious and overbearing than it is at the present moment.
You see, DeSantis's book deal and his book tour is not simply an "innocent book tour". It is a political strategy to garner national exposure, media attention, and millions of dollars of revenue before launching his Presidential campaign in either May or June of 2023. DeSantis is expected to file to run for President at the end of May 2023, which is when the Florida legislative session ends. For those wondering why he is waiting to file, it's because he has [instructed Republican members of the Republican controlled Florida Legislature to change Florida's "Resign to Run" Law ](https://substack.com/redirect/306976f8-b949-4f77-b7bb-48aab5acd83d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for the sake of only benefiting himself so that he can keep his seat as Governor and also run for President at the same time. Currently, Florida Statutes Chapter 99.012 (4)(a) reads, **" any officer who qualifies for federal public office must resign from the office he or she presently holds if the terms, or any part thereof, run concurrently with each other." **
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c5d56e9-1eb8-4668-8fc4-98605dc6ce7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In other words, if DeSantis files to run for President against Donald Trump before the legislative session is over, [he would have to resign his seat as Governor.](https://substack.com/redirect/4661f5df-ef83-4d7e-bca1-cbb57e982bf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) That is why he is actively abusing his power as Governor by pressuring the legislature to change a Florida election law for the sake of benefitting only himself, hurting President Trump, and abandoning Floridians by being an absentee Governor whose time will almost certainly be entirely consumed while running for President full time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cb40350e-756b-4b3c-aaec-f4adc547338a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By his own admission, [DeSantis recently told Brian Kilmeade](https://substack.com/redirect/0914d046-2b34-4acd-9a66-6e983e9c57f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Fox News that he viewed his first book, _Dreams From Our Founding Fathers,_ published in 2011, as a way to help himself get elected to the US Congress.
Speaking to Kilmeade about his 2011 book, DeSantis said,
> "What it did is it took me in different parts around Florida where I would speak to like 100 people. I'd sell 20 or 30 books .... And what happened was a lot of these people that were buying the book were saying, 'Hey, you should run for office.' And I'm like, well, run for what?"
DeSantis then added that he saw an opportunity to run for Congress while he sold his first book.
> "What happened was they did the reapportionment in 2012. It created a new congressional district where we lived, my wife and I at the time, in Ponte Vedra Beach. And so I started: no name ID, no money, a six-month campaign, and we ended up winning a seven-way Primary by 15 points and ... just gutted it out."
It's clear that DeSantis is using his second book as a lunching pad for a Presidential run in 2024.
And given that he cannot run for Governor again, and only won re-election less than four months ago, it is clear DeSantis has no intentions of serving out his full, second four year term as Governor of Florida.
Given that I have known this for two years, I decided to organize a pro-Trump 2024 rally in front of the Books A Million store in Leesburg, FL where DeSantis had a book signing on Tuesday, the first day of his book launch and book tour.
Many of the people who showed up to rally with me wore their "Make America Great Again" caps, shirts as well as their "Trump 2024" flags to show support for President Trump's 2024 campaign. Our rally was not a protest, but rather a positive show of support for Trump.
But, within minutes of our peaceful rally taking place, a security guard approached us and **told us we needed to leave.**
**The security guard said, "The (Team DeSantis) told me that anyone wearing Trump has to go right now, during the signing." The guard continued, saying, "DeSantis's people are in there saying, to have me come out and tell you guys not to be here while he's here."**
**Loomer asked, "So DeSantis's people told you we have to leave?"**
**The guard responded "Yes."**
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerWATCH: Security guard at the @booksamillion store in Leesburg, FL told us, "The DeSantis ppl are in there saying, and had me come out to tell you guys, not to be here while he's here signing his book." Me: "I thought @GovRonDeSantis was in favor of free speech?" Guess not! ](https://substack.com/redirect/efd1c7bf-e8bb-4761-ad69-612d2c71a466?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[5:20 AM ∙ Mar 1, 2023
* * *
594Likes249Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/efd1c7bf-e8bb-4761-ad69-612d2c71a466?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Given that we have a First Amendment right to peacefully assemble, the pro-Trump group and I refused to leave. When we refused to leave, the security guard said we were "acting like Leftists" (ironic since we were there rallying in support of Trump), and he said he would be calling the Leesburg Police Department (LPD). Shortly after, a police captain from LPD arrived on scene with several other police officers, and they ordered us off the premises under the threat of being cited and arrested for trespassing if we didn't leave.
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerMUST WATCH: I'm at the Leesburg, FL mall outside of Books A Million for my pro-Trump rally with @Villagers4Trump, & @GovRonDeSantis & his staff ordered the police to make "anyone wearing a Trump shirt" or anyone with any "Trump gear" to leave! Ron DeSantis is anti-free speech! ](https://substack.com/redirect/3bcebcfe-700b-4cb9-a2d0-d02932b9c4d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[10:31 PM ∙ Feb 28, 2023
* * *
9,240Likes5,295Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/3bcebcfe-700b-4cb9-a2d0-d02932b9c4d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Following the altercation, I posted the video of the incident on my Twitter account.
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomer.@GovRonDeSantis and his staff called the police On me and other Trump supporters who showed up to support President Trump in front of @booksamillion where Ron DeSantis was having his book signing today. The police officer said on video he was told to remove all pro Trump ppl. ](https://substack.com/redirect/055d15d8-5e31-4d74-8f4f-48e4bfeee6bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[12:16 AM ∙ Mar 1, 2023
* * *
981Likes545Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/055d15d8-5e31-4d74-8f4f-48e4bfeee6bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The video has since gone viral, and has over 3 MILLION VIEWS. Along with going viral, the incident and the video has also been reported by dozens of media outlets, including _[Daily Mail](https://substack.com/redirect/b77fd299-5b71-46e8-a68e-08016ed303bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , The New York Times, [Newsweek,](https://substack.com/redirect/88b7f706-8498-4db6-b082-c9f7d8b9d543?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [The Guardian](https://substack.com/redirect/9418c5dc-0ad4-4ef5-ae95-804632703303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [The Independent](https://substack.com/redirect/a0cd73da-56b8-4144-9d1f-07113fa4af33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [The Gateway Pundit](https://substack.com/redirect/c545e3be-afe6-4fc0-8a63-56316d9abec3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), T[he Villages News](https://substack.com/redirect/acca97c4-93f0-4781-9d3b-6bb6db9b2970?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_, _[Mediaite](https://substack.com/redirect/b83915c0-5fb0-4c97-9d44-2955a97a74d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , and many more.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fbb03f25-d3a1-4184-a1bc-5bfa886104c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c7e2c70e-0546-41a4-9bfe-7418c5ec7215?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some people will tell you that Ron DeSantis is not running for President simply because he "has not yet filed with the FEC". However, it became even more obvious on Tuesday that he is in fact running for President when his staff gave the mall security and the local police specific orders to kick supporters of his competitor, President Donald Trump, off the mall property and out of the DeSantis book signing.
[Judge Napolitano @JudgenapWhere's the right to free speech & political protest? @LauraLoomer @RonDeSantisFL #freespeech #Trump #DeSantis ](https://substack.com/redirect/67a62ea1-a632-4357-89f4-331be2033a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[6:38 PM ∙ Mar 1, 2023
* * *
152Likes73Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/67a62ea1-a632-4357-89f4-331be2033a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Several political commentators, news hosts, and even ajudge have weighed in on the controversy. Former Fox News Contributor and Judge, [Andrew Napolitano, who is a well known critic of President Trump's, slammed Governor Ron DeSantis and his staff for violating free speech rights.](https://substack.com/redirect/7ed48435-1b03-4782-ba39-75ee5ee0c8d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) In a video about DeSantis that was posted to Napolitano's Twitter and Tik Tok accounts, Napolitano said,
> "That's absolutely prohibited by the Constitution of the United States. Moreover, Florida has a public accommodation law." You cannot discriminate against people on the basis of their politics. That's Florida law. So, the Governor, or his people, he's going to claim he didn't know about it, directly or indirectly violated the Constitution he swore to uphold, the First Amendment he swore to uphold, and Florida law he swore to enforce," concluded Napolitano.
If one thing is clear, it's that Governor Ron DeSantis has just established himself as the anti-free speech candidate. President Trump created Ron DeSantis's political career when he saved his failing 2018 Gubernatorial campaign against Andrew Gillum and endorsed DeSantis over Adam Putnam against many people's better judgement. That being said, nearly all of DeSantis supporters are Trump supporters and Trump voters, but there are many Trump supporters who are not DeSantis supporters. By banning Trump supporters from his book signing, and calling the cops on peaceful Trump supporters, DeSantis only alienated millions of Trump supporters whose votes he otherwise would have needed in a primary election against President Trump.
Given DeSantis's total disrespect for the First Amendment, MAGA, and his extremely thin skin, it's evident he will have a hard time surviving a debate, let alone an entire primary campaign season against President Donald Trump. If DeSantis can't even handle me and a group of seniors from The Villages, FL peacefully rallying in support of President Trump outside of a bookstore, how will he handle Putin and Xi? Will he call the police on them too someday if he manages to make it to the White House? Or, will he adopt tyrannical styles of leadership and send the police after all of his detractors?
These are important things for American voters to think about as we enter the pre-2024 Presidential primary season.
It's WAR. And, the battle has just begun!

name: Jessica, Heritage Action
subject: Our 2022 Annual Impact Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
No other organization is as prepared or as experienced as we are to take on the radical Left and their socialist agenda...
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs2pjs580q4gmm6np5famp1hp3a4o4mboqj1j6jg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shlclj76o366hhbcppkmdh3cpdiesoe4t1hehp39dj5c5pj0p1h6eq70orlc2rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32sllmhjr4sr66pjjbd9nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmepr0sdj61ob7c8iv0)
| | | |

|
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuc7bm9c568u7hs92ih24o7igrk4c5kfko4unuj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hmco71cth2bs)
---
Fellow conservative, we just released our 2022 Annual Impact Report, and I'm very excited to share it with you. This is my favorite part of the job because I get to reach out to our network of over 2 million grassroots activists and donors and show them the incredible amount of work we were able to accomplish together. **Last year in Washington, Heritage Action released 13 key votes, emphasizing legislative issues such as:** 🔔 Preserving the filibuster 🔔 Protecting life 🔔 Encouraging "no" votes on omnibus and spending packages 🔔 Supporting women's and girls' sports 🔔 Defending the 2nd Amendment 🔔 Fighting inflated and economically dangerous COVID "relief" legislation 🔔 Supporting American businesses and fighting the CHIPS Act 🔔 Protecting the institution of marriage and religious liberties 🔔 Reinforcing the American economy and fighting Biden's mislabeled, destructive policies
---
[**BECOME A HERITAGE ACTION MEMBER**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcte5d0rj505n3rqs8idl4vla9lvu31teknhatgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hmco71cth2bs)
---
| | **At the state level, our 2022 legislative wins include: ** 🔔 Stronger election integrity laws in eleven states 🔔 Education reforms, including ESA expansions and school choice in five states 🔔 Protecting states from the burdensome and woke "ESG metrics" in two states 🔔 Protecting life by passing pro-life legislation after the _Dobbs_ decision in three states 🔔 Advocating for fairness in women's sports in four states
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zclefus5jc6opdoln26o4tkq3ep6ubuc65rmolt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hmco71cth2bs)
---
On the grassroots side, we also saw tremendous success and growth from our Sentinel program to our public comment campaigns, and it's all thanks to activists like you, fellow conservative.
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztc3dcon40sig6a6k14rh6686reffcm69gl5smr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hmco71cth2bs)
---
Fellow conservative, there are a lot of organizations to which you could dedicate your hard-earned money and time, so we appreciate you supporting the critical efforts here at Heritage Action. **That 's why we strive each and every day to honor the trust that thousands of patriots across the country have granted to us. **
---
[**BECOME A HERITAGE ACTION MEMBER**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6pmfj19gg4tvb30iu1pb28c6n5fj3d24gfrhgoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hmco71cth2bs)
---
Eternally grateful, Jessica Anderson, Executive Director | Heritage Action **P.S.** If you'd like to read the full 2022 Annual Impact Report, we've attached a downloadable PDF file [_**here**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znokhf4eh7u26j4n9525o4lpkvuh9m27l7phbk1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hmco71cth2bs).
---
|
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Help us stop gender experiments on children
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care."** Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. **
---
| | |
---
**I 'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation to the case's legal fund.**
---
[**DONATE AND HELP SUPPORT CHLOE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
|
---
| | Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. **But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.**
---
| | |
---
**I 'm counting on you to join me in Chloe's fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible donation to our legal fund.**
---
[**DONATE AND HELP SUPPORT CHLOE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.
---
| | [**DONATE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| [**DONATE $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| | [**DONATE $250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| [**DONATE $500**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| | [**DONATE $1000**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| [**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388085:JAnXsJGNC:m:1:3331421248:E3DB6CDEFAD4203E96BE217010A17302:r)
---
| | |
---
Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country.
---
Thank you and God Bless,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO
---
Center for American Liberty

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf7niddtugd7bnmmlnlsrjso6gf0p06klpq5j2q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm2p70sjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlm74fu1pguh08t9q7n7jd42a5i2o8kjcbh53opg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm2p70sjh2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1elfkdftqcub7am6sf1ee39kp96nf09mei389mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm2p70sjh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znepcaff8cgqog0c68nm2e7rmnlg8la4e21tp8do_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm2p70sjh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmk77mg45oooq35v055kirtabdbu3hd9m3pol78_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm2p70sjh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Honoring the Life of the Late Jackie Walorski
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Honoring the Life of the Late Jackie Walorski_
---
Seven months ago to this day, tragedy struck the Hoosier state. On August 3, 2022, Congresswoman Jackie Walorski, along with two members of her staff, Zachery Potts and Emma Thomson, were killed in a car accident while traveling throughout her beloved Second Congressional District. In her years representing the Hoosiers of northern Indiana as both a state representative and member of Congress, and through her ministry service around the word, Jackie built a legacy of selfless service — a legacy that will be remembered for decades to come. To further this legacy, Jackie's family, including her husband Dean and her mother Martha, have established the Jackie Walorski Memorial Scholarship and the Jackie Walorski Memorial Ministry Scholarship for high school students in the Second Congressional District that plan to pursue a four-year degree as a full-time student. The Memorial Scholarship will be given to students in programs related to public affairs, politics, or journalism, while the Memorial Ministry Scholarship will be for those in ministry- or mission-related fields. The first scholarships will be offered in the 2024-25 school year. I ask that you consider helping to honor her legacy by [making a contribution](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f8726efd8c0e4f4f/53ef3f9377167497c3d6b838967d376c/40313) of whatever you can to the scholarship funds. For more information, visit the Elkhart Community Foundation's website [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f8726efd8c0e4f4f/4cf089b494f46ae8c3d6b838967d376c/40313). Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Pushing Back on the EPA, Ensuring Safety_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** welcomes Ambassador Sameh Aboulenein of the Egyptian Consul General in Chicago to the statehouse this week._
---
On Tuesday,**Governor Eric Holcomb** released a [statement](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f8726efd8c0e4f4f/2084f63671cc58fbc3d6b838967d376c/40313) pushing back on the EPA's decision to transport hazardous material into the state from the East Palestine, Ohio, train derailment while citing a lack of communication from the federal agency after learning about the decision third-hand. Later that day, **Gov. Holcomb** spoke with the administrator of the EPA. _"The materials should go to the nearest facilities, not moved from the far eastern side of Ohio to the far western side of Indiana."_
— **Gov. Holcomb on Tuesday, Feb. 28** Then on Thursday, **Gov. Holcomb** issued a statement announcing that the administration would immediately be contracting with a third-party lab to conduct rigorous testing of the materials, which are scheduled to begin today. **Gov. Holcomb** noted that the testing would be the next step in providing assurance to the communities in Putnam County. _"As I indicated in an[ earlier statement](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f8726efd8c0e4f4f/b618c5e2e2159815c3d6b838967d376c/40313), it was extremely disappointing to learn through a press conference held on Monday, Feb. 27, 2023, confirming that the EPA had chosen Indiana as a location to deposit and remediate the waste from East Palestine, Ohio. This was made after our administration directly conveyed that the materials should go to the nearest facilities, not moved from the far eastern side of Ohio to the far western side of Indiana. As you can expect, I expressed as much to the EPA administrator when we spoke on the phone Tuesday, Feb. 28._ _All of us can agree that we should do everything within our control to provide assurance to our communities. This testing is the next necessary step. Since making this decision, we have informed the EPA and the site operator urging them to coordinate closely with this 3rd party laboratory to carry out this important testing. Sampling is scheduled to begin tomorrow, Friday, March 3."_

# _Fox Business: House passes bill to 'REIN IN' executive orders that worsen inflation_

---
In voting against the REIN IN Act, Democrat Frank Mrvan once again put Joe Biden first and Hoosiers last. He wants higher prices and more inflation. From [Fox Business](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f8726efd8c0e4f4f/d855a21cbd9692f4c3d6b838967d376c/40313): The House on Wednesday passed a bill that, if enacted, would require federal agencies to analyze the inflationary impact of executive orders issued by the president. It comes in response to President Biden’s executive actions that critics say have worsened inflation — in particular, his cancellation of the Keystone XL pipeline shortly after taking office, his proposed $400 billion student loan handout that’s the subject of pending cases before the Supreme Court and his extensions of the pause on student loan repayments to the tune of about $5 billion per month. ... Known as the Reduce Exacerbated Inflation Negatively Impacting the Nation Act, or REIN IN Inflation Act, the bill would require the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) and the Council of Economic Advisers to provide an inflation estimate for each executive order that is projected to cause an annual budgetary effect of at least $1 billion. The estimate would be required to determine whether the executive order will have no significant impact on inflation, a quantifiable inflationary impact on the consumer price index (CPI), or a significant impact on inflation that can’t be quantified at the time of the estimate._
Story continues._

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | Honoring the Life of the Late Jackie Walorski Seven months ago to this day, tragedy struck the Hoosier state. On August 3, 2022, Congresswoman Jackie Walorski, along with two members of her staff, Zachery Potts and Emma Thomson, were killed in a car accident while traveling throughout her beloved Second Congressional District. In her years representing the Hoosiers of northern Indiana as both a state representative and member of Congress, and through her ministry service around the word, Jackie built a legacy of selfless service — a legacy that will be remembered for decades to come. To further this legacy, Jackie's family, including her husband Dean and her mother Martha, have established the Jackie Walorski Memorial Scholarship and the Jackie Walorski Memorial Ministry Scholarship for high school students in the Second Congressional District that plan to pursue a four-year degree as a full-time student. The Memorial Scholarship will be given to students in programs related to public affairs, politics, or journalism, while the Memorial Ministry Scholarship will be for those in ministry- or mission-related fields. The first scholarships will be offered in the 2024-25 school year. I ask that you consider helping to honor her legacy by of whatever you can to the scholarship funds. For more information, visit the Elkhart Community Foundation's website . Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. This was made after our administration directly conveyed that the materials should go to the nearest facilities, not moved from the far eastern side of Ohio to the far western side of Indiana. name: Great America Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78167%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pf1ps5mhWcaooAh7yOtK9A&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78168%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ncExHMP470nkr%2fGwbHcM8A&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78169%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qm%2fndQRpX1QW1xenhDbOnw&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78160%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2YEgkM9rbQH%2beZACFmd2rw&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78161%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EH10OndFO0SkiTrYmeAnjw&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. In an interview published in Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: “My job is to apply the Constitution.” But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.” What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.” Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA | 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: ELECTION INTEGRITY EMERGENCY (From House Republicans)
subject: It’s official: illegal immigrants can now VOTE in U.S. elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation’s capital to vote in U.S. elections.

|
---
| | | **It 's official: non-citizens and foreign agents can now VOTE in U.S. elections.**

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation's capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

This is not hyperbole. This is not fake news. This is an election integrity emergency!

_**[This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi8fqnfuoorngvuloengf1hnnpi15v7ssdu6tkm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm6p71c3h2bs "This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.")**_ So we launched an official poll to collect honest and unfiltered feedback from the American People. Whether you live in DC or not, this development impacts ALL AMERICANS - so we need to hear from you right here and right now:
**PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY: Should illegal immigrants and foreign agents be allowed to vote in U.S. elections?**** **

---
| | | [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE HERE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqtb6ejln9igv1fb9f06ish39002e5de5881ea8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm6p71c3h2bs "button")
---

We can't believe this is happening in America.

These Radical Democrats are exploiting every ounce of power to plunge our country into chaos and greenlight their anti-American agenda. _Just imagine the ambassador of Communist China casting a ballot to choose _our_ elected representatives! _

If this was happening in your city, what would you do?

This is your chance to help shape the future of election integrity in America. _**[Submit your response to our official poll- your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and his team.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpa8ganjr87l2dpm1tr66lp2coksr29i720sojcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3hm6p71c3h2bs "Submit your response to our official poll – your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and his team.")**_

Thanks for all you've done for your country.

Onward,

House Republicans

---
|
---

---

name: Wes Moore
subject: It’s time to raise Maryland’s minimum wage.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59600809/394625449/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjRjMWJlOC1lZWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NFgzI_A0CMhj630jVQSiB3l-QFye5n7a57x6cZUECfI=&emci=25f93691-53b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f4c1be8-eeb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
It’s time to raise the minimum wage in Maryland, friends. That’s why earlier this week, I testified before the General Assembly in support of our **Fair Wage Act, which would raise the state minimum wage to $15 an hour by October 1, 2023 — two years sooner than planned.** Since the beginning of our movement, I made it clear that as your governor, I would do everything in my power to create _work, wages, and wealth_ for every Marylander. Raising the minimum wage is a key first step that will put more money into workers’ paychecks, helping our state grow and work towards eliminating childhood poverty. Without this increase in wages, Maryland families will only fall further behind, as the costs of living continue to rise. **[If you’re with me and want to see the Maryland minimum wage increased to $15 this October, add your name to support the Fair Wage Act now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59600810/394625450/-1176625727?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230303fairwageact_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjRjMWJlOC1lZWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NFgzI_A0CMhj630jVQSiB3l-QFye5n7a57x6cZUECfI=&emci=25f93691-53b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f4c1be8-eeb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59600811/394625451/-1176625727?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230303fairwageact_wm_180da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjRjMWJlOC1lZWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NFgzI_A0CMhj630jVQSiB3l-QFye5n7a57x6cZUECfI=&emci=25f93691-53b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f4c1be8-eeb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.
I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:
Can you please split a $25 contribution between Serve America and my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either.
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
