| | | _**["Help is on the way from a new Political Action Committee called the 1776 Project" ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**[ \- Laura Ingraham](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**["If you're thinking of writing a check... Consider writing it to Ryan Girdusky [Founder of the 1776 Project PAC]" ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**[ \- Tucker Carlson](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**["Shout out to Ryan Girdusky who is doing an excellent job with the 1776 Project PAC." ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**[ \- Ben Shapiro](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**["That's why the 1776 Project PAC is different from any other group out there..." ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**[ \- Donald Trump Jr.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**["All three candidates won their race... And they were endorsed by the 1776 Project PAC." ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ _**[ \- Glenn Beck](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)**_ All the biggest conservative leaders know that my team at the 1776 Project PAC is moving mountains... But we need your help to take our mission to the next level. [_**Would you consider chipping in today to help us take back our schools from the radical left?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r) Let me take a step back. **_What IS the 1776 Project PAC?_** Well, in May of 2021, I saw what was being done to our children in schools. Test scores were plummeting. Proficiency rates hit all-time lows in the public education system within the last two years. All the while, tens of thousands of parents nationwide were reporting that radical left-wing curriculum like Critical Race Theory was being forced on their children in schools. **_That 's why I, Ryan Girdusky, decided to do something about it by founding the 1776 Project PAC._** I designed the PAC from the ground up to help brave conservatives take back their local school boards, county by county, NATIONWIDE! And so far, we've had INCREDIBLE SUCCESS:
---
* **We 've SUPPORTED more than 160 brave conservative ****candidates.**

* **Won more than 100 school board races (that 's more than 60% of all the races we've ever been involved in)**

* **And this year, we 're supporting 250 more conservative candidates across the country!**

Now, here's the bad news. It's been revealed that the radical indoctrination we're targeting is more widespread than we could've possibly imagined. Critical Race Theory is now being taught in every state across the country (even in states where is banned at a state level) Radical Gender Ideology is being used to groom children to become gay or transgender all the way down to Pre-K. And parents all over the country are blowing the whistle on school providing PORNOGRAPHIC BOOKS that instruct minor children on how to use sex-apps, engage in vile deviant sexual acts, and even use sex toys. Our work at the 1776 Project PAC has done wonders for the students who are now being led by our candidates. But we still have THOUSANDS of radicals to fire from our nation's school boards. [_**Peter, that 's why we so desperately need YOUR SUPPORT!**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r) You see, we're not bankrolled by billionaires or giant corporations. The vast majority of the dollars we're able to send to our candidates come from everyday patriots like you. And we desperately need your help to keep this fight going. **This year, we 're planning to support more conservative school board candidates than ever before. But we can't do that without YOUR SUPPORT.** [_**So, would you please consider chipping in today to help us take back our schools, one school board at a time?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)
---
[**CHIP IN TO TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)
---
Frankly, there is no more important battle to fight than the battle for the hearts and minds of our children. One day, the kids being indoctrinated in school right now will be senators, CEOs and thought leaders. And they'll be the most radical left-wing generation in American History if we don't step up to put an end to this insanity right now. That's why I hope [_**you 'll join our team today.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder 1776 Project PAC P.S. If you were to donate right now, you'd be our 4,835th individual donor. You'd be getting in on the ground floor of one of the most influential movements for America's future. [_**Will you consider joining our team today with a donation?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388360:62368JGNw:m:1:3365131770:FE7EDDF2BAD1F3D9E6569A91CF0520A4:r)

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell the Ethics Committee to Act Quickly to Remove George Santos from Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name: Tell the Ethics Committee to Act Quickly to Remove George Santos >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1464a3f-d172-42ba-882c-6960499e3260/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56cc1129-1b43-458e-9f07-8ee015329a90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The House Ethics Committee has announced a [wide ranging investigation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0f12b30-7caa-4bec-882b-8443716c26e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) into George Santos that is expected to take several months or more. And a long, methodical investigation might be appropriate under normal circumstances.

**But there are already _enough known facts beyond dispute_ to warrant his immediate removal. [And the Ethics Committee should recommend Congress do that as soon as possible.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34864bab-f3e2-43e4-a8e7-fe136f33510f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

His known lies _that he has already acknowledged_ should be more than enough to get him removed. If there's reason to continue the investigation after his removal, so be it. But now is time for action — not endless analysis.

[**Add your name: Tell the Ethics Committee to Act Quickly to Remove George Santos from Congress**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd9106e3-b44a-48c8-8a04-02c391227100/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61fa5e0a-0923-4385-b12e-353d011dea13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d9e1d63-6941-46e6-92d6-9c1f506b14fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e0b0135-5b0f-4ad1-8ae4-15d33a9f1322/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_That's right:_ _the mastermind behind our current crime wave is none other than far Left George Soros. _ **He's been funneling millions of dollars into local prosecutor races across the country to replace solid prosecutors with liberal activists. ** These activists abandon justice in the name of "social justice," declining to prosecute crimes and setting violent criminals free. And guess what happens when prosecutors basically make crime legal? _You get more crime._ **_[Right now, 1 in 5 Americans are represented by a Soros-financed prosecutor. And unless we act now, that number will only grow.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388435:Jygy8JGZN:m:1:3331421248:ED1C772E0341E20FDEC481F6246CE43C:r)_** Conservatives MUST fight back. We're organizing our allies and heading into the trenches to take on George Soros's millions of dollars in every local prosecutor race - but we can't do it without the support of grassroots conservatives like you. **Will you join Donald Trump Jr. and thousands of your fellow conservatives to REMOVE Soros' puppet prosecutors today?**

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Are they moving on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

The biggest question in politics right now is this: How solid is Donald Trump’s support among Republican voters? I’ve told you about recent focus groups I conducted with Republican voters and about a poll we commissioned that found nearly 30 percent of Republicans are what I would call “Always Trump” voters. This is the strongest core of Trump’s support. I’ve heard these voters in focus groups, and they tell me that they still believe Trump is an outsider and the only one who can shake up Washington. And this is exactly what has Republican leaders scared of challenging him. I recently told POLITICO that Republican leaders have held off on attacking Trump because “what they’re so afraid of is him being out of the tent shooting in.” In other words, they’re afraid of Trump’s diehard fans and worried that Trump could cost Republicans by running as an independent. [Check out the full piece including my analysis here.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWN6SR9hSM5jW8p1Zzv7DyS8HW54fY-N4XJs6dN3X6VJ33q90JV1-WJV7CgKLpW7yqh-V1J_vpYW691zFD74flXpW2ymyJC7DWN18W361X6l3wNZhrW4tjqFc657WjgV_7H8B1x6CsDW87vSgZ4pmgDjW4CygkF8Dzy_DW1pkry-5MGS9JW65c_KB2XX79sW17Sxsz3x2WWHW34RqZY8w5K27W4m6p6C1yz7LfW3cPN5H4v_c44W7X9B6b1sT87mW4WdK6m2NyxNyW4XL_4M6dpkmyVpG4444wbb9lW5xNRBd7sfRvLN1RVXLnC0gS9N7DXNrqQL5zXW5_Fn3_3xRSjYW4xTyMY19Fn3zW5CwT9q45Xr1kW7Z91Nf6kQS7tN4lvZM_nb0c6W6JWjxW5f5PRfW7pcqd-8CYg4m35jR1) The Always Trump voters are going to be a critical factor in whether or not someone like Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, or Mike Pence even has a chance of beating Trump. But they’re going to have to go on offense. I’m not holding my breath. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

name: Hung Cao
subject: I’m ready to unleash America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=55b507cd4f2c4e88af45e2448e70a210&_e=39Gox3qlpFn4D7xclQZ0TeDNJ2kBgZPvSgXx1zj2eGODGGZT8W_Z5J19k_EhAiWBjflrxI_f2sMhsnK9Gx9Z4cjAhNLA6NXqMTCNpBSJxsMkLlcz78FOhnAjUJ-KoXd1F7e_Ix2qWWQT9CS4QpMwNBtSOwKqBWeIToB0ft1sdLYZO4DUJswWfVUEBkeRG8A2p5Zh47qgqYpYbYg_KrM_cl7F3N30YBJ8GLJOmIht-3wNFgwrA95w_4nDv3sOLmEgP6EHMazMcuixLDynoS5iI4umvdSBwZF_2hkxA4G1lVO3yznb8cUJ3rBaPqgusPcAGI2d2wn5zsnESmawRtRjATuXEBxhYIuqLcuMB-PG-Zk%3D)
---
Peter, When I came to America with my family as a small child, my parents were in search of the American Dream.

I didn’t speak a word of English and we were thousands of miles from our home country, but that didn’t matter.

_What mattered is that we had finally made it to the land of opportunity._

Throughout my childhood, my parents worked overtime to ensure that we could take advantage of every opportunity America had to offer.

_And I was putting in the work too._

Just fourteen years from arriving here not even knowing how to say “hello,” I was a midshipman at the Naval Academy learning how to fight for our country.

That was just the beginning of my 25-year Naval career.

As a U.S. Navy Captain, I served alongside Special Ops performing some of the world’s most dangerous dives, dismantling explosives with seconds to spare, and taking on some of the nastiest terrorists in the Middle East.

Peter, I didn’t serve America for fame or glory. I served because America had given me everything, and I wanted to pay the greatest country on Earth back for the wonderful life I had.

**_But right now, when I look around, I don’t see the America that my parents came to decades ago._**

Dreams and opportunity have been traded for woke and exclusionary politics. Sky-high debt is crushing jobs and small businesses. And worst of all, our own President is leaving behind our military for the Democrats’ socialist agenda.

**I’ve fought for America before, and just because I’ve hung up my uniform doesn’t mean I’m stopping now.**

I’m living proof that America has limitless potential, but if we’re going to unleash it for the next generation, we need an A-Team who isn’t afraid to stand up for our great country’s future.

**That’s why I’m working to UNLEASH AMERICA.**

[**If you’re ready to join our mission and UNLEASH AMERICA for the next generation, join me today and stand strong for the land of hope, freedom, and opportunity.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=55b507cd4f2c4e88af45e2448e70a210&_e=39Gox3qlpFn4D7xclQZ0TeDNJ2kBgZPvSgXx1zj2eGODGGZT8W_Z5J19k_EhAiWBjflrxI_f2sMhsnK9Gx9Z4cjAhNLA6NXqMTCNpBSJxsMkLlcz78FOhnAjUJ-KoXd1F7e_Ix2qWWQT9CS4QpMwNBtSOwKqBWeIToB0ft1sdLYZO4DUJswWfVUEBkeRG8A2p5Zh47qgqYpYbYg_KrM_chdQtEUbUlNHCBgjKrqG6B-9Bg9s-W7wA6-810ecHdFmBydMCU1IZWscimSp5tTcqvQfcjHzAJ4-73hdmIGGt6Bavlgywn3ECjbvf0iQhbGdfp_5n54Z5-R7kqMiHf8rnjIw2BaK9Q5ahbWERuQQe0s%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, When I came to America with my family as a small child, my parents were in search of the American Dream. I didn’t speak a word of English and we were thousands of miles from our home country, but that didn’t matter. What mattered is that we had finally made it to the land of opportunity. Throughout my childhood, my parents worked overtime to ensure that we could take advantage of every opportunity America had to offer. And I was putting in the work too. Just fourteen years from arriving here not even knowing how to say “hello,” I was a midshipman at the Naval Academy learning how to fight for our country. That was just the beginning of my 25-year Naval career. As a U.S. Navy Captain, I served alongside Special Ops performing some of the world’s most dangerous dives, dismantling explosives with seconds to spare, and taking on some of the nastiest terrorists in the Middle East. Peter, I didn’t serve America for fame or glory. I served because America had given me everything, and I wanted to pay the greatest country on Earth back for the wonderful life I had. But right now, when I look around, I don’t see the America that my parents came to decades ago. Dreams and opportunity have been traded for woke and exclusionary politics. Sky-high debt is crushing jobs and small businesses. And worst of all, our own President is leaving behind our military for the Democrats’ socialist agenda. I’ve fought for America before, and just because I’ve hung up my uniform doesn’t mean I’m stopping now. I’m living proof that America has limitless potential, but if we’re going to unleash it for the next generation, we need an A-Team who isn’t afraid to stand up for our great country’s future. That’s why I’m working to UNLEASH AMERICA. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

That's why I am coming to you with a personal ask, Fellow American. **[Will you chip in ANY AMOUNT before the day is over?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09623%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tzW8EgUZLwFgVJgtOj4wwA&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09624%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q48hQiBNYrLP45S%2f3i1Nuw&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09635%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=14BTZLMbC5j6Z2n4%2f2pt3w&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09636%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Pxmy6oMOWAZWNJeeqNfzA&sysid=1) | | [Chip in _More_ ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09637%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IwV0xrwzkffgp3R62OYLEg&sysid=1)

American exceptionalism reflects our conviction that the ideals that spawned our nation are exceptional, in the world and in human history.

Once we stop believing that it's the beginning of the end: the country will technically live on, but only as a hollowed-out husk of itself.

You probably heard every pitch in the book from typical politicians, Fellow American. But I am not a career politician. I am not beholden to the DC machine.

**[That's why I am asking for just $1 before the end of the day. I am excited to share my vision of what we can do together when we take back the Oval Office, but I need you on my team.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09638%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ES3FZiroekNwr924BBKgHg&sysid=1)**

It's time to unite around a vision to defeat wokeness and to revive American excellence.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09621%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o4ImYP2YkO6JkgvMgJdVmw&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09631%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=we%2fY8RYwPPtNoCpMSHAztg&sysid=1)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Important Update on the Weaponization of our Government (Read On)
body:
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KmP6sBHuBcrWeuL0qxCumKhmYvjYQY2Oggnm_tYAhAHfXzGjo86SJjxr2obln1xiJqjve7b_6mjMV-K27Cfvofnkv3RsxrR-ITcnbqp_o2YE-qsMb2dJq-GBfEiJeJqv0kCIahWPj7OY_zRZFEuotjZvarLJn8aJbfIjDOaovSXY3RMPdGBRjrRPIpg8qJKfaq_TxCel3Ss=&c=PfDZ_kSJoOX6zJDigJTNx_nKrQxd1RZFk7gtnjH-tyZ5X31PlRohrQ==&ch=pZr0eVsMs-S-aQ6jwIDWBRHO6ldx1wVsBdqlO1ilQEpVSj0yBpqFOQ==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Matt Gaetz here - I just stepped off the stage at [CPAC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KmP6sBHuBcrWeuL0qxCumKhmYvjYQY2Oggnm_tYAhAHfXzGjo86SJjxr2obln1xiJqjve7b_6mjMV-K27Cfvofnkv3RsxrR-ITcnbqp_o2YE-qsMb2dJq-GBfEiJeJqv0kCIahWPj7OY_zRZFEuotjZvarLJn8aJbfIjDOaovSXY3RMPdGBRjrRPIpg8qJKfaq_TxCel3Ss=&c=PfDZ_kSJoOX6zJDigJTNx_nKrQxd1RZFk7gtnjH-tyZ5X31PlRohrQ==&ch=pZr0eVsMs-S-aQ6jwIDWBRHO6ldx1wVsBdqlO1ilQEpVSj0yBpqFOQ==) and wanted to relay my message to our entire movement.
Unlike many in the Swamp, I am not a human vessel for lobbyist cash. I am a vindicated Florida Man who will NEVER be afraid to stand up to the D.C. Cartel on the American people's behalf!
That's precisely what I did during the Speaker vote along with 20 brave America-First Patriots. The concessions we earned broke the Washington status quo to make sure horrible omnibus legislation, bloated bureaucrat salaries like Dr. Fauci's, and other Swamp nightmares NEVER happen ever again in this country!
---
| | [KEEP UP THE FIGHT! STAND UP TO THE D.C. CARTEL!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KmP6sBHuBcrWeuL0qxCumKhmYvjYQY2Oggnm_tYAhAHfXzGjo86SJjxr2obln1xiJqjve7b_6mjMV-K27Cfvofnkv3RsxrR-ITcnbqp_o2YE-qsMb2dJq-GBfEiJeJqv0kCIahWPj7OY_zRZFEuotjZvarLJn8aJbfIjDOaovSXY3RMPdGBRjrRPIpg8qJKfaq_TxCel3Ss=&c=PfDZ_kSJoOX6zJDigJTNx_nKrQxd1RZFk7gtnjH-tyZ5X31PlRohrQ==&ch=pZr0eVsMs-S-aQ6jwIDWBRHO6ldx1wVsBdqlO1ilQEpVSj0yBpqFOQ==)
---
| But, Peter, the MOST important concession we received during our fight was this: The establishment of a committee to investigate the weaponization of this government against the American People.
And today, I had an important update to share... 🚨 DEMOCRATS RIGHT NOW ARE RUNNING COVER FOR THE DEEP STATE BY TRYING TO SMEAR OUR FBI WHISTLEBLOWERS! 🚨
This is yet another reminder that the low-energy, Paul Ryan days of our party are over, Peter. [We must take bold action and REMOVE these obstructionist Democrats who are blocking oversight into this weaponized government! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KmP6sBHuBcrWeuL0qxCumKhmYvjYQY2Oggnm_tYAhAHfXzGjo86SJjxr2obln1xiJqjve7b_6mjMV-K27Cfvofnkv3RsxrR-ITcnbqp_o2YE-qsMb2dJq-GBfEiJeJqv0kCIahWPj7OY_zRZFEuotjZvarLJn8aJbfIjDOaovSXY3RMPdGBRjrRPIpg8qJKfaq_TxCel3Ss=&c=PfDZ_kSJoOX6zJDigJTNx_nKrQxd1RZFk7gtnjH-tyZ5X31PlRohrQ==&ch=pZr0eVsMs-S-aQ6jwIDWBRHO6ldx1wVsBdqlO1ilQEpVSj0yBpqFOQ==)
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KmP6sBHuBcrWeuL0qxCumKhmYvjYQY2Oggnm_tYAhAHfXzGjo86SJjxr2obln1xiJqjve7b_6mjMV-K27Cfvofnkv3RsxrR-ITcnbqp_o2YE-qsMb2dJq-GBfEiJeJqv0kCIahWPj7OY_zRZFEuotjZvarLJn8aJbfIjDOaovSXY3RMPdGBRjrRPIpg8qJKfaq_TxCel3Ss=&c=PfDZ_kSJoOX6zJDigJTNx_nKrQxd1RZFk7gtnjH-tyZ5X31PlRohrQ==&ch=pZr0eVsMs-S-aQ6jwIDWBRHO6ldx1wVsBdqlO1ilQEpVSj0yBpqFOQ==)
---
| | [DEMS RUNNING COVER FOR DEEP STATE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KmP6sBHuBcrWeuL0qxCumKhmYvjYQY2Oggnm_tYAhAHfXzGjo86SJjxr2obln1xiJqjve7b_6mjMV-K27Cfvofnkv3RsxrR-ITcnbqp_o2YE-qsMb2dJq-GBfEiJeJqv0kCIahWPj7OY_zRZFEuotjZvarLJn8aJbfIjDOaovSXY3RMPdGBRjrRPIpg8qJKfaq_TxCel3Ss=&c=PfDZ_kSJoOX6zJDigJTNx_nKrQxd1RZFk7gtnjH-tyZ5X31PlRohrQ==&ch=pZr0eVsMs-S-aQ6jwIDWBRHO6ldx1wVsBdqlO1ilQEpVSj0yBpqFOQ==)

| The Deep State tried to label concerned parents "domestic terrorists."
They targeted Donald Trump throughout his presidency based on Clinton-funded lies.

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, | Matt Gaetz here - I just stepped off the stage at == and wanted to relay my message to our entire movement. Unlike many in the Swamp, I am not a human vessel for lobbyist cash. I am a vindicated Florida Man who will NEVER be afraid to stand up to the D.C. Cartel on the American people's behalf! That's precisely what I did during the Speaker vote along with 20 brave America-First Patriots. The concessions we earned broke the Washington status quo to make sure horrible omnibus legislation, bloated bureaucrat salaries like Dr. Fauci's, and other Swamp nightmares NEVER happen ever again in this country! | | == | But, Peter, the MOST important concession we received during our fight was this: The establishment of a committee to investigate the weaponization of this government against the American People. And today, I had an important update to share... 🚨 DEMOCRATS RIGHT NOW ARE RUNNING COVER FOR THE DEEP STATE BY TRYING TO SMEAR OUR FBI WHISTLEBLOWERS! 🚨 This is yet another reminder that the low-energy, Paul Ryan days of our party are over, Peter. == | == | | == | | == | The Deep State tried to label concerned parents "domestic terrorists." They targeted Donald Trump throughout his presidency based on Clinton-funded lies. A former Deep State agent even tried to blackmail my family and me! So the truth is this - we either get this compromised government back on our side... ...or we must ABOLISH the FBI, CDC, ATF, DOJ, and every last alphabet agency until the Deep State is finally brought to heel! But Democrats are fighting us tooth and nail on that front. And I need to know if you'll help me overcome their obstruction before it's too late to reign in this out-of-control D.C. Swamp... name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Will you add your name to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
It would mean a lot to know you are with Elissa in this race.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=38%2E135344%2E6Ibpc2)

Friend -
Through the course of not one, not two, but three successful campaigns for Congress in a Republican-leaning district, so many of you have already stepped up to show your support for Elissa.
Our team is made up of people who show their support in all kinds of ways: people that passionately advocate for the issues that impact their communities. Folks who spend their time volunteering, knocking on doors to get the word out about our campaign. And thousands of you who have gotten up off the sidelines and chipped in to help us raise the resources we’ve needed to run throughout the years. It means so much to our team to have this community with us.
But right now, Elissa is looking toward the work she needs to be doing to win this Senate race, and it would mean a lot to know you are still with her.
**So today, we’re asking you to sign up to volunteer, attend events, or personally endorse Elissa Slotkin.**
What does this mean? Well, we’ll be keeping track of this growing list of supporters. We'll reach out about volunteer opportunities near you, alert you to events in your area, and make sure you are the first to know about upcoming opportunities to support Elissa and this team. If you support Elissa’s brand of straightforward Midwestern leadership, please consider adding your name and staying up to date with our campaign.
[**If you support Elissa’s brand of straightforward Midwestern leadership, please consider adding your name and staying up to date with our campaign.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-mar23?source=em230303-1-7&refcode2=38.135344.6Ibpc2&akid=38%2E135344%2E6Ibpc2)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-mar23?source=em230303-1-7&refcode2=38.135344.6Ibpc2&akid=38%2E135344%2E6Ibpc2)**
Thank you in advance for signing up,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=38%2E135344%2E6Ibpc2).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Nevada was one of the closest states in the country in 2020, with Sen. Cortez Masto barely hanging on by .8% after a-several-day recount. It was one of the closest states for President Biden in 2020, and, sadly, the only state where an incumbent Democratic governor lost in 2022. Our national fortunes could depend on supporting our great, Democratic Senator, Jacky Rosen, in her 2024 reelection bid.
body:
Nevada Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6d9d0cc-1c92-410e-9be9-f74d9dcc28bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **We cannot let Republicans take Nevada in 2024, or we likely lose the presidency** _This is what we're facing after the Silver State was one of the closest in the country in 2020, with Sen. Cortez Masto barely hanging on by .8% after a-several-day recount. It was one of the closest states for President Biden in 2020, and, sadly, the only state where an incumbent Democratic governor lost in 2022._ **_We must protect our great Democratic Senator, Jacky Rosen, in 2024, as hers is one of the most vulnerable seats. Yet, if we can provide her with resources she needs, not only do we stand a great chance of holding her seat but it'll help turn out our voters for President Biden--preventing the nightmare scenario of a President Trump or DeSantis._** [**_Can you join us in giving Senator Jacky Rosen $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to create momentum for this race, ultimately keeping Nevada blue in 2024 for both the Senate and President!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8ad0bf0-2da5-4bf2-9717-82673d5cee8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cc1fc4e-c060-402b-9362-a8b259c83869/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _From Sen. Rosen:_ _There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He's done it before and nearly succeeded._ **_That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today._** _Because it's not just your $10. It's your $10 combined with $10 from your neighbor, friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue._ **_Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, we need all hands on deck:_** _Tonight is the end of the month deadline, which shapes press coverage, influences the actions of larger donors and, in general, gives or takes momentum from candidates in an important race such as this._ [**_Can you join us in giving Senator Jacky Rosen $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to create momentum for this race, ultimately keeping Nevada blue in 2024 for both the Senate and President!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5eb8cd3f-0039-4cee-8695-1f21bad0043d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication to your democracy,** **Cliff**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2decb06a-3c92-4643-a4a8-4bc7d59e7550/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jackyrosenfornevada3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2bfb5c7-4f35-4357-a121-440ab74e5421/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d5787246-e9c7-4cff-a908-6d57cd09f4fa&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d5787246-e9c7-4cff-a908-6d57cd09f4fa&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18898?t=1001&akid=3026%2E346206%2E0tB1fU ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress, but we’ve got just a
little bit left to go. If you could give just $20 right now to help us pay
it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the
Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18898?t=1002&akid=3026%2E346206%2E0tB1fU ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=3026%2E346206%2E0tB1fU

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18898?t=1004&akid=3026%2E346206%2E0tB1fU ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

If you could give just $20 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: [ ] Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win. My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Is he not embarrassed? 🤣
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend,

After one of our first committee meetings of the 118th Congress, Matt Gaetz offered an amendment to start the meeting with the Pledge of Allegiance. My democratic colleagues and I totally supported his amendment.

Who does Gaetz then proceed to invite to one of our committee meetings to recite the Pledge of Allegiance? Someone he met at a gun club – who allegedly committed murder. Why is this important? Because during procedurals and rule testimony, Rep. McClintock himself literally mentioned “it's not like we’re going to bring someone here who committed murder.” Matt Gaetz, that wasn’t an open invitation to prove us all wrong.

Look, tthe reason there are such large trust issues with extremists like Matt Gaetz, is because when they attempt to "own the libs" it backfires on them. They end up embarrassing themselves – and do things like invite an alleged murderer to a committee hearing.

All of this is because Gaetz thought he could prove a point by getting me and my Democratic colleagues to vote against something as patriotic as saying the Pledge of Allegiance.

Matt Gaetz and his MAGA mob can play games and conduct all the stunts they want. But friend, I am here to get shit done! Please help me continue fighting for our democracy and fighting against embarrassing extremists like Matt Gaetz by donating whatever you can to my campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-March2023-FR-StopMaga?refcode=E20468-20230303-Gaetz-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]

GET SHIT DONE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-March2023-FR-StopMaga?refcode=E20468-20230303-Gaetz-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]

With gratitude,

—Eric

P.S. If you haven’t seen the video yet, check out my smackdown of Gaetz here. [https://twitter.com/therecount/status/1630612140791939091?s=46&t=0imICDGrUxkIduL95tSPSQ]

name: Sarah Bessner
subject: My sweet husband, Mark, is innocent.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the National Center for Police Defense
body:
| | |
---
| | **My sweet husband, Mark, is innocent. **
---
[Please don't let him die in prison!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388457:628gkJGNO:m:1:3331421248:487D2980747D03A0A9C54495DA594567:r) Hello, my name is Sarah Bessner. I'm the proud wife of Michigan State Trooper Mark Bessner. That's Mark in uniform in that photo. I'm holding our precious baby girl, Samantha. Mark arrested hundreds of violent criminals, served dozens of high-risk search warrants, served undercover, and was decorated several times for saving innocent lives. Mark's a hero, but he was railroaded by a cop-hating county prosecutor, an unjust judge, and a kangaroo court for trying to protect people. He faces 5 to 15 years in prison for manslaughter ... if he lives that long. You see, Mark is behind bars with dangerous criminals who HATE police. And they'll get serious "street cred" if they murder him! Click here to read the whole story of how this happened! [Now Mark is filing an appeal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388457:628gkJGNO:m:1:3331421248:487D2980747D03A0A9C54495DA594567:r) But, we need help... that's why we turned to the National Center for Police Defense. They're a non-profit group started by police to defend innocent police.
With your urgent help, they can fight for Mark in his appeal process. Please give a critically important $25, $50, $100, $250 or more now to help save Mark's life. My husband is innocent...please help protect him. Please help him get home to me and our baby girl, Samantha.
---
[Help Mark!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388457:628gkJGNO:m:1:3331421248:487D2980747D03A0A9C54495DA594567:r)
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Becoming Americans again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z53oh4uvolsk483ik8ppn92sjbacp807h5s9n4rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4utkl0op59imi531mad869e0iuq5p6890dq9bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zna8fp2952nlj46ar5rkg3qa9okmnq4igenie0j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpe9njbhb08sptk7pdkvgknecl4int84phqd1djo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmbda3b1samvacotn0ls7r2jmat9pjevdsta7apo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhgblm6utsd99abm8la54pm53061i2ljba8hgg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)**

For The American Dream,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn0t0sil0gikcikgkfcr9ba3u9hburfj289u9pv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkve5ctg529levadtb8abuoabar0ueq9asd79jc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ufdr8ql06032mkd8es5k35mnv3imv1872m5890_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm5tkctkt6o7hi72h86s0gkdf2brqc29nmo9oqk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs2m8lol9s0qf1cvf74bn77i9h570qciuhidv73o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zdb50augr6k5bann73ppqkbvj780358qegp6uui8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ismu4n6jvpoo8lbcvq45nrui3bm9k07l9pas00_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctgeeoj7c9ie49fg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My speech at CPAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I am looking forward to delivering my vision for a national revival and a New American Dream

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh3ln9tajj5jufiji26q7th24tc9vlp23u50ql4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
Fellow American-

Today, I will speak to conservative activists at CPAC.

I am looking forward to delivering my vision for a national revival and a New American Dream, but it's also critical that the political establishment in DC knows we've been building our Vivek Victory Team.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6pb49gnue7fr8jmb6s8uddn351vaa00d2v30dk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
That's why I am coming to you with a personal ask, Fellow American. **[Will you chip in ANY AMOUNT before the day is over?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziubrn33enf86725mt4d2dso43dn59asnsj6hmi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1b6bi4r9tpuumiakoa98p2dfsbhrpioh2nabsi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zassanlf55576q1gji54jrgh71lfnbqiauc5du3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4as1nubk4am5mt7786pdnus7keb9j22gca78h0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs) | | [Chip in _More_ ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg5lsr8e0gio5k7b8re49tr0humbgbvu89povs2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)

American exceptionalism reflects our conviction that the ideals that spawned our nation are exceptional, in the world and in human history.

Once we stop believing that it's the beginning of the end: the country will technically live on, but only as a hollowed-out husk of itself.

You probably heard every pitch in the book from typical politicians, Fellow American. But I am not a career politician. I am not beholden to the DC machine.

**[That's why I am asking for just $1 before the end of the day. I am excited to share my vision of what we can do together when we take back the Oval Office, but I need you on my team.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhsamgr3iqbtn4cq3gb20h98aoaa7eg007rfbau0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)**

**[This campaign will be lifted by *small* dollar donations.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9mcd817ng44pqj8d8ufuhsuqbac2d27nt8j6edo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs) We'll run this campaign the same way we'll lead our country: bottom-up.**

It's time to unite around a vision to defeat wokeness and to revive American excellence.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmajp81epjo74p61tiiqidrr44uf8be8693j85vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR TEAM ➔**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zflul00n8q1ufitfcn9q81braup1jsp0hql5tp78_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhg93r8qpr4tfuvdlc49gstpa1p7211fa6j0ca58_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp7l9qtkm55aia73erjnigtv1v3ppma2b56brquo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo10bsbhfr1ijp4ec6t4snnum1756i4vtav8s0p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjbbbh6aka7806eu7lg7h1ace938mmtgfamloiq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf8jghofv28hlgcnrag61aclq9t833l8lm2lp2ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c3jm4pr2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Overwhelmed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
More than 3,400 of you signed our petition to ban lying Fox News hosts on Military bases.
#
Wow.
When we started our campaign to ban lying Fox News hosts and their broadcasts on Military bases, we had no idea how it would go.
We figured some of our strongest supporters would join us, but we’ve been overwhelmed by the response.
More than 3,400 of you signed our petition, and we’ve raised nearly $40,000 so far.
But to take this campaign all the way, we’ve got to make some more noise. A successful campaign here means we’ve got to organize our volunteers. It means we’ve got to go up with TV ads, digital ads, radio ads. It means visits to the Capitol, and mobilizing our allies in Congress to take action.
And we’re ready to do it, because this is about more than just politics.
It’s about stopping the spread of disinformation in the Military. It’s about preventing our troops from being radicalized by liars and grifters on the far-right. But most of all, it’s about protecting our National Security, our democratic values, and the Constitution that every member of the Armed Forces swore an oath to protect.
And we need your help to do it.
**[Can you chip in $3? Advertising isn’t cheap, but it’s effective. Any amount makes a difference, and we’re going to need a LOT of support to make this campaign a success. We’ll put every dollar to work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230303-1-10&t=1&akid=7764%2E3013755%2EMiHmzq)

body:
I'm demanding answers on your behalf, and I won't give up!

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388392:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "Balloon") Peter: So far, we know there's no little green men flying around us, but that's all the Biden Administration wants to tell us. Unacceptable. Like you, I'm grateful for the men and women of our Armed Forces who are keeping our skies safe, but that's not enough. Are we being invaded? Are the Chinese spying on us? Has anything or anyone been harmed? The American people deserve far more answers than we have. **[Will you help me demand answers accountability from the Biden Administration? Chip in $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and let's get to the truth.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388392:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "Will you help me demand answers accountability
from the Biden Administration? Chip in $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and let’s get to the truth.")** I know what you're thinking. Joe Biden has been so weak on national security that it's probably China or Russia testing our national security apparatus. We live in a dangerous world and having a weak leader sitting in the Oval Office is not making us any safer. **They 're probably laughing at us right now--it took almost a week for us to shoot down the first one.** We shouldn't have to look out our windows and wonder if that's a bird, a plane or a Chinese balloon flying overhead, and it shouldn't have the opportunity to traverse the continental United States like there's not a worry to be found. **[I'm demanding accountability and leadership in Washington. Donate at least $50 TODAY and let me know you're on my side.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388393:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "I’m demanding accountability and leadership in Washington.
Donate at least $50 TODAY and let me know you’re on my side.")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388392:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "Headline")It's bad enough we've got drug dealers and terrorists coming through our Southern Border. Now we've got an air invasion to monitor like nothing our nation has ever seen. **I 'm demanding answers on your behalf, and I won't give up!** If it's from China, then I demand Biden call his friend Xi Jinping and let him know this nation won't tolerate their games. We'll shoot down each and every UFO they send our way, and we'll punish them for it--the Biden family needs to push our nation's security above their financial interests. **Shooting down these UFOs is NOT enough!** **[Join the Bergman Brigade and let's force Biden to take a strong stand against China's balloon invasion! Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388392:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "Join the Bergman Brigade and let’s force Biden to take a
strong stand against China’s balloon invasion! Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY!")** Brazenly flying anything over our sovereign nation is unacceptable whether it's from little green men or another nation on this planet--even if that makes me "trigger-happy." With over 40 years of service in the Marine Corps, you can be assured that I'm fulfilling my oath to protect this nation whether Biden will or not. No excuse will be tolerated. These incidents cannot go unpunished or cause our nation to panic. Let's get the answers we deserve and put an end to the UFOs flying over our nation. **[Help me show Biden what decisive action in defense of our nation looks like. Donate TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388392:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "Help me show Biden what decisive action in
defense of our nation looks like. Donate TODAY!")** For our safety,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388392:JL0opJGNW:m:1:3365131770:40722D6458957DB3345FD28888AE40BE:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")

If you’re not the biggest guy on the block, you need to level the playing field...
[
That’s why I’m sending you this 10-million volt stun gun.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11736/6374453/f91b5e4a12f24c4630e630866ae2db33c5a52492/91b6f95ab8d6173fa9bdc21432f2904df73ce883)

It’s the best way to protect yourself against bigger, stronger attackers...
You don’t need to know MMA or jiu-jitsu...
You don’t need to be accurate...
You press a button and ZAP – your attacker is disabled, giving you the chance to get away safely.
The best part is...
Unlike knives and guns...
**Stun guns don’t cause serious damage.**
A lot of people would prefer to electrocute their opponent than have to stab or shoot them...
So,

if you’re one of those people...
We’re giving away **[500 FREE Stun Guns (10 million volt)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11736/6374453/f91b5e4a12f24c4630e630866ae2db33c5a52492/91b6f95ab8d6173fa9bdc21432f2904df73ce883)** to help American families stay safe.
I personally carry one for times I don’t want to use my gun...
And I make sure my wife and daughter keep one of these in their purse when they leave the house...
It’s a troubling world out there, and it’s better to be prepared.
But like I said, there are only 500 free stun guns to giveaway...
So you better grab one quick if you want one.
=>**[Click Here To Claim Your Free Stun Gun (10 Million Volt)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11736/6374453/f91b5e4a12f24c4630e630866ae2db33c5a52492/91b6f95ab8d6173fa9bdc21432f2904df73ce883)** Stay safe out there.

******************************************************[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7684119fa6aa409c975f8ce664ae51ae&_e=uJQtCgjYRTXtonXMeYwI5PEJSM6Vhn6bNY6MbebRPFBJTqNo6iFVHVbXIwpm_QNkNxHrZsv1PRxRF79nJ5gN7135cW7SrqZ_niApNRkGzAA7Mz5q_HJuiqhqb5tv1TUCdvbQxkKBUN58PpK3QgOvsny6AMnIdyMRIB2TnJc-sbhjGJ6FzYuRd5IWFFrcQ0pw9d5RxdHdOHOp_Btt0qD-mz3epYSjAgiIJeoYd70mt2dVEXel2Kc9UQE6BAVizJjkL9I8Bet94cD1280CiWt2v8CNdKtjXYWitEL_wwY28PzaFqht7aUenB78ZDcHLfgBcmrJatOYHXjkUewNW1-5TrFM813DSSNipSx6g1v1g-zTVGAT25MFwX6hASY5HVxHO9JI3w_ANvzzDXI2nchRBRfp7b1DWsErfcTfa-ox0FF-2cOe7cFIOWfajUtVVQ0QY8wTbP2ZpYEpZfe4Uy39nNr0wDi3a6dCVRiDGXaT4pTcsuETM-98kpYotNSF2UeX)******************************************************

Friend,

**Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.**_Just look at the southern border. _

We all know that the border is _wide open_ and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won't stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals.

We can build a wall around the Capitol to keep pretending our citizens are an ongoing threat, but we can't build a wall at our border where we know there are actual threats. _That tells you everything you need to know about the government._

_With everything happening in our country right now, we must secure our border again._

clean_body: He must be held accountable DO YOU AGREE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER IS IN DANGER? ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Friend, Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.Just look at the southern border. We all know that the border is wide open and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won't stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals. We can build a wall around the Capitol to keep pretending our citizens are an ongoing threat, but we can't build a wall at our border where we know there are actual threats. That tells you everything you need to know about the government. With everything happening in our country right now, we must secure our border again. Friend, I'm reaching out to YOU, a dedicated Republican, to complete the Official 2023 Border Security Survey. (The NRSC Data Team created a unique link for you, so please do NOT share this email with anyone.) DO YOU AGREE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER IS IN DANGER? **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** This Official Survey EXPIRES in the NEXT 10 MINUTES, so you 'll need to follow the link below NOW. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Greg Landsman
subject: The message I read every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
[photo enclosed]
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592342/394594498/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQzNDAzMC1kYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kh2FtUWP0OXbcesw3WFWReKG1qHqcnJ5iRasa71ro-M=)
---
Friends,

Back in 2013, I lost my first campaign.

It was a heartbreaking loss, **but I was determined to never give up on the people and communities I care about.** So I ran again. And this time, I won.

After that election, my then-seven-year-old daughter wrote me a note which read the following: Never give up.

I found myself thinking about her message often, so I decided to get it tattooed on my arm as a permanent reminder.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592343/394594499/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQzNDAzMC1kYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kh2FtUWP0OXbcesw3WFWReKG1qHqcnJ5iRasa71ro-M=)**
I’ve drawn strength from this tattoo many times since I got it in 2017.

Through all of the long days and nights fighting for Cincinnatians as a member of City Council and now representing OH-01 in Congress, this tattoo has given me the strength to keep pushing forward.

**If you truly believe in something, you never give up on it.** I will never stop fighting or shy away from a challenge if it means creating jobs, improving education, extending healthcare, investing in infrastructure, or protecting fundamental freedoms for people in Ohio’s 1st District.

_Because that’s what I came to Congress to do. And I will never give up on that promise._

[**If you’re with me in this campaign to never give up on fighting for Southwest Ohio, can you chip in a few dollars today? Every donation goes a long way toward making sure we can keep delivering results for our families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592345/394594500/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQzNDAzMC1kYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kh2FtUWP0OXbcesw3WFWReKG1qHqcnJ5iRasa71ro-M=)

With appreciation,

Greg

name: Team Chrissy
subject: Are you in?
body:
Time is running out, Derek.
| | |
---
Time is running out, Derek.
**With just hours left before our final deadline, we still need another 33 people to join us as 2023 Founding Members.**
Since taking over the House majority, Speaker Kevin McCarthy has advanced legislation to further weaken a woman’s right to choose, make it harder for the IRS to go after wealthy people who are cheating on their taxes, and limit Washington DC’s ability to govern itself. And they’re just getting started.
We must do everything we can to protect all the progress we made in the last two years (SO much to be proud of!) and stop the national GOP from rolling back the rights we've fought for. We need ALL HANDS ON DECK – including yours – but we noticed you haven't stepped up to become a 2023 Founding Member yet. **Please, Derek, there isn't much time left to make your donation:**
**[Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592919/394596958/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk793-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM2NGY3NC1kY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFCyit9PVCDDhhcMBxXWxUBMPL-O8yl2rue5otMXFrU=)****[or more right now – every dollar you can spare before midnight – to become a 2023 Founding Member of Team Chrissy, and stand with us as we fight for a better future that works for everyone!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592920/394596959/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk793-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM2NGY3NC1kY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFCyit9PVCDDhhcMBxXWxUBMPL-O8yl2rue5otMXFrU=)**

Team Chrissy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chrissy Houlahan**
Date: Tue, Feb 28, 2023
Subject: we're short of our end-of-month goal. can I count on your urgent support today?
---
| | |
---
Hi Derek,

**Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and my team and I are having a disagreement. I think we reached our fundraising goal. My campaign manager thinks we haven’t.**
**Have you noticed that we’re sending fewer emails than we used to? That might mean happier inboxes, but it’s also a big risk that could result in us raising less for the campaign.** I’m doing everything I can to have the resources to win while also helping other Democrats do the same. We have SO much to be proud of from the last two years. Let’s secure a Democratic majority and do it again. Let’s finish the job.
What are the stakes? With House GOP hard-liners extracting a series of concessions from Speaker Kevin McCarthy, that means even the most basic but essential functions of Congress – like passing a budget and raising the debt ceiling limit to help our economy – will be challenging to achieve.
When you elected me as your representative, I hit the ground running, passing legislation that is good for our community – from protecting families' right to choose to delivering infrastructure investments to PA-06. I will continue to fight my heart out for you and your family.

**But today, we face an uphill battle.** Our families and communities face crises on all fronts, and there's too much at stake to let the GOP enact its extremist and destructive agenda.******Now more than ever, I need your support.**
**[Derek, can I count on you to stand with me in this critical fight and help us reach our critical goal of 100 Founding Members before tomorrow's midnight deadline? Donate $5 or whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592926/394596964/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk793-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM2NGY3NC1kY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFCyit9PVCDDhhcMBxXWxUBMPL-O8yl2rue5otMXFrU=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592928/394596965/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk793-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM2NGY3NC1kY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFCyit9PVCDDhhcMBxXWxUBMPL-O8yl2rue5otMXFrU=)
---
Thank you so much for standing with me and helping to fight for a better future.

There's work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59592929/394596969/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM2NGY3NC1kY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFCyit9PVCDDhhcMBxXWxUBMPL-O8yl2rue5otMXFrU=&emci=c1a93787-77b7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3e364f74-dcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21278485). name: Susan Wild
subject: update on our February goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
This isn’t the news I wanted to share, but it's important to me that you stay in the loop: we did not reach our February fundraising goal.

|
---
| Peter –

This isn't the news I wanted to share, but it's important to me that you stay in the loop: we did not reach our February fundraising goal.

I know this team gave it our all, and when we set ambitious goals we run the risk of coming up short — but we'll have to really step up our game in March to get back on track to invest in key campaign resources. [_**Can I count on you to chip in $10 today to ensure we pass our next fundraising goal with flying colors?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59593042/394597327/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230302-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTljZDM4OC1kY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CnT3twE5xJ7ttWgL9vCpLYvH2pUjbHLPe8LOjcb2CVc=)

I know this team gave it our all, and when we set ambitious goals we run the risk of coming up short — but we'll have to really step up our game in March to get back on track to invest in key campaign resources. = | = | = With the first FEC filing deadline of the year at the end of the month, we cannot afford to show Republicans any signs of weakness. Friend,

**Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.**_Just look at the southern border. _

We all know that the border is _wide open_ and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won't stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals.

body:
We must break the cycle of fossil fuel pollution by fighting like hell against the stranglehold Big Oil has on our political system.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59625600/394655676/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230303-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5Y2UzYzQ5LTBhYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9xso5tsCc_5tP9dcahiT0aCgY72mDrgUh98hNkbn9As=)

| Our fossil fuel emissions are not only causing devastating climate consequences at home, they’re also causing great harm to nations that contribute very little to global emissions. Take a look at this:
---
| | **“Climate change is one of the most profound inequities of the modern era”**

\- The New York Times
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59625601/394655677/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230303-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5Y2UzYzQ5LTBhYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9xso5tsCc_5tP9dcahiT0aCgY72mDrgUh98hNkbn9As=)
---
The United States has historically been the biggest fossil fuel polluter in the world, but the consequences of this large-scale pollution are disproportionately affecting developing countries who lack the necessary resources to adapt, making them vulnerable to the ongoing climate crisis.

If our elected officials continue to prop up the fossil fuel industry, we will not only make things worse for the United States but for populations around the world that are already in severe climate distress. **We must break the cycle of fossil fuel pollution by fighting like hell against the stranglehold Big Oil has on our political system.

[_We need your support to take a stand against fossil fuel pollution and find solutions to combat the effects of climate change before it’s too late to turn back the clock. Will you invest in our work to end fossil fuel pollution?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59625602/394655678/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230303-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5Y2UzYzQ5LTBhYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9xso5tsCc_5tP9dcahiT0aCgY72mDrgUh98hNkbn9As=)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: Peter Willis, who should be the next Senator from California?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

With Barbara Lee in the race for California
Senate, there are now three Congressional Democrats running to take over
Dianne Feinstein's seat.

In 2022, Our Revolution's impactful organizing helped elect John
Fetterman, Raphael Warnock, and other important progressives up and down
the ballot.

As we decide where to invest in 2023, we're reaching out to get the
opinion of top supporters like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/CA_Senate/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230302_SV_CASenate_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Senate&t=1008&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]Please take our short survey and let us know if you support Barbara
Lee, Katie Porter, or Adam Schiff in the Senate primary:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/CA_Senate/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230302_SV_CASenate_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Senate&t=1009&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]ANSWER HERE

Our Revolution is a member-driven organization, and we won't make any
decision in this race without your input.

Many of the candidates running have strong records, and we need to hear
from you on who would be best to support.

We're already working hard to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a progressive,
and we need your take on who the next progressive Senator from California
should be.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/CA_Senate/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230302_SV_CASenate_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Senate&t=1010&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]Will you take a quick moment to take our California Senate survey!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230302_SV_CASenate_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Senate&t=1001&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230302_SV_CASenate_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Senate&t=1005&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230302_SV_CASenate_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Senate&t=1007&akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4075%2E5885482%2Ekr7CJN

body:
I feel truly humbled to have your support [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59594671/394603419/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWJlYjVhNi1lMGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GK9KrbPx4I0DEeNqKz0PP8scJSvq2j8IbYDUv_V9To=&emci=01602fe7-dbb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29beb5a6-e0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Once again, I am humbled by your support.

Earlier this week, you helped our team reach an ambitious fundraising goal at a critical time.

Even as DC Republicans and corporate special interests launched attacks against me, you had my back, and I'm so very thankful.

I also want to thank all of you who wrote messages of support as I recovered from surgery and prepared to continue my service to the people of Pennsylvania.

Our work isn't over, and it won't be easy — but there's no doubt in my mind that together we can keep the country moving forward and ensure that our future is bright.

Thank you for being a part of our team,

Bob

Even as DC Republicans and corporate special interests launched attacks against me, you had my back, and I'm so very thankful. I also want to thank all of you who wrote messages of support as I recovered from surgery and prepared to continue my service to the people of Pennsylvania. Our work isn't over, and it won't be easy — but there's no doubt in my mind that together we can keep the country moving forward and ensure that our future is bright. Thank you for being a part of our team, Bob P.S.
