body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59595361/394605697/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2NhYmQwZC1lM2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ys92rM17Z7eeq-YlpmoRZNv2Gap-gIniaGsjP2O_JEI=)
Did you hear the news?
The House Ethics committee formally announced its investigation of serial liar George Santos. The committee voted _unanimously_ to investigate whether he engaged in unlawful activity during his 2022 campaign.
This is a big deal.
George Santos is unfit to be a member of Congress, and should not be able to represent a constituency that voted for a facade of who he really is. He is a liar, and he manipulated his voters.
This investigation is a step toward accountability of members of Congress, but we don’t need an investigation to prove what we already know: George Santos is a fraud and must be expelled from Congress.
[**If you agree, please add your name to become a citizen cosponsor of Robert’s resolution to expel George Santos from the House. name: Greg Casar
subject: This bill is so important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59595614/394606500/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAyOTg0ZS1lNGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CN2L-MHaYPO-bkFjeHCHkHOviR7F8IF1wtRsqnWmHG0=&emci=e9e64948-e4b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2502984e-e4b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**As a former labor organizer, I know that joining a union should be a RIGHT, not a fight.**

That’s why, alongside my colleagues, we are reintroducing the _**Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act**_. This historic bill would restore the right of workers to freely form a union by protecting against union busting activity and helping workers bargain for changes in their workplace.

By restoring union rights, we drastically reduce inequality in America. With your help, we can make a strong push to make the PRO Act the law. **[Can you chip in $10, or whatever you can, today to help me and my team fight for workers’ rights and protections in Congress? Your support makes a big difference as we take on this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59595615/394606501/-733383820?refcode=em-20230303&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAyOTg0ZS1lNGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CN2L-MHaYPO-bkFjeHCHkHOviR7F8IF1wtRsqnWmHG0=)**

****[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59595616/394606502/-733383820?refcode=em-20230303&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAyOTg0ZS1lNGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CN2L-MHaYPO-bkFjeHCHkHOviR7F8IF1wtRsqnWmHG0=)****
---

**Peter,** **did you know that a majority of workers in the U.S. want to join a union—but only about 10% are currently union members?**

That’s because Congress hasn’t passed legislation guaranteeing many of the rights and protections that are in the PRO Act. Here are just a few of the important parts of the PRO Act:
* **It bans union busting** and closed door meetings where executives threaten workers against joining a union

* **It gets rid of “right to work for less” laws** in places like Texas that hurt unions’ financial ability to protect their workers

* **It requires that employers come to the negotiating table** after workers unionize to sign a contract raising wages and improving benefits

Bills like the PRO Act are one of the reasons I ran for Congress in the first place. If we truly want to tackle income inequality, boost wages for our workers, and build a more competitive workforce, we must push for bills like this.

Help me and my team get it done – **[chip in $10, or whatever you can, to support our work to pass the PRO Act and support our nation’s workers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59595617/394606505/-733383820?refcode=em-20230303&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAyOTg0ZS1lNGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CN2L-MHaYPO-bkFjeHCHkHOviR7F8IF1wtRsqnWmHG0=)**

Thank you,
Greg

_Congressman Greg Casar

clean_body: Peter, As a former labor organizer, I know that joining a union should be a RIGHT, not a fight. That’s why, alongside my colleagues, we are reintroducing the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act. This historic bill would restore the right of workers to freely form a union by protecting against union busting activity and helping workers bargain for changes in their workplace. By restoring union rights, we drastically reduce inequality in America. With your help, we can make a strong push to make the PRO Act the law. = **= Peter, did you know that a majority of workers in the U.S. want to join a union—but only about 10% are currently union members? That’s because Congress hasn’t passed legislation guaranteeing many of the rights and protections that are in the PRO Act. Here are just a few of the important parts of the PRO Act: It bans union busting and closed door meetings where executives threaten workers against joining a union It gets rid of “right to work for less” laws in places like Texas that hurt unions’ financial ability to protect their workers It requires that employers come to the negotiating table after workers unionize to sign a contract raising wages and improving benefits Bills like the PRO Act are one of the reasons I ran for Congress in the first place. If we truly want to tackle income inequality, boost wages for our workers, and build a more competitive workforce, we must push for bills like this. Help me and my team get it done – = Thank you, Greg Congressman Greg Casar Texas Congressional District 35 **=** | ****** ---|---

They lock, they fold, and they fit in your pocket so you have the confidence that your knife can remain concealed... And that it'll never slip. [See user feedback on these Smith & Wesson Liner Lock Folding Knives here.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11748/6374453/aa3f65f3e72c22f85caa2b15ada5d53181113d9a/132c41db03a1a6a47e1564798f752fe62681ecf4) At the time of this email, we’re receiving a mass amount of replies from people claiming their free orders. We’ll hold yours for now, but if you wait longer than 15 minutes... we’ll run out forever. [Just click here and tell us where to ship it, and it’s yours free.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11748/6374453/aa3f65f3e72c22f85caa2b15ada5d53181113d9a/132c41db03a1a6a47e1564798f752fe62681ecf4) If you wait too long and want one later, you’ll have to pay full retail.

P.S. While writing this email, I confirmed that there is still one, free Smith & Wesson ExtremeOps LinerLock Folding Knife... ready to ship... But if you want it, you’ll need to get it ASAP. Peter,

As the former Mayor of Bridgeport, Connecticut, I know what it takes to bring all neighborhoods of a city together and create real change in every community.

**That’s why I’m thrilled that Paul Vallas, former Superintendent of public schools here in Bridgeport, is heading to the runoff election to become the next Mayor of Chicago.**

[After leading the nonpartisan primary field with 35% of the votes, Paul needs our support now more than ever to win on April 4. Please click here to split a contribution between Democrats Serve and Paul’s campaign today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59596432/394609658/-319513557?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230303_1_1&refcode2=3b738c44-e5b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=DuGROujqm/RH1LaLYd3Q8QdI15EOAXRze076smC41K/0OjJylKT1MZroXZDbLpJ7B6T9k+tjHMfJQWgdEyzqothgoeCu7l0hYi1Jp3g6NQBYDl23wBUJmhI+xOea8yA3DDWVH/TLGYMj775xJB3/tk8K+626YAR246tThqrcUmY=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiNzM4YzQ0LWU1YjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WKkgXxhj6frXvrAu8q_o53kZQ6Jy8FKu6HBbLP_bur4=) | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59596433/394609659/-319513557?amount=10&refcode2=3b738c44-e5b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=DuGROujqm/RH1LaLYd3Q8QdI15EOAXRze076smC41K/0OjJylKT1MZroXZDbLpJ7B6T9k+tjHMfJQWgdEyzqothgoeCu7l0hYi1Jp3g6NQBYDl23wBUJmhI+xOea8yA3DDWVH/TLGYMj775xJB3/tk8K+626YAR246tThqrcUmY=&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiNzM4YzQ0LWU1YjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WKkgXxhj6frXvrAu8q_o53kZQ6Jy8FKu6HBbLP_bur4=)

Before his campaign for Chicago Mayor, I brought Paul to the Bridgeport school district because he’s the best problem solver around – and right now, Chicago is facing some serious problems, from rising crime to struggling schools.

As a former Superintendent and CEO of public schools across the country, Paul’s record of public service means he has firsthand knowledge of the challenges that Chicago communities are facing. Paul has run many large complex organizations and his opponent has not.

[That’s why I’m working with Democrats Serve to support Paul’s campaign. Will you help him cross the finish line by rushing a contribution today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59596434/394609660/-319513557?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230303_1_1&refcode2=3b738c44-e5b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=DuGROujqm/RH1LaLYd3Q8QdI15EOAXRze076smC41K/0OjJylKT1MZroXZDbLpJ7B6T9k+tjHMfJQWgdEyzqothgoeCu7l0hYi1Jp3g6NQBYDl23wBUJmhI+xOea8yA3DDWVH/TLGYMj775xJB3/tk8K+626YAR246tThqrcUmY=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiNzM4YzQ0LWU1YjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WKkgXxhj6frXvrAu8q_o53kZQ6Jy8FKu6HBbLP_bur4=)

Paul helped us fix our city when I was Mayor of Bridgeport – and I know he’ll do the same for the Windy City.

Thank you for standing with Paul and Democrats Serve,

Bill Finch
Former Mayor of Bridgeport, CT

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Here’s Why I Oppose Biden’s Student Loan Giveaway
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q1N_KErupBB-Y8pm749j8DAB8woitBFTrtv1IRqBX6LJUy2HKZS3v-_FUcjsbPxX_wDFIMMG7MeNzVe9meVpwjkU1ZAzgsjDS3_CxK_3qLbTgS586n_Iqzl4Ah8ND0x4CpNUom5KVs66N4Wkq4LmzSsuCqyjru9dy682445kTg7pJ8akl4iPC-8n2I6Egp0hJeSosITFbZ1yZ8zx4Nz9hzfPckY-hl5-53k7D__9kE2ybiyZ07ZFC56zdoGdqo-YrSVXrdL22KaysCa953BFmnMToEiQCbM-S4cjylpzKJqlnArZcEJe0EWd9SvS9guFY49gMoyYW65Vql85Keczew==&c=EscOG3_Dc9lhrlYh_igCY1X4FdaqnW59v9ryQupxE48Cm96VDhLFOA==&ch=qo23V0aplHy25HVMTuD8bwlr3Y_9bBJ3iujo2vQ1VS3klHDit4rclA==)
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I explained my opposition to Joe Biden's unilateral cancellation of student loan debt on legal, economic, and moral grounds. I also continued my push for bipartisan action against the Mexican drug cartels and exposed how Joe Biden's policies have kneecapped American energy dominance.
As always, thank you for your support.
Now, here's your brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| BIDEN'S STUDENT LOAN GIVEAWAY IS UNCONSTITUTIONAL AND IMMORAL
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Joe Biden's plan to unilaterally forgive student debt is wrong on multiple levels-it's wrong from a legal standpoint, economic standpoint, and moral standpoint. Let's take these one at a time.
The administration claims the HEROES Act (the Higher Education Relief Opportunities for Students Act) gives them legal authority to cancel student debt. But this bill was specifically intended to help service members deployed after 9/11. It was not intended whatsoever to be used to cancel the student loans of tens of millions of people who never served, and the original bill doesn't even authorize loan cancellation in the first place. This is the main issue before the Supreme Court right now. Six states--Nebraska, Missouri, Arkansas, Iowa, Kansas and South Carolina--and two students sued the administration arguing that Biden's student loan cancellation exceeds the President's executive authority. So when you hear arguments on the left that the Supreme Court must "follow the law" and approve the cancellation of this debt, it is important to remember that there is no law passed by Congress that remotely gives President Biden the authority to do this through executive action.
From a financial standpoint, this action would cost taxpayers $400 billion over 30 years and would slash student debt for more than 40 million people. It's important to remember that this debt is not "canceled" in that it just disappears. That's not how basic economics works. The debt must be repaid, and it will be repaid by a lot of taxpayers who never agreed to take on these loans in the first place. Finally, from a moral standpoint, it is the height of immorality for the government to sanction the passing of significant debt from those who agreed to take it on to those who did not. Unfortunately, we have fostered a culture in this country in which young people believe they are unwitting victims of a "broken system" that saddles them with debt they do not have to repay. The message from our leaders should be this: the government is not responsible for paying back loans that YOU decided on YOUR OWN free will to take. But Joe Biden and Democrats are sending the exact opposite message and are fostering a terrible mindset for our young people and the country as a whole.

---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| FIGHTING THE CARTELS OFFERS A CHANCE FOR BIPARTISANSHIP
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q1N_KErupBB-Y8pm749j8DAB8woitBFTrtv1IRqBX6LJUy2HKZS3vzRR4MRMMumr_vYIc_egUkPWimexBS85BHhtuu4TjfDaIydxKmKsonrV8ylM4ML50RxHrNOIQ7H6FbKhNmBx24YBOzGvW5DJKDx3bXI4UKz1wJUDRsdWymw=&c=EscOG3_Dc9lhrlYh_igCY1X4FdaqnW59v9ryQupxE48Cm96VDhLFOA==&ch=qo23V0aplHy25HVMTuD8bwlr3Y_9bBJ3iujo2vQ1VS3klHDit4rclA==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q1N_KErupBB-Y8pm749j8DAB8woitBFTrtv1IRqBX6LJUy2HKZS3vzRR4MRMMumr_vYIc_egUkPWimexBS85BHhtuu4TjfDaIydxKmKsonrV8ylM4ML50RxHrNOIQ7H6FbKhNmBx24YBOzGvW5DJKDx3bXI4UKz1wJUDRsdWymw=&c=EscOG3_Dc9lhrlYh_igCY1X4FdaqnW59v9ryQupxE48Cm96VDhLFOA==&ch=qo23V0aplHy25HVMTuD8bwlr3Y_9bBJ3iujo2vQ1VS3klHDit4rclA==)
---
| |
---
| Bipartisan progress over the next two years is going to be difficult to achieve in a divided Congress. But there is no reason that taking on the threat from Mexican drug cartels should not be bipartisan. The Mexican drug cartels are a common enemy. When the cartels traffic fentanyl across our border and kill Americans, they're not targeting us based on our race, gender, socioeconomic status, or political affiliation. The scourge of fentanyl poisoning at the hands of the cartels impacts every state and every Congressional district in this country. And unlike the debate over border security or illegal immigration, stopping the drug cartels from killing Americans should not be inherently partisan.
That's why I am working this Congress to get Democrats to join my bills that would authorize the use of military force against the cartels and increase penalties for anyone that aids and abets cartel-related activity. We also must increase the criminal penalties for those who illicitly traffic fentanyl. The reality of a divided Congress is that we need bipartisan support for any initiative to become law and make a difference. My legislation is not partisan, it does not take shots at Joe Biden or Democrats and I am not using this issue to score political points. If we are going to stop the Mexican drug cartels from killing Americans, we must do so together and Democrats must be part of the solution.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---

| "The Biden administration quietly updated a federal database that shows how many unused oil and gas drilling permits that it has approved, reducing the number by more than 2,000... The change suggests that President Joe Biden and administration officials had overstated the extent to which oil and gas companies have neglected producing on approved permits amid the global energy crisis last year."
That's a report from Fox News this week, and it illustrates the mindlessness and deceptiveness of Joe Biden's rhetoric and policy towards energy production since he took office. Joe Biden's approach to energy policy has looked something like this:

1. Blame the oil and gas industry for killing the planet
2. Enact policies that punish the industry and make it impossible for them to produce
3. Accuse the industry of not using approved drilling permits (which we now know is a lie)
4. Turn to our adversaries to give us oil and gas even though we could produce it here at home

Think about this: If it weren't for the Biden Administration's backwards energy policies, the United States would be producing 2-3 million more barrels of oil per day - an added total of $100 billion in our GDP per year. Rather than prioritizing American energy production, Joe Biden has canceled pipelines, reduced drilling on public lands, implemented new taxes on the oil and gas industry, and imposed ridiculous environmental standards that raise the operating costs for this critical industry. Before Biden took office, we were producing a record 13 million barrels of oil a day. Now? Roughly 11.6 million.
This administration's attacks on oil and gas have led us to prioritizing unreliable energy sources (like solar and wind), supplemented by dirty foreign oil and groveling to foreign leaders with worse environmental standards and labor records than our own. This ludicrous energy policy is hurting America's prosperity and it must be reversed. As a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, I'm doing everything I can to get common sense measures passed to get back the American energy dominance we've lost under this administration.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I explained my opposition to Joe Biden's unilateral cancellation of student loan debt on legal, economic, and moral grounds. I also continued my push for bipartisan action against the Mexican drug cartels and exposed how Joe Biden's policies have kneecapped American energy dominance. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | | | BIDEN'S STUDENT LOAN GIVEAWAY IS UNCONSTITUTIONAL AND IMMORAL | | | | | | Joe Biden's plan to unilaterally forgive student debt is wrong on multiple levels-it's wrong from a legal standpoint, economic standpoint, and moral standpoint. Let's take these one at a time. The administration claims the HEROES Act (the Higher Education Relief Opportunities for Students Act) gives them legal authority to cancel student debt. But this bill was specifically intended to help service members deployed after 9/11. It was not intended whatsoever to be used to cancel the student loans of tens of millions of people who never served, and the original bill doesn't even authorize loan cancellation in the first place. This is the main issue before the Supreme Court right now. Six states--Nebraska, Missouri, Arkansas, Iowa, Kansas and South Carolina--and two students sued the administration arguing that Biden's student loan cancellation exceeds the President's executive authority. So when you hear arguments on the left that the Supreme Court must "follow the law" and approve the cancellation of this debt, it is important to remember that there is no law passed by Congress that remotely gives President Biden the authority to do this through executive action. From a financial standpoint, this action would cost taxpayers $400 billion over 30 years and would slash student debt for more than 40 million people. It's important to remember that this debt is not "canceled" in that it just disappears. That's not how basic economics works. The debt must be repaid, and it will be repaid by a lot of taxpayers who never agreed to take on these loans in the first place. Finally, from a moral standpoint, it is the height of immorality for the government to sanction the passing of significant debt from those who agreed to take it on to those who did not. Unfortunately, we have fostered a culture in this country in which young people believe they are unwitting victims of a "broken system" that saddles them with debt they do not have to repay. The message from our leaders should be this: the government is not responsible for paying back loans that YOU decided on YOUR OWN free will to take. But Joe Biden and Democrats are sending the exact opposite message and are fostering a terrible mindset for our young people and the country as a whole. | | | | | | | | FIGHTING THE CARTELS OFFERS A CHANCE FOR BIPARTISANSHIP | | | == | == | | | Bipartisan progress over the next two years is going to be difficult to achieve in a divided Congress. But there is no reason that taking on the threat from Mexican drug cartels should not be bipartisan. The Mexican drug cartels are a common enemy. When the cartels traffic fentanyl across our border and kill Americans, they're not targeting us based on our race, gender, socioeconomic status, or political affiliation. The scourge of fentanyl poisoning at the hands of the cartels impacts every state and every Congressional district in this country. And unlike the debate over border security or illegal immigration, stopping the drug cartels from killing Americans should not be inherently partisan. That's why I am working this Congress to get Democrats to join my bills that would authorize the use of military force against the cartels and increase penalties for anyone that aids and abets cartel-related activity. We also must increase the criminal penalties for those who illicitly traffic fentanyl. The reality of a divided Congress is that we need bipartisan support for any initiative to become law and make a difference. My legislation is not partisan, it does not take shots at Joe Biden or Democrats and I am not using this issue to score political points. If we are going to stop the Mexican drug cartels from killing Americans, we must do so together and Democrats must be part of the solution. | | | | | | | | THE CONSEQUENCES OF BIDEN'S ATTACKS ON AMERICAN ENERGY | == | == | "The Biden administration quietly updated a federal database that shows how many unused oil and gas drilling permits that it has approved, reducing the number by more than 2,000... The change suggests that President Joe Biden and administration officials had overstated the extent to which oil and gas companies have neglected producing on approved permits amid the global energy crisis last year." That's a report from Fox News this week, and it illustrates the mindlessness and deceptiveness of Joe Biden's rhetoric and policy towards energy production since he took office. Joe Biden's approach to energy policy has looked something like this: 1. Blame the oil and gas industry for killing the planet 2. Enact policies that punish the industry and make it impossible for them to produce 3. Accuse the industry of not using approved drilling permits (which we now know is a lie) 4. Turn to our adversaries to give us oil and gas even though we could produce it here at home Think about this: If it weren't for the Biden Administration's backwards energy policies, the United States would be producing 2-3 million more barrels of oil per day - an added total of $100 billion in our GDP per year. Rather than prioritizing American energy production, Joe Biden has canceled pipelines, reduced drilling on public lands, implemented new taxes on the oil and gas industry, and imposed ridiculous environmental standards that raise the operating costs for this critical industry. Before Biden took office, we were producing a record 13 million barrels of oil a day. Now? Roughly 11.6 million. This administration's attacks on oil and gas have led us to prioritizing unreliable energy sources (like solar and wind), supplemented by dirty foreign oil and groveling to foreign leaders with worse environmental standards and labor records than our own. This ludicrous energy policy is hurting America's prosperity and it must be reversed. As a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, I'm doing everything I can to get common sense measures passed to get back the American energy dominance we've lost under this administration. | | | | | | | | | | == | Watch == and the entire lineup from the 2022 Crenshaw Youth Summit on == or == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | WEEKEND READS WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == FOX NEWS: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. body:
Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful
| | |
---
Hello,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**
It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m counting on you to chip in now:**
**[Please, if you’re able to, will you split $3 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59598086/394615977/-1786579371?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2221-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjA3MTYwYS1lOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0X85qsCHik1ZOHy04xgfwCigaKHCh1vfTYFiRIrzBUk=)****[or more right now between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's – to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59598087/394615978/-1786579371?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2221-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjA3MTYwYS1lOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0X85qsCHik1ZOHy04xgfwCigaKHCh1vfTYFiRIrzBUk=)**
Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You.

Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign.

With gratitude
- Adam

name: Team Joe
subject: 📧 Peter's first March Team Joe Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The past two years of Democratic leadership have made one thing clear: Democrats are delivering. Read on to learn about what Democrats are fighting for and how you can play a vital role in our work. | | |

* * *
**✅ PROTECTING THE _AFFORDABLE CARE ACT_**

While Democrats are fighting to build a better America, congressional Republicans are trying to slash Medicare, refusing to expand Medicaid, and pushing to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_(ACA). But we’ve seen this playbook before, Peter.
Virtually _every_ Republican budget over the last decade has included repeal of the ACA and deep cuts to Medicaid. What would that actually look like? Higher health care costs for tens of millions of Americans; ending critical protections for people with pre-existing conditions; millions of people losing health coverage and care; and threats to health care for seniors and people with disabilities, including growing home care waiting lists and worse nursing home care.

clean_body: The past two years of Democratic leadership have made one thing clear: Democrats are delivering. Read on to learn about what Democrats are fighting for and how you can play a vital role in our work. | | | Peter -- the past two years of Democratic leadership have made one thing clear:Democrats are delivering. President Biden signed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, a once-in-a-generation investment to repair our roads and bridges and pave the way for economic growth and jobs everywhere. This was only possible thanks to the support from Democrats just like you. | | | Read on to learn about what President Biden and Democrats are fighting for and how you can play a vital role in the upcoming elections → 💪 DEFENDING SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICARE As congressional Republicans have made clear, gutting Social Security and Medicare is now central to MAGA Republicans’ agenda. Republicans across the country have doubled down on this extreme agenda, which would hurt America’s working families and seniors. Protecting Social Security and Medicare will be one of the most important issues in the elections ahead, and we hope you’ll join the fight to defend and strengthen these programs. 🛍️ ADDING TO YOUR SPRING WARDROBE Keep your feet warm with these cozy aviator socks or add flair to any outfit with our vintage donkey pin! Both of these items are a great gift for family, friends, yourself, or anyone who wants to show their support for Democrats nationwide. Check them out: | | ✅ PROTECTING THE AFFORDABLE CARE ACT While Democrats are fighting to build a better America, congressional Republicans are trying to slash Medicare, refusing to expand Medicaid, and pushing to repeal the Affordable Care Act(ACA). But we’ve seen this playbook before, Peter. Virtually every Republican budget over the last decade has included repeal of the ACA and deep cuts to Medicaid. What would that actually look like? Higher health care costs for tens of millions of Americans; ending critical protections for people with pre-existing conditions; millions of people losing health coverage and care; and threats to health care for seniors and people with disabilities, including growing home care waiting lists and worse nursing home care. | | ⭐ YOUR CHANCE TO BE FRONT AND CENTER As DNC Chair Jaime Harrison says, there are no off-years. We’re working around the clock to create the voter protection, organizing, and state-of-the-art data and technology programs Democrats will need to win from the school board to the Senate -- and we’re counting on you to play a vital role as the 2023 and 2024 elections approach. By renewing your support, you can be front and center in the Democratic Party’s efforts to win important elections this November and beyond. Thanks for being on this team, Peter. Team Joe | ---|--- | |

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Out-of-pocket costs for insulin are coming down
body:
#
Peter,
The cost of life-saving prescription medicine in America is out of control. According to a [poll](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129860?t=1&akid=27802%2E1203867%2Evm9mKL) by Kaiser Family Health, eight in ten adults say that the cost of prescription drugs is unreasonable. And almost 30 percent aren’t taking their medication as prescribed due to cost.
**Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act that Congress passed in 2022, vital medication is becoming more affordable.** For the first time, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drug prices. Insulin costs have been capped at $35 per month for Medicare patients as a result.
Now, Eli Lilly has [announced](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129861?t=2&akid=27802%2E1203867%2Evm9mKL) they’ll be capping out-of-pocket costs for insulin at $35 a month for everyone.
Make no mistake, Eli Lilly would not have taken these steps without pressure from the public and the federal government to make insulin more affordable. This is a huge step towards lowering the cost of a prescription drug that millions rely on to survive. But other pharmaceutical companies continue to inflate prices for profit.
**[Sign the petition: Tell pharmaceutical companies to follow Eli Lilly’s lead and cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/jdem202303/?source=em20230303-27802&t=3&akid=27802%2E1203867%2Evm9mKL)**
Onward,
Ro

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=4&akid=27802%2E1203867%2Evm9mKL) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=5&akid=27802%2E1203867%2Evm9mKL) and your state public health department.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten?=
subject: A little Constitutional Carry, anyone?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df22ceede562/were-off-and-running-8117789?e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
| **NEWS RELEASE**
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Contact: Joel Pawloski, ConstitutionalCarry24@outlook.com
Kerry McQuisten, info@kerrymcquisten.com
Jean Sampson, CarryforAll2024@yahoo.com
**Prospective petition establishing constitutional carry filed in Oregon**
SALEM, OR—March 3, 2023—Today, the Oregon Secretary of State’s Office received the initial prospective petition filing to establish constitutional carry in Oregon. The three chief petitioners in the effort are: Joel Pawloski, Chair of the Marion County Republicans; Kerry McQuisten, former gubernatorial candidate and former mayor of Baker City; and Jean Sampson, former city council member of Clatskanie in Columbia County.

The title as listed in the petition information is: “Establishing the right to carry concealed firearms without permit.” The proposed text is as follows: “PARAGRAPH 1. Section 27, Article I of the Constitution of the State of Oregon, is amended to read: Sec. 27. (1) The people shall have the right to bear arms for the [defence] defense of themselves, and the State, but the Military shall be kept in strict subordination to the civil power. (2) The right described in subsection (1) of this section includes the right to carry, without a permit, a concealed firearm.”

Says Pawloski, “Constitutional Carry is an important right for the safety and security of all Oregonians. The failures of leadership in Oregon are endemic. With ballot initiatives, the people of Oregon act as our own legislators under the Oregon Constitution, and it’s time we take the lead on this subject.”
McQuisten concurs. “We’ve watched so many over-the-top gun-grab attempts in Oregon erode our Second Amendment rights. We shouldn’t be asking permission from the government to protect ourselves.”

“Gathering this many signatures is a daunting task,” added Sampson. “But I think Oregonians are ready for this change in the same way that more than half of our U.S. states have been.”

After the prospective petition paperwork is approved by the Secretary of State’s office, the chief petitioners will be issued a signature sheet template to begin collecting at least 1,000 sponsorship signatures, which are necessary to receive a ballot title from the Oregon Attorney General’s Office. After that step is achieved, the process of gathering the more than 160,000 signatures for the initiative to appear on the 2024 ballot will begin.

Additional statements will be released, along with official website information, when the gathering of the first 1,000 signatures begins. **# # #**

name: Jon Tester
subject: Did you know?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hey there,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic Senators looking out for them.

Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**

When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.

[**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 or more donation between Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41507?t=6&akid=6636%2E878179%2EYCEmw_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41508?t=7&akid=6636%2E878179%2EYCEmw_)

Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans.

That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country.

— Jon

Friend, First, thank you for anything you could pitch in last month — with your support, we reached our February goal and saw an improvement in grassroots fundraising! I’ve spent the last two months working on legislation in Congress to improve the lives of New Mexicans (and opposing far-right bills aimed at rolling back our rights), and traveling back to the 2nd District to meet with constituents in their communities. As we enter the last month of the first quarter of 2023, I wanted to check in and ask what issues are top of mind for you and your families at this moment so I can continue to fight with your best interests in mind. [**Will you take a minute to complete my End of Quarter issues survey here?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59601340/394626782/1088141938?refcode=fl_em_su_20230303survey_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTA0M2FiNS1mMGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3pKuvwav7fisoQaOkfZZOH7UdhOd54DLMPKtFAFtAbY=&emci=401c07c5-4fb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4e043ab5-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4482565) | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59601341/394626783/1088141938?refcode=fl_em_su_20230303survey_gv_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTA0M2FiNS1mMGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3pKuvwav7fisoQaOkfZZOH7UdhOd54DLMPKtFAFtAbY=&emci=401c07c5-4fb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4e043ab5-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4482565)

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me and our campaign,
Gabe

Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

body:
Together, we can stop violent crime | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/85c56e635f76/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8118259?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=cd9630bc2c&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_**2022 was the deadliest year in Portland’s metro history with over 100 homicides – We are already on track to break that record this year. This is a tragedy that affects every single one of us. **_

Lori is committed to turning this around.

With your help, Lori can advocate to stop the flow of drugs at our southern border. She is fighting to fund programs that target drug abuse and support law enforcement in their efforts to combat these issues.

[**_Together, we can create a safer environment for all Oregonians to live and work in. Your donation, no matter how small, will make a huge impact in this fight. >>>_**](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=ef1bd9af74&e=c87c5d8d97)

Team Lori

name: Defeat Ruben Gallego
subject: Kari Lake: “Gallego is Arizona’s AOC”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
We've got a problem in Arizona, unless you help us today.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389278:6OtS1JGNM:m:1:3331421248:59C58849533687C5EF40D84705F3532B:r "Headline") Peter: We've got a problem in Arizona, **[unless you help us today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389278:6OtS1JGNM:m:1:3331421248:59C58849533687C5EF40D84705F3532B:r "unless you help us today.")** Now that Sen. Kyrsten Sinema has become a registered Independent, Arizona's AOC, Ruben Gallego, has announced his run for Senate in that race and his team has already announced that Latino voters are crucial to his strategy for success. I'm no fan of Sen. Sinema. But Sinema never threw a wrecking ball trying to topple our government. I can't say the same is true for Comrade Gallego. **Gallego is a man who has called conservative patriot Rep. Jim Jordan "a traitor to the Constitution" for demanding election integrity.** Yet Comrade Gallego has no problem demanding the DOJ not treat Jan. 6 like a "normal investigation." Arizona is going to be a 3-way race. And if you don't step up RIGHT NOW and help us, Gallego could win, which is bad news for the whole country! **[Latinos for America First is perfectly positioned to counter Gallego's Latino strategy and ensure a conservative wins the 2024 Senate race. Help us go into Arizona and begin our outreach to the Latino community. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389278:6OtS1JGNM:m:1:3331421248:59C58849533687C5EF40D84705F3532B:r "Latinos for America First is perfectly positioned to counter
Gallego’s Latino strategy and ensure a conservative wins the 2024 Senate race. Help us go into Arizona and begin our outreach to the Latino
community. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today!")** Like a good progressive, Gallego spent no time looking for evidence, interviewing witnesses, etc. He just wanted President Trump, Jim Jordan, and Marjorie Taylor Green in jail, and like a Russian "show trial," and he'd find the evidence later. That's how dangerous socialists like Gallego can be to the future of our nation. They want to destroy our democracy and bring in kangaroo courts they admire, like Russia used in the 1930s, where you were always found "guilty" and never found "not guilty." [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389278:6OtS1JGNM:m:1:3331421248:59C58849533687C5EF40D84705F3532B:r "Tweet")**[We can't wait one second longer to begin our Latino outreach in Arizona and expose Gallego's radical progressive agenda. It's the only way the Republican candidate will have a chance of winning this Senate seat! Will you donate $50, $100, or $250 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389278:6OtS1JGNM:m:1:3331421248:59C58849533687C5EF40D84705F3532B:r "We can’t wait one second longer to begin our Latino
outreach in Arizona and expose Gallego’s radical progressive agenda. It’s the only way the Republican candidate will have a chance of
winning this Senate seat! Will you donate $50, $100, or $250 today?")** The Latino vote in Arizona is crucial toward GOP victory in 2024 and we can't let Latino Voters get conned by this man. It will impact the Senate race and the Presidential race. **The consequences are that serious! Do you want another 4 years of Brandon running this country into the ground?** Look, as bad as the Democrats have been in the Senate, Sen. Sinema stopped Biden and Schumer from eliminating the filibuster, packing the courts, and spending more than they wanted! That's why we're at DEFCON 1 and must organize now to stop Comrade Gallego from winning this seat. Because he will vote lockstep with Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Brandon EVERY. SINGLE. TIME! **[Please hurry with your donation of $100, $500, or $1,000. We must engage in Arizona now!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389278:6OtS1JGNM:m:1:3331421248:59C58849533687C5EF40D84705F3532B:r "Please hurry with your donation of $100, $500, or $1,000. We
must engage in Arizona now!")** For America, Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert just keeps talking. And talking. And talking some more. It's like she has a disease where she simply can't shut up.
body:
Adam Frisch for Colorado
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06067409-d42a-4203-8512-1bea3f137b43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Lauren Boebert just keeps talking. And talking. And talking some more. It's like she has a disease where she simply can't shut up.** **_In recent days she's openly rooted for Russia vs Ukraine, attacked Discover Card for tracking gun purchases to prevent gun violence as a Communist plot and sponsored a bill to get rid of the Department of Education._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e98c3ab-d71b-484e-9b66-378a1d3e9810/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Look. If Boebert wants to go shooting her mouth off for the rest of her miserable life, I don't care. That she is doing it while getting paid six figures with our taxpayer dollars and using the microphone given to her to put more Americans and human beings around the world in danger, that I have a serious problem with._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf380f8d6-796f-4a00-bf9d-4dad1360142c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Meanwhile, the accomplished Adam Frisch, who lost to this loud and stupid person by only 546 votes in a lean Trump district in 2022, is running again. Instead of the verbal diarrhea of Boebert, here is an example of the kinds of things to which Frisch is talking about:_ **_Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24--send Boebert off somewhere to talk to herself and take back Kevin McCarhthy's gavel._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadcee1a0-f1bc-4491-be91-4a5aaec5f446/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication. Always.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1eb421a1-f2b7-409b-bde1-8206b6d22f67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Trump announcement BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:

| | I’m stunned. I just learned that Trump has raised a horrifying $500 MILLION since his MASSIVE election loss — all to endanger our country again. I hate to alarm you, but this is the kind of cash that could buy Donald Trump the Presidency – and help him destroy our Democracy in the process. I’ll fight tooth and nail to ensure this election-denying extremist and his allies NEVER set foot in the halls of power again. [**So I just launched a plan to make his sorry run for President completely BACKFIRE.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59602193/394629033/1694452237?refcode=20230303_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDU3ZWM2OS1mMWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_9z5_wASOmjWnbh9sAuCs3dWcQ-y_Vl2dm76QBVEds=) [**_Here’s my plan: I’m uniting a historic response — 5,000 Team Pelosi Memberships — to completely OUTRAISE Trump’s 2023 haul, prove that every single American who supports and honors our Constitution stands ready to stop him and his allies from EVER barging back into our White House, and hand them the most HUMILIATING defeat of their life. I know we can send Trump a message he will never forget — Democracy will WIN at the ballot box — but ONLY if we can start the month out strong. On raising wages, expanding healthcare, and legalizing weed — Josh Hawley stood against Missourians. That’s why we’re replacing him in 2024.
#
Peter — Missourians know how to take back their power at the ballot box.
They’ve spent the last three election cycles using the ballot initiative to take action when the corrupt politicians standing in their way wouldn’t — on raising wages, on expanding healthcare, and even on legalizing weed.
**But just guess whose side Josh Hawley has been on...**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28238?refcode=em20230303-2844&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2844%2E614464%2E66KEKB)
**[CHIP IN TO DEFEAT HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28238?refcode=em20230303-2844&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2844%2E614464%2E66KEKB)**
**While Hawley pretends to fight for everyday Missourians, he’s stood against them in critical efforts to take back their power at the ballot box.** And in DC, he raised his fist because he thought it’d help himself get _even more_ power — then ran for his life at the first sign of trouble.
Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator whose mission is to stand up and fight for them – not a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley. **And I’m ready to serve.**
**[Help me replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate by adding a donation of any amount to our grassroots campaign today. name: Team AOC
subject: A compassionate immigration system is necessary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALEXANDRIA OCASIO-CORTEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230303.8lutV_&refcode=em20230303-3961&t=1001&akid=3961%2E2526796%2E-dGRW6 ]What is happening at the border? [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230303.8lutV_&refcode=em20230303-3961&t=1002&akid=3961%2E2526796%2E-dGRW6 ]+2,400,000 Asylum seekers expelled Many
republicans claim the border is open but the reality is that President Biden
expelled over 2,400,000 asylum seekers from the United States under the
Trump-era Title 42 policy. Alexandria has joined 76 other Democrats in Congress
in opposing President Biden’s use of Title 42. But now, President Biden has
unveiled a new rule that will impose severe limitations for all asylum seekers
who travel through a third country to reach the Southern border. A federal court
struck down a similar asylum ban imposed by President Trump as unconstitutional.
Alexandria, along with many colleagues, has spoken out against the new policy as
well. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230303.8lutV_&refcode=em20230303-3961&t=1003&akid=3961%2E2526796%2E-dGRW6 ]The truth is: without immigrants, our economy would suffer. Immigrants
added $2 trillion to the national GDP in 2016, and nearly $460 billion to local
and federal taxes in 2018. Whereas a University of Pennsylvania study found that
a Republican bill to severely restrict all immigration would cost our country
4.6 million jobs by 2040. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230303.8lutV_&refcode=em20230303-3961&t=1004&akid=3961%2E2526796%2E-dGRW6 ]A compassionate immigration system is necessary to
make our country strong. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230303.8lutV_&refcode=em20230303-3961&t=1005&akid=3961%2E2526796%2E-dGRW6 ]Make a contribution today. If you’re able to, please
split a contribution today between two immigrant-rights organizations: New York
Immigration Coalition and New York State Youth Leadership Council. The New York
State Youth Leadership Council is the first organization in New York led by
undocumented youth. Their goal is to give undocumented youth the tools and space
to organize and create change in our communities. NY Immigration Coalition is an
umbrella advocacy group representing over 200 immigrant and refugee rights
groups, and is working to advance opportunity and justice for all New Yorkers.
100% of your contribution will go directly to these organizations. Make a
contribution today.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ocasiocortez.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-old/?akid=3961%2E2526796%2E-dGRW6

PAID FOR BY ALEXANDRIA OCASIO-CORTEZ FOR CONGRESS

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: What I’m thinking about this Women’s History Month →
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
March is Women’s History Month, and, as it starts, I am thinking of trailblazing Texas women. Here in Houston March is also Rodeo time, with hats and boots and all things Texas on display. So much of our Texas identity is about blazing our own trails, facing obstacles in our way, and doing things our way. And that is certainly true of Texas women.
Did you know that Texas elected a woman Governor in 1924 — the second woman governor in United States history (and only by 15 days)? Growing up, I was surrounded by strong Texas women and stories of them.
When I was born, Barbara Jordan was representing Houston in Congress. When I was in elementary school, Kathy Whitmire was Houston’s mayor. By high school, Ann Richards was Texas’ governor.
Texas women have led this state — and this country — to better days. But these days, things are getting harder, not easier, for Texas women. Despite a century of leadership and trailblazing, some lawmakers are focused on taking away the rights of Texas women to make their own decisions about their bodies, their families, and their futures.
We can’t let that happen. While some in our state (and our Congress) work to take away the rights of women — and through these policies all Texans — many of us are working together to stop them. After all, it was Texas women who fought for health, privacy, dignity, and freedom of all women in the case Roe v. Wade 50 years ago.
We know that the attack on reproductive freedom won’t stop at overturning Roe . Anti-choice lawmakers across the country — including here in Texas — want to restrict not only abortion but access to birth control. We have already seen it. When the U.S. House passed a bill to protect the right to access to birth control, less than a dozen Republicans in Congress voted for it.
That’s why who is in Congress — and who controls the Congress — matters so much. I’ve taken to heart the role of Texas women in protecting our rights, and I’m working in Congress to restore Roe ’s fundamental protections and to protect the right to travel out of state for reproductive health care. I’m as committed as ever to ensuring access to safe, affordable, nonjudgmental reproductive health care for everyone.
And I am committed to taking back the House and to electing more pro-choice champions — to Congress, to the Legislature, and to offices everywhere. Because what we know is that these trailblazing women didn’t just make history, they made life better for people – opening up government, restoring our faith, expanding our opportunities.
That’s the work before us — and I am so glad to have you as part of our team doing this work.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Sign-off [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

Peter, We hate to be reaching out with more bad news, but Iowa Republicans are making moves to outlaw **all** abortions in the state. It doesn’t end there, though. The bill is modeled on Texas’ SB 8, which empowers citizens to sue anyone who “aids and abets” abortion. The law would _require_ internet service providers to block all access to pro-choice websites. That includes abortion funds, providers, or sites that connect women with abortion pills. **It’s dystopian.** This bill would effectively force public libraries, schools, and colleges to censor access to information to the public. Plus, any person who sends or receives abortion pills in the mail would be punishable by FIVE years in prison. [_**We still have time to block this bill from becoming law, but only with your help. subject: I am about to take the stage at CPAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024

American exceptionalism reflects our conviction that the ideals that spawned our nation are exceptional, in the world and in human history.

Once we stop believing that it's the beginning of the end: the country will technically live on, but only as a hollowed-out husk of itself.

You probably heard every pitch in the book from typical politicians, Fellow American. But I am not a career politician. I am not beholden to the DC machine.

**[That's why I am asking for just $1 before the end of the day. I am excited to share my vision of what we can do together when we take back the Oval Office, but I need you on my team.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f60fWLb-yP6eNuEJi3KnlpsfYPDqfxgEgTWpOplMeW0Ma2yOwbD8cCCZj0NvCwE7A8BjM0uWWKWdBtYwgCud14yM4J1b3GPw4MVkLbiCcIcKMGFpxG5vjii3vmvGQW4QAHl_uACdsxE4fPVkwpnJXJA4Np-voQMMgiCQyOTbUjZxYx88uDdzEm5IXLcpguqMl7xclt1OFBuRyxVTBtYKBNC3c1oHPzao0L8sNalp6qzoPsV3OmeAMznBi_OGh7TKxuzABcMbm653ChwEm_1Ks58nX8VOKVewHtISOwy2EI9zNytvWvX1Hiwhb7tDPCFUTa57GaOzC9TgHNOD9z-QY_buQcn7wEgXkQ5k5YuKJHJJKtZltXg5s8YGbH02PAoGA2g%3D%3D)**

**[This campaign will be lifted by *small* dollar donations.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f60fWLb-yP6eNuEJi3KnlpsfYPDqfxgEgTWpOplMeW0Ma2yOwbD8cCCZj0NvCwE7A8BjM0uWWKWdBtYwgCud14yM4J1b3GPw4MVkLbiCcIcKMGFpxG5vjii3vmvGQW4QAHl_uACdsxE4fPVkwpnJXJA4Np-voQMMgiCQyOTbUjZxYx88uDdzEm5IXLcpguqMl7xclt1OFBuRyxVTBtYKBNC0_3oVUy37kWQ4g0TQRGHsrqRXSIcbBnqR2yMM-vew0HK2oaP5iUMTV2LYg3vYXFGsT3CUQDm9indVK0jcdCd1CkWI_Zt1MgN8UI7Q7SnGx5n63Ucj9L4XZ2swHj53OQfn2yVLphMY8z3-6REbKFskqWSgGU_Qoh1ZmqzO1A00-hw%3D%3D) We'll run this campaign the same way we'll lead our country: bottom-up.**

It's time to unite around a vision to defeat wokeness and to revive American excellence.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f60fWLb-yP6eNuEJi3KnlpsfYPDqfxgEgTWpOplMeW0Ma2yOwbD8cCCZj0NvCwE7A8BjM0uWWKWdBtYwgCud14yM4J1b3GPw4MVkLbiCcIcKMGFpxG5vjii3vmvGQW4QAHl_uACdsxE4fPVkwpnJXJA4Np-voQMMgiCQyOTbUjZxYx88uDdzEm5IXLcpguqMl7xclt1OFBuRyxVTBtYKBNC35WrrMTY1Qm5n2N3BtIIQRdG1UEJSbccblrdMn0C0qN2YOcJJjx6rIKJyqvv-cS4ePADnLwVab0l6KXa8P5oiMnpE6EH4nQ0IZvgPCeKRXhRzJ0xV6a2tdCQvRAMEHHGKdAfCBtFDk3tjJ7F-k8UMWONNrHLfYcq3VM2ShddByVA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR TEAM ➔**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f60fWLb-yP6eNuEJi3KnlpsfYPDqfxgEgTWpOplMeW0Ma2yOwbD8cCCZj0NvCwE7A8BjM0uWWKWdBtYwgCud14yM4J1b3GPw4MVkLbiCcIcKMGFpxG5vjii3vmvGQW4QAHl_uACdsxE4fPVkwpnJXJA4Np-voQMMgiCQyOTbUjZxYx88uDdzEm5IXLcpguqMl7xclt1OFBuRyxVTBtYKBNC1t_dsMwKQd_clPY8bK_fOzpXxxFyTUpTWbGs51nBqyijSoARdJMFz71p_JnaOijQwrV5XPkvGvB76U3sFImixtrNR1cuA-lu4fCCVyIYsxWNfdTmboUiIf1xrZqXuLonr7a1gZ_saDbVjuJWBu25pq0uCMOMXXXb5biNTjuEJTlA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f60fWLb-yP6eNuEJi3KnlpsfYPDqfxgEgTWpOplMeW0Ma2yOwbD8cCCZj0NvCwE7A8BjM0uWWKWdBtYwgCud14yM4J1b3GPw4MVkLbiCcIcKMGFpxG5vjii3vmvGQW4QAHl_uACdsxE4fPVkwpnJXJA4Np-voQMMgiCQyOTbUjZxYx88uDdzEm5IXLcpguqMl7xclt1OFBuRyxVTBtYKBNC0PaXLt4dRqhrpqLIC--f1jN1UHUWW52y11NCfscj2482JI8-N2ap60kBevQ8YImFlzhHz_aaUbX3oVDsQa8vLQAS2CITXBcdaMjH6_EuVc7X7g5roMdnS2E5oq-WJczFssXRH_UIBjt8TGJHjGSvBjeXoruzXgFTtEY5Khiw4ucw%3D%3D)

---

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f6z9fByhVhGbEQtDfypkWfYmcO6hg4nRKz8z9fyLSQAHZ4LSW0n8V67YgvHRA1aN1n_mOhOnOqMG94Q8vZB35J6ozUFUJ0Q7b5O6oBDtWbYV4d1QVQKgsRYo2bXnkt5-GLS-wREDUkXMu3VliMSoq66S41zDaomYiAG0SxlAtoYKqGUKAKH29O1gQ6oYXiKz89S2N9TA2dJbUQTiJ1KuGMnE%3D) | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f6_0ZG8eFh4d6es1ieDAcw-7dC-AYeAriumx35vu-gtU_4yjGQhjGah1xktikSKwfpCIywbpJ_amudaosUGSHIz1y0oqSeFmnKobwlpzImNKpGgxoeg87m-aNOcKWwdbqv5TtS-_9oHEDnsbfbHlASz0Yo5cru4JHZysnNKm6YZGw8RAOcnG-41KbGCM4802JhQ%3D%3D) | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddd1be8102894f19a03c889ce6a27cd2&_e=ecxw5q4kAOXhHOp11b7f61v5uOM1-2XUroxRpCw9jtJ1UCIiKu_CA9yvBt76h1ryU-gTbgWPJsUoFQ0xeawoFW1vXzyXljnePeVnYv9mr-0XVsKbrweTzVUeGyJ-VSvnHOfA0MScSW0USmgU_N3HfsQ2IwaWmKIHB567ldQnfSf0R7BNVX2AyaB_XJf82onN9ACcj3ogszytgSVyyCF3vhrezd2Rnc-TKwVsM3bYbIk%3D)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: An update from me on Medicaid expansion:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We have to move ASAP.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59603994/394634360/823540626?refcode=ea.da043ce8-f7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.da043ce8-f7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA0M2NlOC1mN2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rFeXAZl6IgLarRRSASaf8C8rw-zwgmXgn9xlHhM1pB8=&emci=755cd5c9-d0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=da043ce8-f7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — I want you to hear it from me. Legislative leaders have agreed to expand Medicaid in North Carolina! We’ve been working hard on this for years, and this is a crucial step forward. But we need the legislature to act NOW. **Every single month we go without expanding Medicaid, North Carolina loses lives and $521 million in federal health care dollars. We can’t afford to wait.** **[Please, join me and call on Senate Leader Berger and House Speaker Moore, the Republican leaders of the legislature, to make Medicaid expansion effective as soon as possible. | | Peter, We're _continually_ fed this narrative that COVID started in a wet market in Wuhan. Time and time again, Dr. Fauci and other medical "experts" reiterate this narrative, even though we know it's very likely the virus resulted from a lab leak at the Wuhan Institute of Virology. Now, a leaked memo from Wuhan shows dangerous gain-of-function research created a _similar_ strain to COVID-19 - **_and it was done on purpose._** Scientists created this COVID-like virus in 2018, and now they're trying to backpedal and say YOUR hard-earned money didn't fund this dangerous research. But you and I both know that's a downright lie. **I said it before: gain-of-function research sets us up for an accident, and it 's looking more and more like that warning has ****_become a reality_.** _[**Chip in now to stand with me and demand we stop funding this dangerous gain-of-function research and**** _finally_****hold hearings on the origins of COVID.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62388671:6-4xmJGNb:m:1:3365131770:85EA54CC36FC3C87242F2271CE494468:r)_

body:
Corporations are using junk fees to rip off consumers across millions of daily transactions.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605549/394635887/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfp21kIR-ympONffPWgBvSE9GMCZxvS2TRRbN6x7qh8=)
---
Have you ever made an online purchase — maybe for food delivery, clothing, a concert ticket, or a hotel reservation — and wondered afterward why the charge was just a little higher than advertised?

Odds are, you've been charged with a "junk fee" many times in your life. That's what we call the additional (and often hidden) charges that a wide range of lenders and vendors apply to transactions.

**I was heartened during last month's State of the Union to see President Biden call for action to protect consumers and crack down on the widespread application of junk fees.** [**If you agree that corporations should stop price-gouging folks without their knowledge, please sign on to help us rally support for legislation that will reduce junk fees for millions of Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605550/394635888/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfp21kIR-ympONffPWgBvSE9GMCZxvS2TRRbN6x7qh8=&emci=9536e6b6-bfb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=19851acd-f9b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605552/394635889/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfp21kIR-ympONffPWgBvSE9GMCZxvS2TRRbN6x7qh8=&emci=9536e6b6-bfb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=19851acd-f9b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) The types of transactions that incur junk fees are inescapable in modern life. And so many still struggle with the daily cost of living, the impact of an extra charge here and an extra charge there does add up.

We can help millions of people if we put firmer guardrails in place against junk fees. But I can guarantee you that big special interests are going to fight us tooth and nail.

That's why we need as many Virginians/supporters as possible to make their voices heard and demand that Congress serve the people and not the special interests.

[**Please add your name now and help us reach 7,500 signatures by Tuesday →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605553/394635891/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfp21kIR-ympONffPWgBvSE9GMCZxvS2TRRbN6x7qh8=&emci=9536e6b6-bfb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=19851acd-f9b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605557/394635892/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230303JF_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfp21kIR-ympONffPWgBvSE9GMCZxvS2TRRbN6x7qh8=)****

body:
BREAKING: Capping the cost of insulin |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605533/394635871/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4xaZHxTLCCt-yz10MG8EZ0pHKjmY3yzXRL9fhyO_-M=)
In January, Michael's bill to cap the out-of-pocket cost of insulin for all Medicare recipients went into effect capping insulin at $35 per month for millions of senior citizens across the country. Last year, Michael and Senator Raphael Warnock introduced _The Affordable Insulin Now Act_ to cap the monthly cost of insulin for _**everyone**_. This week, pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly announced it will cap the out-of-pocket cost of its insulin at $35 per month, for both insured and uninsured people. This will lower health care costs for hundreds of thousands of Coloradans with diabetes and millions nationwide. But, folks, the work doesn't stop here. No one, regardless of age, income, or insurance provider, should have to choose between paying for insulin and paying for groceries. That's why last year, Michael introduced _The Affordable Insulin Now Act_ to cap ALL patients' out-of-pocket costs for insulin at $35 per month. **Passing this bill won't be easy, but if we consolidate enough support behind it, we can make sure every American has affordable access to insulin.[Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my plan to cap insulin prices for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605535/394635872/1732817139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4xaZHxTLCCt-yz10MG8EZ0pHKjmY3yzXRL9fhyO_-M=&emci=b5fbd999-e8b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1b851acd-f9b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)** | **[Sign The Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59605537/394635873/1732817139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1MWFjZC1mOWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4xaZHxTLCCt-yz10MG8EZ0pHKjmY3yzXRL9fhyO_-M=&emci=b5fbd999-e8b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1b851acd-f9b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)**
---
Michael commends Eli Lilly's new policy, but knows Congress must take this a step further to ensure every working American can afford their life-saving insulin medication and is ready to double down in his fight to make this happen.

clean_body: BREAKING: Capping the cost of insulin | = In January, Michael's bill to cap the out-of-pocket cost of insulin for all Medicare recipients went into effect capping insulin at $35 per month for millions of senior citizens across the country. Last year, Michael and Senator Raphael Warnock introduced The Affordable Insulin Now Act to cap the monthly cost of insulin for everyone. This week, pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly announced it will cap the out-of-pocket cost of its insulin at $35 per month, for both insured and uninsured people. This will lower health care costs for hundreds of thousands of Coloradans with diabetes and millions nationwide. But, folks, the work doesn't stop here. No one, regardless of age, income, or insurance provider, should have to choose between paying for insulin and paying for groceries. That's why last year, Michael introduced The Affordable Insulin Now Act to cap ALL patients' out-of-pocket costs for insulin at $35 per month. Passing this bill won't be easy, but if we consolidate enough support behind it, we can make sure every American has affordable access to insulin. | Michael commends Eli Lilly's new policy, but knows Congress must take this a step further to ensure every working American can afford their life-saving insulin medication and is ready to double down in his fight to make this happen. Thank you, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Derek, Virginia has had an incredible year so far. In January, we elected Holly Seibold to the House of Delegates and strengthened our Democratic brick wall in the State Senate by flipping a seat and electing Aaron Rouse. In February, we elected Jennifer McClellan to Congress. A leader in the General Assembly for over a decade, Congresswoman-elect McClellan is now the first black woman to represent the Commonwealth in Congress, and is ready to be a key voice in Washington. Now, we are focused on keeping Congresswoman-elect McClellan’s former Senate seat blue by electing Delegate Lamont Bagby. Donald J. Trump March 2nd, 2023
President Trump’s speech and statements on January 6, 2021, repeatedly called for peace, patriotism, and respect for our men and women of law enforcement. President Trump authorized up to 20,000 National Guard troops to ensure peace and safety on January 6, 2021, only to have that offer rejected by Democrats Nancy Pelosi and Washington, D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser. The D.C. Courts should rule in favor of President Trump in short order and dismiss these frivolous lawsuits.

The Department of Justice has rightfully agreed that presidential immunity is broad and absolute.
