Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump March 2nd, 2023 President Trump’s speech and statements on January 6, 2021, repeatedly called for peace, patriotism, and respect for our men and women of law enforcement. President Trump authorized up to 20,000 National Guard troops to ensure peace and safety on January 6, 2021, only to have that offer rejected by Democrats Nancy Pelosi and Washington, D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser. The D.C. Courts should rule in favor of President Trump in short order and dismiss these frivolous lawsuits. The Department of Justice has rightfully agreed that presidential immunity is broad and absolute. If it were not, Joe Biden would be personally liable for the disasters in Afghanistan, our Southern Border, record drug use causing massive destruction of families and lives, and many other terrible crises that he has caused. Additionally, other Presidents throughout history would be held responsible for catastrophes they potentially may not be responsible for. All witch hunts and hoaxes have to end! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump March 2nd, 2023 President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will deliver remarks on his America First Education Policy in Davenport, Iowa on Monday, March 13, 2023 at 6:15PM CST. Date and Time Monday, March 13, 2023 6:15PM CST Venue Adler Theater 136 E 3rd Street Davenport, IA 52801 Timeline of Events 3:00PM – Doors Open 5:30PM – Program Begins 6:15PM – 45th President of the United States Donald J. Trump Delivers Remarks General Admission Tickets Request General Media Credentials All requests for media credentials must be submitted by Saturday, March 11, 2023, at 12:00PM CST. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump March 2nd, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL – As Joe Biden recently announced his Marxist executive order that seeks to impose racist and woke sexual ideology across the federal government, President Donald J. Trump has pledged to eradicate any attempt to weaken America’s institutions through these harmful and discriminatory “equity” programs. Instead of making decisions based on merit or qualifications, these policies from Biden are enforced based on skin color and sexual identity. . “Biden is weaponizing every tool of government power to push this racism and this Communism and Marxism,” President Trump said. “I will instruct the Department of Justice to make clear that any such discrimination is completely and totally illegal, and to investigate the unlawful domination and discrimination and civil right abuses carried out by the Biden administration.” All staff, offices, and initiatives connected to Biden’s un-American policy will be immediately terminated. President Trump will create a team to review and reverse actions under Biden's “equity” agenda and request Congress to establish a restitution fund for those unjustly discriminated against by these destructive policies. PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL REVERSE BIDEN’S MARXIST EXECUTIVE ORDER “Every institution in America is under attack from this Marxist concept of ‘equity.’... I will get this extremism out of the White House, out of the military, out of the Justice Department, and out of our government.” -- President Donald J. Trump, March 2, 2023 RESTORING THE AMERICAN PROMISE OF EQUAL PROTECTION UNDER LAW: President Trump will eliminate all race and sex-based discrimination throughout the federal government. On day one, President Trump will revoke Biden’s Marxist DEI executive order, and reinstate the Trump 2020 banning stereotyping based on race and sex in the federal government. President Trump will instruct the Department of Justice to make clear that any such discrimination by the U.S. government is illegal. The Trump administration will investigate the unlawful discrimination and civil rights abuses carried out by the Biden administration. President Trump will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement Biden’s policy and eliminate all related offices and initiatives. President Trump will create a special team to rapidly review every action taken by federal agencies under Biden’s “equity” agenda that will need to be reversed. President Trump will ask Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these “equity” policies, and he will restore a merit-based federal civil service. A WOKE TAKEOVER OF THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT: Joe Biden recently signed executive order is designed to embed Marxist ideology in every part of the federal government. Biden’s order requires that nearly every federal department and agency establish an “equity” enforcement squad to implement a woke takeover of the entire federal government. The Marxist concept of “equity” involves the sinister practice of awarding jobs and benefits and enforcing government programs based on skin color or sexual identity rather than on merit and need. Biden’s order weaponizes every tool of government power to push this Marxism and Communism. Under Biden’s order, within 30 days, over 20 agencies including the Treasury, the Department of Justice, Department of Health and Human Services, and the Department of Defense will be to implement an “Agency Equity Team.” These teams will be tasked with infusing radical left-wing concepts and training throughout the federal workforce as well as submitting annual equity plans to a new White House Steering Committee on Equity. A member of Biden’s administration recently that the goal is to put the concept of equity “at the center of how this government operates.” Biden’s order re-establishes discrimination in America’s federal programs and forces the creation of an insidious system that discriminates based on race and sex. BIDEN’S DISCRIMINATORY AGENDA: The Biden administration has a long history of abandoning the principles of equal treatment for all Americans and pursuing discriminatory and Marxist policies instead. From day one, Biden has made it his mission to infuse radical policies into the federal government. Biden abolished President Trump’s 1776 Commission and quickly rolled out an education agenda that encourages teaching American children to erase the Declaration of Independence and its timeless truth that “all men are created equal.” Last year, the Biden administration 25 “equity action plans” that effectively call for allocating government resources based on an individual's race or identity rather than need. Multiple judges have found that the Biden administration has engaged in unconstitutional discrimination under the guise of “equity.” The Biden administration to grant loan forgiveness to certain groups of farmers while excluding others before the program was blocked by a federal judge. Another federal judge that the Biden administration was engaging in race based discrimination in the allocation of COVID relief to restaurant owners. The Biden administration and Democrats have also used “equity” as a catch-all term to justify each one of their radical policies, from the Green New Deal to defunding the police. TRANSCRIPT Joe Biden recently signed a very sinister executive order mandating that almost every federal department and agency establish a Marxist “equity”—this is something new—enforcement squad to implement a woke takeover of the entire federal government. Every institution in America is under attack from this Marxist concept of “equity.” Instead of treating everyone equally, making decisions based on merit or qualifications, “equity” means that benefits are awarded and policies are enforced based on skin color and sexual identity. We don’t think that’s a good idea. It’s a catch-all term used by the Radical Left to justify every one of its crazy programs. Climate change is now about fighting “environmental racism”. They falsely accuse law enforcement of racism to explain why they must end cash bail instead of busting up bloodthirsty gangs that kill people all over our cities. With his action, Biden is weaponizing every tool of government power to push this racism and this Communism and Marxism, or whatever you want to call it. When FEMA, the EPA, and the FAA, and IRS are corrupted and tasked with enforcing “equity,” freedom and equality under the law are absolutely DEAD. I will revoke this executive order on my first day back in office. I will look forward to it. The Oval Office is a wonderful place, but also a wonderful place to stop things that are very bad for our country from happening. I will instruct the Department of Justice to make clear that any such discrimination is completely and totally illegal, and to investigate the unlawful domination and discrimination and civil right abuses carried out by the Biden administration. I will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement this policy, and eliminate all offices and initiatives connected to it. We will not allow it to happen. I will create a special team to rapidly review every action taken by federal agencies under Biden’s “equity” agenda that will need to be reversed. We will reverse almost all of them. Maybe, in fact, all of them. I will also urge Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these “equity” policies, and I will restore a merit-based federal civil service. I will get this extremism out of the White House, out of the military, out of the Justice Department, and out of our government. We don’t want it in our country. The United States of America will be strong again. Thank you very much. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week.
**** In honor of Women's History Month, the Indiana Democratic Party issued [a statement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608247/394637293/792999365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) to recognize and celebrate the contributions of women throughout history. IDP Vice Chair Myla Eldridge emphasized the importance of fighting for the rights and opportunities of women across Indiana and beyond. She acknowledged the challenges that women face in various aspects of society, particularly in politics. She also highlighted the significance of collective voices and actions in breaking down barriers and ensuring that all women have a seat – and a voice – at the table. Moreover, Vice Chair Eldridge recognized the newly formed [Women's Caucus](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608248/394637294/1093178685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) of the Indiana Democratic Party, which aims to promote gender equality and empower Hoosier women. The caucus was formally designated by the Democratic State Central Committee at the end of last year, reflecting the party's commitment to supporting and uplifting women in the state. We are excited to see the continued growth of our party and the progress being made towards achieving gender equity in Indiana. See INDems’ statement by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608249/394637295/792999365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535).
******Democrats Lead the Charge on Capping Insulin Costs** Eli Lilly, an Indianapolis-based pharmaceutical company, has announced that it will cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month. This move comes after the implementation of the Inflation Reduction Act, which was passed by Democrats in Congress. The legislation included an insulin cap provision for seniors on Medicare. More than 600,000 Hoosiers will be able to get lower prices on their medications as a direct result of this legislation – passed by Democrats.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608250/394637296/914607678?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)****[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608251/394637297/914607678?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** Indiana Democrats believe that access to affordable healthcare is a fundamental right for all Hoosiers, and this announcement is a testament to the leadership of President Biden and Democrats in Congress. The party urges other pharmaceutical companies to follow suit and prioritize the health and well-being of the American people by working towards providing affordable healthcare for all. See INDems’ release by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608252/394637298/-1529778909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535). **** INDems Reaffirm Support for Organized Labor, Denounce GOP's Attacks on Workers' Rights This week, INDems reiterated its strong support for organized labor and condemned the Republican supermajority's attempts to weaken the rights of Indiana workers. The GOP's so-called “right to work” legislation in 2012 has led to a decline in the state's workforce and the loss of many good jobs. ******[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608253/394637299/1188973256?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** The passage of [HB 1024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608254/394637300/-1872784558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) by the Indiana House, which aims to undermine the use of project labor agreements for public works projects and limit bids to contractors with union workers, is just one example of the GOP's attacks on union workers. In contrast, Democrats at the national level prioritize the needs of working families and organized labor. In summary, Indiana Democrats value organized labor and the Hoosier worker, while the GOP's attacks on workers have diminished the state's economic future. See INDems’ full release by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608255/394637301/796966151?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535). **** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. ******[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608256/394637302/-1707385007?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** State Representative Mike Andrade passed a bill out of the Indiana House that authorizes agencies to accept donations of Stop The Bleed kits, or money to purchase the kits, and sets up guidelines for public safety personnel to obtain them. Rep. Andrade said the following after its passage, “Being a law enforcement officer is dangerous enough without having the tools you need to take care of life-threatening injuries before help arrives.” **[HB 1396](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59608257/394637303/117596949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxY2MwNi1mY2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEL5D8eQ7XI5DaiWox8WaIspPwxEB-pI9lSVfK_nDzA=&emci=3b2918d3-f0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1141cc06-fcb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) now heads to the Indiana Senate to be considered.** clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** In honor of Women's History Month, the Indiana Democratic Party issued to recognize and celebrate the contributions of women throughout history. IDP Vice Chair Myla Eldridge emphasized the importance of fighting for the rights and opportunities of women across Indiana and beyond. She acknowledged the challenges that women face in various aspects of society, particularly in politics. She also highlighted the significance of collective voices and actions in breaking down barriers and ensuring that all women have a seat – and a voice – at the table. Moreover, Vice Chair Eldridge recognized the newly formed of the Indiana Democratic Party, which aims to promote gender equality and empower Hoosier women. The caucus was formally designated by the Democratic State Central Committee at the end of last year, reflecting the party's commitment to supporting and uplifting women in the state. We are excited to see the continued growth of our party and the progress being made towards achieving gender equity in Indiana. See INDems’ statement by . **Democrats Lead the Charge on Capping Insulin Costs Eli Lilly, an Indianapolis-based pharmaceutical company, has announced that it will cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month. This move comes after the implementation of the Inflation Reduction Act, which was passed by Democrats in Congress. The legislation included an insulin cap provision for seniors on Medicare. More than 600,000 Hoosiers will be able to get lower prices on their medications as a direct result of this legislation – passed by Democrats. Indiana Democrats believe that access to affordable healthcare is a fundamental right for all Hoosiers, and this announcement is a testament to the leadership of President Biden and Democrats in Congress. The party urges other pharmaceutical companies to follow suit and prioritize the health and well-being of the American people by working towards providing affordable healthcare for all. See INDems’ release by . ** INDems Reaffirm Support for Organized Labor, Denounce GOP's Attacks on Workers' Rights This week, INDems reiterated its strong support for organized labor and condemned the Republican supermajority's attempts to weaken the rights of Indiana workers. The GOP's so-called “right to work” legislation in 2012 has led to a decline in the state's workforce and the loss of many good jobs. ** The passage of by the Indiana House, which aims to undermine the use of project labor agreements for public works projects and limit bids to contractors with union workers, is just one example of the GOP's attacks on union workers. In contrast, Democrats at the national level prioritize the needs of working families and organized labor. In summary, Indiana Democrats value organized labor and the Hoosier worker, while the GOP's attacks on workers have diminished the state's economic future. See INDems’ full release by . ** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. ** State Representative Mike Andrade passed a bill out of the Indiana House that authorizes agencies to accept donations of Stop The Bleed kits, or money to purchase the kits, and sets up guidelines for public safety personnel to obtain them. Rep. Andrade said the following after its passage, “Being a law enforcement officer is dangerous enough without having the tools you need to take care of life-threatening injuries before help arrives.” now heads to the Indiana Senate to be considered. **** Marion County is MARCHing to the Polls ** Join the Marion County Democratic Party as they seek to engage with the community and understand better how to increase voter turnout. They will make their way through all of the Marion County townships, and you can come and share your own voting experiences with local leaders. Visit the link below to find more details for the "MARCHing to the Polls" event starting in Perry and Decatur Township next week on the evening of March 8th. 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! ** INDems IN the News : Indiana senators not so keen on "school choice" voucher expansion in House-proposed budget Herald Bulletin: Indiana Captial Chronicle: IndyStar: Tri-State News: Indiana Public Media: Indiana Capital Chronicle: Fox59: Indiana Capital Chronicle: IndyStar: Princeton Daily Clarion: IndyStar: Opportunities with INDems To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. Thank you. [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Raja is the hardest working person I know.

He went after companies for targeting e-cigarette campaigns at young kids like ours.
And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father.

I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The PRO Act is back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Did you know that just last year, **unions hit their highest approval among Americans since 1965?** Something important is happening here -- a labor movement that won’t take no for an answer.
Without labor unions, we wouldn't have the weekend, overtime pay, workplace safety rules, and laws protecting against child labor exploitation -- **_and that’s just scratching the surface._** Unions have helped secure every major labor law we have in America, and this is just the beginning.
**Now, with the reintroduction of the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, we’re so close to passing major, transformational protections for workers.** And we won’t stop until it’s law.
History has proven over and over again the power of organized labor. That’s why **I promise you I will never stop fighting for a better life for us all -- but I need your help to convince my colleagues to pass the PRO Act immediately.**
[**Can you sign right now to demand Congress pass the PRO Act NOW and show your support for workers across America?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230303-PRO-Act-Petition/20230303-2233?t=1&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)
**[Add Your Name >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230303-PRO-Act-Petition/20230303-2233?t=2&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)**
**We must ensure Congress passes the PRO Act to protect working people across America.** The PRO Act will empower workers to unionize, and bargain for better wages and working conditions, hold corporations accountable for union-busting, and repeal so-called “right to work” laws.
I was proud to be an original lead sponsor of the PRO Act in the House, where we passed it in 2021. Now we have the chance to pass it again, and I won’t stop fighting until this bill reaches President Biden’s desk.
The fearmongers will try to tell us we’re too radical, that our demands are impossible, that they come at too high a cost, that they hurt small businesses, that people will lose jobs. **We only need to look at my hometown Seattle to prove them wrong -- union jobs and protections help us all.**
[**Will you join me and call on Congress to prioritize the PRO Act right away so we can finally secure the biggest labor protections in decades?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230303-PRO-Act-Petition/20230303-2233?t=3&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)
**[Sign the Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230303-PRO-Act-Petition/20230303-2233?t=4&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230303-2233-footer&t=5&refcode2=2233_420207_eNcMc9&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2233%2E420207%2EeNcMc9)

| This week, Hillary took to the House floor to bring attention to the appalling practice of migrant child labor in the United States.

A recent New York Times exposé revealed that migrant children, some as young as 12, are working long shifts using dangerous machinery at job sites across the country to sew clothes, package our food and build our homes. These children are some of the most vulnerable among us, and Hillary is standing up to call on Congress to take action now.

**The New York Times recognized Hillary’s efforts in a recent article about the Biden administration’s plans to crack down on the serious issue.**

clean_body: This week, Hillary took to the House floor to bring attention to the appalling practice of migrant child labor in the United States. | = | This week, Hillary took to the House floor to bring attention to the appalling practice of migrant child labor in the United States. A recent New York Times exposé revealed that migrant children, some as young as 12, are working long shifts using dangerous machinery at job sites across the country to sew clothes, package our food and build our homes. These children are some of the most vulnerable among us, and Hillary is standing up to call on Congress to take action now. The New York Times recognized Hillary’s efforts in a recent article about the Biden administration’s plans to crack down on the serious issue. | | We hope you’ll take a moment to read the article and share it with your networks to raise awareness about this important issue. Thank you! Team Scholten | = * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Team Fetterman
subject: Even when it seems difficult
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
We were proud to say that The Council for a Livable World endorsed John in the 2022 election cycle. Their endorsement was important to us, so we want to take this opportunity to tell you about their mission and current work.
**The Council’s chief goal is to reduce — and eventually eliminate — the threat posed by nuclear weapons.** In pursuit of that goal, the Council helps elect candidates who support their mission and then supports those members once in Congress. This includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control and common-sense defense spending in order to create a more livable world.
Right now, they’re calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements in the future. The war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too clear. In this context, continuing negotiations with other nuclear-armed states is essential, even when it seems difficult.
**[Would you consider splitting a donation between the Council for a Livable World and Team Fetterman to show your support for continued efforts to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230303-1?refcode=em20230303-1-8273&refcode2=8273_434096_stsVcX&akid=8273%2E434096%2EstsVcX)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230303-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230303-8273&refcode2=8273_434096_stsVcX&akid=8273%2E434096%2EstsVcX)**
The Council raised almost $1 million for 38 endorsed candidates this cycle. They will support newly elected candidates in the 118th Congress to advance these policy goals.
Organizations that combine strategic election interventions with a thoughtful approach and important insight are key to making an impact in the Washington policy conversation.
**[If you can today, chip in to help power their important work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230303-1?refcode=em20230303-1-8273&refcode2=8273_434096_stsVcX&akid=8273%2E434096%2EstsVcX)**
Thank you!
— Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230303-8273-footer&t=1&refcode2=8273_434096_stsVcX&akid=8273%2E434096%2EstsVcX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We “woke” up from the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I'm a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd0djLyd5g8CfmgB21xMvKNp5topmByEuOhYxF5h1S-DDxtN-fAk88McthhVrA8VeLM2KRSxI1X722MexfL2vlhsLbqgO7lse53Wx9ERAqMZ7q1k287VrJ5agR6ZBJgJa-20lHVXMxTrs82xFAUJZdDXg%3D%3D)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd01bkKwYSrhsMtBXR2ue5Kvu1JztMXYwtizW6IWQ9Ry8enLTy0AtYR2XbX5NG3HTYPlvS6l9HcB2sNBpoLzGZQMNW09LwSURgQalYU2lrCtIRp4CDdfBVgFjB4IzVROMaLFRcpPpdihxhGKvX47cPPOQ%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd0kavnGFlkkPTrKuFws545YPcjKRY3ENeX5hVt4zLUiNujQnrrjd3btOqN_oa5ip_IzAESPFLbWtXzFKbqS5TGyUCk54T_QHfAx0AXio5icxMdnVDy0qj9PVkhcPoY7mDfReBFqqFZgtiOjeAvGi2VHA%3D%3D)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd0GDQaIf6v-DO7M2SR42L4bfd8YVbwtoSnj_Btw4RK2jq6SOFDUBUKNCENmYRyogPgFsvfx1PU99MmVE1x82UzLFYZs9TrmPjl33d-cjTgAtGYms1pNsesxYHQvSVwTxinye7CnshpWLFT4MEVQp2uug%3D%3D)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd0DFSxFVLedj7bgvrh6LrS6UIgFChGzbu-YgEWVbefo8-F6sxu1mXVDkPH5NPd9tKQdmgugX70h96-hcmZ343zrF_0UDfW_teHYiZ2ic8a_TQiPawKI3cUqz4mfD4Qd3P9MyiSeaMjb2jgb-YvRa9bKA%3D%3D)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd02aWIPRfoQdUAtZ0Sq2V5BBznr7T4adbZ1NEpooGlqwcwtRPmnWxirHBBu8RP7cXrVns66dGPWB7i-oyC-4VlXoMAW-KZnV0REmhmws677O32i7JXjVkHSThhDWeuogPnx5UZFQbHYnh51AIFG781_Q%3D%3D)**

For The American Dream,
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd0r6LWARGsu6fpX4dGHU_wtzYaz_Z01R0IqcwcoYU1m7DgAssARAeJJL1uezoTtScgKMrlf0wcelahFdLpBkgqDtREcy3Xgu7J2r6PNk4prPGJALte7m7D2Y2y5JslTdGVMqji20vBzWQUUnQonNZuwQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1c69d0eeb7412dbb213c7bbffa9f2f&_e=2k2lqij3UoqUttanf5QMENjqsDLjW5-A2ic7b0ImpZJGyRw6DQ2yN6WAAJ5QdQ4cyguWw-YoWt9c03JQX2P58XpUHOMo3v_puZ4d8Vb6NFPxr7YPwDaADxuUSgfrKWpUtDHfB1QCg9Gxidvi54qhNtdKSMRD1y_QXxdEYVagNrVULLLGvmzLqiu8B_oTzG4YEUutIxmKIiBBfiTnlIgEnSQRwb0VYoI24ykkCEoXcNCTLid5y_iPwqjDLSIl2yd0pOC-lI0O_ucjjvqlG3aVJEXKv4WkEQxXxl6qraI4PtaIIMVrpgAQd0bFjLwtMiFmmVq-IpASyg6AgByRR-vLugt-wyAQmiKwqypxCJ097kwaXO9mP0BHd3VoHrRpLYwo-UijquPksG7SoBqH1thsPg%3D%3D)

body:
“This year’s elections determine how Pa. runs 2024”

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59615931/394645584/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230303PIelectionofficials_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNDhkNWExLTAwYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h7EehhDmGQQ0hiC-bVTV4K1bKT2yXxjYeP7muSdKuAw=)
| Fellow activist, did you see this? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59615932/394645585/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230303PIelectionofficials_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_B_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNDhkNWExLTAwYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h7EehhDmGQQ0hiC-bVTV4K1bKT2yXxjYeP7muSdKuAw=) This year’s elections will be **crucial** for the future of our democracy. Remember, _local officials_ , not the state, have an upper hand when it comes to elections, up to and including the very certification of results.

In times past, this sacred duty was handled with care and grace. Not anymore, as we saw in both 2020 and 2022, when election deniers flagrantly ignored the law and tried to hold up or completely reject election certification.

**[Fellow activist, we have the power to stop that from happening again in 2024 by expanding the electorate, getting out the vote, and electing pro-democracy election officials in 2023. Could you give $10 today to help us continue to defend our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59615933/394645586/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230303PIelectionofficials_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNDhkNWExLTAwYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h7EehhDmGQQ0hiC-bVTV4K1bKT2yXxjYeP7muSdKuAw=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59615934/394645587/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230303PIelectionofficials_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNDhkNWExLTAwYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h7EehhDmGQQ0hiC-bVTV4K1bKT2yXxjYeP7muSdKuAw=) A few bad local officials have the potential to create a lot of problems locally, statewide, and even nationally. **Local officials in Pennsylvania have attempted to stop election certification in the past, and it is up to us to prevent this from happening again.**

Election certification is not even the only way bad actors can abuse their power to sabotage our elections. There are more insidious threats with even less accountability, such as giving far-right operatives unauthorized access to election offices and voting machines, and even the passwords to election software.

The term “off-year” is misleading because every single election – whether it be federal, state, or local – has real power to change our lives and communities.

We have municipal, judicial, and local primary elections coming up in May, and it is essential that we get people to the polls. We had incredible turnout for the special elections just last month, and, with your help, we can achieve an even higher turnout this May! **[Fellow activist, we have a lot of voters to connect with between now and May 16th, so we need your support to keep our efforts strong throughout the year. Will you donate $10 right now to help us continue transforming and expanding the Commonwealth’s electorate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59615935/394645588/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230303PIelectionofficials_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_B_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNDhkNWExLTAwYmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h7EehhDmGQQ0hiC-bVTV4K1bKT2yXxjYeP7muSdKuAw=)** clean_body: “This year’s elections determine how Pa. runs 2024” = | Fellow activist, did you see this? = This year’s elections will be crucial for the future of our democracy. Remember, local officials , not the state, have an upper hand when it comes to elections, up to and including the very certification of results. In times past, this sacred duty was handled with care and grace. Not anymore, as we saw in both 2020 and 2022, when election deniers flagrantly ignored the law and tried to hold up or completely reject election certification. = = A few bad local officials have the potential to create a lot of problems locally, statewide, and even nationally. Local officials in Pennsylvania have attempted to stop election certification in the past, and it is up to us to prevent this from happening again. Election certification is not even the only way bad actors can abuse their power to sabotage our elections. There are more insidious threats with even less accountability, such as giving far-right operatives unauthorized access to election offices and voting machines, and even the passwords to election software. The term “off-year” is misleading because every single election – whether it be federal, state, or local – has real power to change our lives and communities. We have municipal, judicial, and local primary elections coming up in May, and it is essential that we get people to the polls. We had incredible turnout for the special elections just last month, and, with your help, we can achieve an even higher turnout this May! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. name: Betsy
subject: This is powerful.
body:
There is still work to be done.
| |
---
| | |
Hey Team - it's Betsy, Nikki Haley's campaign manager. It's been a little over two weeks since Nikki launched her presidential campaign, so I wanted to take a moment to give you some insight on what we've seen on the ground so far.

**FIRST:** **THOUSANDS** of people showed up at her launch in historic Charleston, SC.

**THEN:** Nikki hit the road to New Hampshire & Iowa. Her events were **PACKED** with standing room only.

**NOW:** The momentum we are feeling on the ground has made it clear that Americans are ready for a new generation of leadership to fight Joe Biden's socialism and national self-loathing.
**[Take a look a look for yourself:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389976:6_jiyJGfN:m:1:3365131770:5A0F99B2E985E73601C8C9BB60987C83:r "Take a look a look for yourself:")**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389976:6_jiyJGfN:m:1:3365131770:5A0F99B2E985E73601C8C9BB60987C83:r)
---

Nikki will be traveling across the country until her message reaches **ALL** Americans.

_**BUT, in order to do that, we need the continued support from grassroots patriots like you. **_

**[Can you please chip in any amount to help keep powering our campaign and sharing Nikki's vision?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389976:6_jiyJGfN:m:1:3365131770:5A0F99B2E985E73601C8C9BB60987C83:r "Can you please chip in just $5, $10, $15 or any amount to help keep powering our campaign and
sharing Nikki’s vision?")**

Let's save America together, Peter!

Thank you,

Betsy
Campaign Manager
Nikki Haley for President

---
| | | | |
* * *
**GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH**
A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. **[Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389975:6_jiyJGfN:m:1:3365131770:5A0F99B2E985E73601C8C9BB60987C83:r "Contribute now
to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >>")**

**JOIN NIKKI 'S TEAM**
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389974:6_jiyJGfN:m:1:3365131770:5A0F99B2E985E73601C8C9BB60987C83:r "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

**[In order to build momentum and get Nikki's message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki's team and pitch in a donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62389974:6_jiyJGfN:m:1:3365131770:5A0F99B2E985E73601C8C9BB60987C83:r "In order to
build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? ")**

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

P.S. If you don't have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Standing with the folks impacted by the East Palestine train derailment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Earlier this week, I joined forces with Representative Ro Khanna to introduce the Decreasing Emergency Railroad Accident Instances Locally (DERAIL) Act.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59618710/394647612/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_CD_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjdmNjViMy0wMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNOc3D4ZDvNe9Z-n-8B3DDjWZLUBy3L7FgCOo7vLcXM=) Dear Derek,

Earlier this week, I joined forces with Representative Ro Khanna to introduce the **Decreasing Emergency Railroad Accident Instances Locally (DERAIL) Act**. This is a direct response to the Norfolk Southern train derailment that is impacting PA-17 residents and folks all across western Pennsylvania.

Over the past few weeks, I’ve been on the ground, hearing from PA-17 families about their concerns around their health and livelihoods. I’ve heard their fears over the safety of the air, water, and soil. **And most of all, I’ve heard their calls for accountability.**

For far too long, railroads have prioritized profit over public safety and the safety of their workers, and common-sense regulations have fallen by the wayside. **The DERAIL Act will improve rail safety by ensuring trains carrying hazardous materials are properly certified, and forcing rail companies to take increased safety precautions. When big corporations like Norfolk Southern harm our communities, I will always take them on head first.**

**_Derek, this legislation is a promise kept._** When you sent me to Congress, I vowed to fight for our common good, to put working folks first, and to never back down from a fight. But I currently represent one of the most competitive districts in Congress, and radical Republicans and their dark money groups will once again do whatever it takes to try to defeat me in 2024.

[**Representing my home community in Washington is the honor of a lifetime, so I hope you’ll take a moment to chip in to my campaign to help us continue fighting for hard working folks in western Pennsylvania.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59618713/394647613/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_CD_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjdmNjViMy0wMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNOc3D4ZDvNe9Z-n-8B3DDjWZLUBy3L7FgCOo7vLcXM=)

In solidarity,

Chris __ | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. [Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59618717/394647614/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_CD_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjdmNjViMy0wMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNOc3D4ZDvNe9Z-n-8B3DDjWZLUBy3L7FgCOo7vLcXM=)
---
| [Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59618719/394647615/-1050199461?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.03_b1_CD_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjdmNjViMy0wMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNOc3D4ZDvNe9Z-n-8B3DDjWZLUBy3L7FgCOo7vLcXM=)

clean_body: Earlier this week, I joined forces with Representative Ro Khanna to introduce the Decreasing Emergency Railroad Accident Instances Locally (DERAIL) Act. | = Dear Derek, Earlier this week, I joined forces with Representative Ro Khanna to introduce the Decreasing Emergency Railroad Accident Instances Locally (DERAIL) Act. This is a direct response to the Norfolk Southern train derailment that is impacting PA-17 residents and folks all across western Pennsylvania. Over the past few weeks, I’ve been on the ground, hearing from PA-17 families about their concerns around their health and livelihoods. I’ve heard their fears over the safety of the air, water, and soil. And most of all, I’ve heard their calls for accountability. For far too long, railroads have prioritized profit over public safety and the safety of their workers, and common-sense regulations have fallen by the wayside. The DERAIL Act will improve rail safety by ensuring trains carrying hazardous materials are properly certified, and forcing rail companies to take increased safety precautions. When big corporations like Norfolk Southern harm our communities, I will always take them on head first. Derek, this legislation is a promise kept. When you sent me to Congress, I vowed to fight for our common good, to put working folks first, and to never back down from a fight. But I currently represent one of the most competitive districts in Congress, and radical Republicans and their dark money groups will once again do whatever it takes to try to defeat me in 2024. = In solidarity, Chris | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Thank you for your continued support of this movement and this team.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59631290/394701490/-259645194?utm_campaign=email_030323_pledge&source=email_030323_pledge&refcode=email_030323_pledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg5NTEzNi0yZGJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNNbcHKsMo8nT4DxeTiopCz4EW2nSfbXL5mEZsAFVyI=&emci=ccfb7a1b-05ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6a895136-2dba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291) Derek, thank you.

Thank you for your continued support of this movement and this team.

When we won this race last year, we sent a clear message.

In Pennsylvania, hope is stronger than fear.

Unity is stronger than division.

We value our freedoms and our fundamental rights over partisan ideology.

Those are the principles that guide me every single day as Governor. That’s why in less than two months, we’ve been able to stand up for workers, protect the right to choose, and open up the doors of opportunity across Pennsylvania.

**But our work is far from done, especially with far-right extremists trying to rip away abortion rights, raise the cost of health care, and attack our fundamental rights.**

Derek, we have some tough fights ahead, and I hope I can count on you to continue to stand with me and this team. Sign your name now to keep up the fight for real freedom for everyone in Pennsylvania. | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59631291/394701491/-259645194?utm_campaign=email_030323_pledge&source=email_030323_pledge&refcode=email_030323_pledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg5NTEzNi0yZGJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNNbcHKsMo8nT4DxeTiopCz4EW2nSfbXL5mEZsAFVyI=&emci=ccfb7a1b-05ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6a895136-2dba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)

clean_body: Thank you for your continued support of this movement and this team. Derek, thank you. Thank you for your continued support of this movement and this team. When we won this race last year, we sent a clear message. In Pennsylvania, hope is stronger than fear. Unity is stronger than division. We value our freedoms and our fundamental rights over partisan ideology. Those are the principles that guide me every single day as Governor. That’s why in less than two months, we’ve been able to stand up for workers, protect the right to choose, and open up the doors of opportunity across Pennsylvania. But our work is far from done, especially with far-right extremists trying to rip away abortion rights, raise the cost of health care, and attack our fundamental rights. Derek, we have some tough fights ahead, and I hope I can count on you to continue to stand with me and this team. name: Katie Porter
subject: Snow in Huntington Beach 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A longer message about the environment.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18725%2E3422442%2Ec7bi19)
Derek,
Snow in parts of Orange County is just the latest reminder of how urgently we need to address the climate crisis.
Look, I carry a reusable straw in my purse and recycle my Diet Dr. Pepper cans. But we all know that to really address climate change we need to **hold corporations accountable** and make bold investments in clean energy.
The other week, I visited Southeast LA cities which have been some of the most harmed by decades of pollution. Folks there told me they **need a Senator who will stand up to the corporations who have planted pollution in their communities,** assuming they don't have the political power to stop it.
**I’ve spent my career standing up to special interests deemed too powerful to take on.** On the first of this year, my bill to raise rates on polluters who drill on our public lands finally took effect—but this is just the beginning.
**In the Senate, I’ll fight to build on the legislation we passed last year** : investing in clean energy, protecting our natural resources, and requiring these ultra-profitable corporations to literally clean up their own mess.
Whether it’s the record drought, devastating wildfires, or flooding, we’re living with the real consequences of Big Oil and other polluters’ greed.
**[Derek, I need your help. Can you make a $5 donation to my Senate campaign today so that my whiteboard and I can take on big polluters?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230303-1?source=em20230303-1&refcode2=18725_3422442_c7bi19&akid=18725%2E3422442%2Ec7bi19)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230303-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF03_1_POL_20230303_V1_F&refcode2=18725_3422442_c7bi19&akid=18725%2E3422442%2Ec7bi19)**
Thanks a ton,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF03_1_POL_20230303_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18725_3422442_c7bi19&akid=18725%2E3422442%2Ec7bi19)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=18725%2E3422442%2Ec7bi19)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=18725%2E3422442%2Ec7bi19)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Team Schrier
subject: Have you heard about the abortion pill lawsuit?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
"The most consequential legal ruling since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade" | Texas judge to rule on abortion pill used by millions of Americans

"A federal judge in Texas is set to rule on a lawsuit that seeks to restrict access to one of the two drugs typically used to induce a medicated abortion. The decision could impact 40 million women nationwide, making it the most consequential legal ruling since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade."
---
Peter,

A federal judge in Texas is set to make a ruling any day that could dramatically affect women's access to abortion care nationwide.

A lawsuit has been brought by anti-choice extremists challenging the FDA approval of a safe and effective abortion pill – mifepristone. If this Trump-appointed judge rules in their favor, the supply of this safe medication will be halted in _all_ states – including Washington.

With the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ last year, abortion pills have been instrumental in helping women receive the care they need – even in states where abortions are outlawed or restricted. This lawsuit could make accessing abortion care even more difficult for women in every state.

As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim knows that deeply personal health care decisions should be between a patient and her doctor, only. That's why she's fighting back against extremist attacks on abortion care. Are you with her?

**[Add your name now to stand with Kim in the fight to protect abortion access for all Americans →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59623767/394650858/-884616767?ms=em23_230303_pill_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230303_pill_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230303_pill_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230303_pill_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ihm01p++aD64M8VpXACXuKRFIV0Hj+ZVuWSxq9Y/WEQb1jtt3sliON5T9ynRbO0Eu6fC0/eOM4rUgePzwoaxWk83RMJhrF7gHEAeJwjK+yhCTuqVVhXjyBQ/d9VKSMjDio9arniXisQePEnzf3x/4n5pSck4adwdRioKKKY4giM=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGZhMWI1Yy0wNmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJSAwdK_OGFm-oI09wXsOq2oABtTi_uAss1i5oKXNHA=&emci=631054bc-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=20fa1b5c-06ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)**

clean_body: "The most consequential legal ruling since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade" | Texas judge to rule on abortion pill used by millions of Americans "A federal judge in Texas is set to rule on a lawsuit that seeks to restrict access to one of the two drugs typically used to induce a medicated abortion. The decision could impact 40 million women nationwide, making it the most consequential legal ruling since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade." Peter, A federal judge in Texas is set to make a ruling any day that could dramatically affect women's access to abortion care nationwide. A lawsuit has been brought by anti-choice extremists challenging the FDA approval of a safe and effective abortion pill – mifepristone. If this Trump-appointed judge rules in their favor, the supply of this safe medication will be halted in all states – including Washington. With the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade last year, abortion pills have been instrumental in helping women receive the care they need – even in states where abortions are outlawed or restricted. This lawsuit could make accessing abortion care even more difficult for women in every state. As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim knows that deeply personal health care decisions should be between a patient and her doctor, only. That's why she's fighting back against extremist attacks on abortion care. Are you with her? Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Folks, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: **I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. **

I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet.
**[If you’re with me, please split a donation between American Bridge PAC and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59624953/394653232/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2327-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2YmQwNTEzLTA3YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T42z4vMDuy_EvJD9ENHKmtJiFJ9LyKcmWG5Qj7L3lTI=)**
| | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59624954/394653233/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2327-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2YmQwNTEzLTA3YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T42z4vMDuy_EvJD9ENHKmtJiFJ9LyKcmWG5Qj7L3lTI=)
---
I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate – they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 – and I’ll do it again.**
**[I can’t do it without your support, team. Can I count on you to step up and split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to become a Founding Donor so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59624955/394653234/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2327-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2YmQwNTEzLTA3YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T42z4vMDuy_EvJD9ENHKmtJiFJ9LyKcmWG5Qj7L3lTI=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59624956/394653235/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2327-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2YmQwNTEzLTA3YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T42z4vMDuy_EvJD9ENHKmtJiFJ9LyKcmWG5Qj7L3lTI=)

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. **

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,
Jon

clean_body: | | | = Folks, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. = | | = I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago. They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running. It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate – they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 – and I’ll do it again. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. Thanks, Jon | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

Derek -- we’re coming to you today with an exciting new opportunity to get your support for Democrats memorialized here in DNC HQ. This month, we’re covering our walls with the names of grassroots donors who help power the hefty investments in organizing, voter protection, state-of-the-art data and technology, and so much more that is needed to elect Democrats nationwide. This new Official Democratic Grassroots Donor Wall will be a constant reminder of what -- _and who_ \-- we’re fighting for. Every sticker will have the name of a member of this team who chipped in to help elect Democratic candidates up and down the ballot nationwide -- and we want you to be one of them. name: Jon Tester
subject: my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
My background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59625237/394654366/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230303-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNmRkYzE0LTA4YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QwSNgYli4WycLoAouOUyitGde7qjVFM491D2Fj2Bfzk=)
---
Peter, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.

[_I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59625238/394654367/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230303-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNmRkYzE0LTA4YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QwSNgYli4WycLoAouOUyitGde7qjVFM491D2Fj2Bfzk=)**

clean_body: My background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government. | = Peter, can I tell you a little story about me? I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me. When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor. Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government. With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country. = | = You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country. I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign. Thanks again, Jon * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m asking you to weigh in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing:
[**So please, friend, will you take just a moment now to share your thoughts with me in our new priorities survey? Your unique perspective is critical to helping us defend this seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59625265/394654477/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk7-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJkMDUxMy0wN2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gjJSpcWaRcT7smN3jdOqb2C8Six3Kaihartg4QSE0iI=&emci=b16b44a5-1cb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f1bd0513-07ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
