name: Ben Wikler
subject: MAGA extremist Dan Kelly
body:
Dan Kelly is too extreme for Wisconsin. Full stop. | | |
---
| | It’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and [ I’m personally asking you to chip in a split donation of $10 between Wisconsin Democrats and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee to defeat MAGA Republicanism at the state level and elect Janet Protasiewicz to our state Supreme Court.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJIU3vQLycxEyiqeoRslcQIy7xvOzAVHVeORzmsieVWZrDyLH1n8zGWIjHYL5y-9qjtAvZTeR9GpQ-97fmKZK4vbPQM5S67_9i-tjHM8eC_03WeFkW_Wu_-aos3kjlLDukPxOybfUX3CjhtqBIr-a5TdBxuHFRB1IT-i_NoiknuAJyRDkE3bjbY-CyBLFp9RvseCwr1XnSpdQ2ATYmMnR6N8qepapubSfgyGG2Rd-WIGUhlrE-KQaBOXtJ795AkIgNpbyRM5V6v9nHmza7n59IBHmNR4Uwbt_zNgsh7EwRISDasiAxDEQJwX0tV8t2gbLeiusymq8AVCLNa1WxmwYok7qtv3wDYArWTGEPU1FmIqg/3u6/xO4F8puiTriF9NPWPMYVAQ/h0/bcma1S-0piMP2wkMgRVIjTn_uwuE2P2JM8oUcNNxn5I) Our right-wing opponent Dan Kelly could uphold Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban and our grossly gerrymandered maps if he is elected to the state Supreme Court. _We can’t let that happen._ But here’s the thing: **His billionaire backers are willing to spend MILLIONS of dollars to crush our grassroots campaign** to elect our commonsense candidate Janet Protasiewicz to the court. Look: Reporters keep saying Wisconsin’s state Supreme Court election is expected to top all-time spending records. In an off-year election like this, voter turnout will almost certainly determine this race. **My team needs your support to make sure voters hear our message loud and clear:** [Dan Kelly is too extreme for Wisconsin. Can you rush $10 to the DLCC and the WisDems so we can beat MAGA extremism at the ballot box this April and build Democratic power in the states? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJIU3vQLycxEyiqeoRslcQIy7xvOzAVHVeORzmsieVWZrDyLH1n8zGWIjHYL5y-9qjtAvZTeR9GpQ-97fmKZK4vbPQM5S67_9i-tjHM8eC_03WeFkW_Wu_-aos3kjlLDukPxOybfUX3CjhtqBIr-a5TY3QjqUTC631gAwAZVJG12WrDOPZ5Uus64gj8nj2Y1s2Zk9sk2bYinBtdbyUGy2-le29h7jrIN8k2iOtygWOfckx6hum27qBRmLIg_r6m_6XZhjp1PAEOGFjNv9_WWUJ_UwY_uHqk7PFXyANE-t4KcEGDOks5BI-5YFq5U174Pb0Id-qcWMBRoFkSObqKGRtFZnjEyZc1L6CG3egKk33i9U/3u6/xO4F8puiTriF9NPWPMYVAQ/h1/4yUGGUgGqkGxEJbrx7mbO9Ad6SqQ6fkBlA9MxmDsiRo) Elections in a battleground state always come down to the wire. My team says the last state Supreme Court race came down to **a handful of votes per ward.** We can win this time, but we have to take our work seriously, keep our momentum up, and turn out voters in every corner of the state. [Can my team count on your help in this critical moment? Rush in $10 between the WisDems and the DLCC to help us push across the finish line. I would not ask if it wasn’t crucial we win. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJIU3vQLycxEyiqeoRslcQIy7xvOzAVHVeORzmsieVWZrDyLH1n8zGWIjHYL5y-9qjtAvZTeR9GpQ-97fmKZK4vbPQM5S67_9i-tjHM8eC_03WeFkW_Wu_-aos3kjlLDukPxOybfUX3CjhtqBIr-a5TfBL7zEfkQ4yZ4qslTuT-naAvAds1QpnRV8BzIBI6p6_-yoVxBWZRhU_yEK6NqBI7K_8mTArOPk1Rf5vFVj0UhWWfpK5adpuaHFbVsBAvK79HHQX6CdP_icazUApwvDCIO1xpCoC3ykLfPV60ZhC36dOmQABWQ2tE_gtzJvHnQpia-ForXJtugLALUkm-WFL3x7Jx4sxRuN4qLpNs_mU1k8/3u6/xO4F8puiTriF9NPWPMYVAQ/h2/6TOi9hJGYYfzZKBk1seg5txp6ny150LfLot1261cgKY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Wisconsin Democrats and the DLCC.

clean_body: Dan Kelly is too extreme for Wisconsin. Full stop. | | | | | It’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and Our right-wing opponent Dan Kelly could uphold Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban and our grossly gerrymandered maps if he is elected to the state Supreme Court. We can’t let that happen. But here’s the thing: His billionaire backers are willing to spend MILLIONS of dollars to crush our grassroots campaign to elect our commonsense candidate Janet Protasiewicz to the court. Look: Reporters keep saying Wisconsin’s state Supreme Court election is expected to top all-time spending records. In an off-year election like this, voter turnout will almost certainly determine this race. My team needs your support to make sure voters hear our message loud and clear: Elections in a battleground state always come down to the wire. My team says the last state Supreme Court race came down to a handful of votes per ward. We can win this time, but we have to take our work seriously, keep our momentum up, and turn out voters in every corner of the state. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Wisconsin Democrats and the DLCC. | | | | | Fight on, Ben Wikler | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Across Northwest Washington, thousands of people are going days, or even entire weeks, without the mail being delivered. **This is not about birthday cards and junk mail arriving on time. It is about life-saving medication, veterans' benefits, package delivery, and more — a vital resource for all of us, and a critical lifeline for rural communities.** For years now, Republicans in Congress and special interests have undermined the USPS. During the Bush era, Republicans passed a law requiring USPS to hoard 75 years worth of health care benefits payments – essentially pre-paying health care benefits for mail carriers who were not even born yet. Predictably, that law kept USPS from operating with a full budget and led to a long term decline in services. Last year, Congress finally fixed the issue by passing the bipartisan Postal Service Reform Act. So why are we still seeing reduced service here in Northwest Washington? Because leadership matters. **Postmaster General Louis DeJoy – a Trump appointee – needs to be held accountable.** DeJoy's failure to recruit new workers leaves our communities without carriers, and far too often, without mail. DeJoy's solution? Push folks to pick up mail at the post office. For too many people (especially in rural communities), that means a long drive and even longer lines at the post office. **This is not a solution.** I always work to protect Washingtonians, and that is why **I want answers from Louis DeJoy:** What steps is USPS taking to hire new staff in Northwest Washington? How does USPS prioritize delivery when there are staff shortages? How does USPS communicate with local communities when they cannot deliver mail? _Washington residents deserve answers._ **We must safeguard access to USPS for everyone, no matter where you live**. clean_body: | | | | Across Northwest Washington, thousands of people are going days, or even entire weeks, without the mail being delivered. This is not about birthday cards and junk mail arriving on time. It is about life-saving medication, veterans' benefits, package delivery, and more — a vital resource for all of us, and a critical lifeline for rural communities. For years now, Republicans in Congress and special interests have undermined the USPS. During the Bush era, Republicans passed a law requiring USPS to hoard 75 years worth of health care benefits payments – essentially pre-paying health care benefits for mail carriers who were not even born yet. Predictably, that law kept USPS from operating with a full budget and led to a long term decline in services. Last year, Congress finally fixed the issue by passing the bipartisan Postal Service Reform Act. So why are we still seeing reduced service here in Northwest Washington? Because leadership matters. Postmaster General Louis DeJoy – a Trump appointee – needs to be held accountable. DeJoy's failure to recruit new workers leaves our communities without carriers, and far too often, without mail. DeJoy's solution? Push folks to pick up mail at the post office. For too many people (especially in rural communities), that means a long drive and even longer lines at the post office. This is not a solution. I always work to protect Washingtonians, and that is why I want answers from Louis DeJoy: What steps is USPS taking to hire new staff in Northwest Washington? How does USPS prioritize delivery when there are staff shortages? How does USPS communicate with local communities when they cannot deliver mail? Washington residents deserve answers. We must safeguard access to USPS for everyone, no matter where you live. Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . subject: UPDATE: Join us Tuesday, April 4th at the Chinatown Banquet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59625987/394656736/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDQ5ZDg2Ny0wYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gNgxeqNAd1nVDjD36kv72Kk8FZ32mXxSBPIOmMYsxFE=&emci=c396d8b7-2ab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fd49d867-0bba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370)

| | Peter, In 2018, we made new history for the MassDems by giving fresh energy to a proud tradition. In the 1970s and '80s, Boston's Chinatown was an essential stop on the political circuit, bringing people together to build friendship over a banquet meal in Chinatown. Over the past few years, we’ve rebooted this tradition with the help of attendees from across the state to raise funds, to bring new people into the political process, and to support our coordinated campaign efforts. Get ready for a night of delicious cuisine and cultural celebration as our annual Chinatown banquet returns on **Tuesday, April 4, 2023 at 6:00 pm** , held at the Empire Garden Restaurant (690 Washington Street, Boston, MA). We understand that plans may change, so please take note of our updated event date from our previous notice. But don't worry, if you've already purchased your tickets, they will still be valid for the rescheduled date. We’re grateful to Co-Chairs Mayor Michelle Wu and Chairman Aaron Michlewitz for once again spearheading this initiative to support our party’s organizing efforts. We hope you can join us at the annual MassDems Chinatown Banquet on April 4th for an evening of delicious food, signature drinks, karaoke and conversations with Democrats from across Massachusetts. It will once again be a sold-out affair — we hope to see you there! Tickets are limited, so please get yours today. Individual tickets and sponsorships can be purchased [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59625988/394656737/640743309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDQ5ZDg2Ny0wYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gNgxeqNAd1nVDjD36kv72Kk8FZ32mXxSBPIOmMYsxFE=)**.** I hope you will join us in supporting this incredible effort!
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Gus Bickford
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, In 2018, we made new history for the MassDems by giving fresh energy to a proud tradition. In the 1970s and '80s, Boston's Chinatown was an essential stop on the political circuit, bringing people together to build friendship over a banquet meal in Chinatown. Over the past few years, we’ve rebooted this tradition with the help of attendees from across the state to raise funds, to bring new people into the political process, and to support our coordinated campaign efforts. Get ready for a night of delicious cuisine and cultural celebration as our annual Chinatown banquet returns on Tuesday, April 4, 2023 at 6:00 pm , held at the Empire Garden Restaurant (690 Washington Street, Boston, MA). We understand that plans may change, so please take note of our updated event date from our previous notice. But don't worry, if you've already purchased your tickets, they will still be valid for the rescheduled date. We’re grateful to Co-Chairs Mayor Michelle Wu and Chairman Aaron Michlewitz for once again spearheading this initiative to support our party’s organizing efforts. We hope you can join us at the annual MassDems Chinatown Banquet on April 4th for an evening of delicious food, signature drinks, karaoke and conversations with Democrats from across Massachusetts. It will once again be a sold-out affair — we hope to see you there! Tickets are limited, so please get yours today. Individual tickets and sponsorships can be purchased =. I hope you will join us in supporting this incredible effort! | | Sincerely, Gus Bickford Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party | | = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Do you support a $35 price cap for insulin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Eli Lilly capped the cost of its insulin — but the fight isn’t finished.
#
**“Drugmaker Eli Lilly caps the cost of insulin at $35 a month, bringing relief for millions” -_NBC News_**
Big news, Peter.
The _Inflation Reduction Act_ is hard at work – helping lower the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare. Now, a major drug company is following our lead and capping costs for _every_ American who uses their insulin products.
**Just this week, drugmaker Eli Lilly capped the cost of its insulin at an out-of-pocket cost of $35 for everyone.** This change will help millions of Americans afford their life-saving medication. But the fight isn’t finished. Every insulin maker in the country should follow suit.
****[Can you sign my petition supporting lowering the cost of all life-saving insulin – so that every American can have access to affordable insulin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59626043/394657074/1524706325?refcode=dd_em_230303_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230303_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NiMDYwMi0wY2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9-9RVvYVwLvf5MPwqLi5wZT9lu6O0nWy7xhwWleLWw=&emci=ad7b6c81-05ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=93cb0602-0cba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2727974)****
I’m proud to have cast my vote in support of the _Inflation Reduction Act_ — legislation that not a single Republican in Congress voted for. This week's news is proof that Democrats are continuing to deliver results for all Americans. However, we must continue to work to get every company to cap the cost of their insulin. Millions of Americans rely on insulin — and the price is notoriously higher here compared to the costs in other countries.
****[Will you sign my petition to help us continue our work to lower the cost of insulin and everyday medication for all Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59626044/394657075/1524706325?refcode=dd_em_230303_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230303_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NiMDYwMi0wY2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9-9RVvYVwLvf5MPwqLi5wZT9lu6O0nWy7xhwWleLWw=&emci=ad7b6c81-05ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=93cb0602-0cba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2727974)****
We have made great progress, but there is still so much work to be done. I look forward to continuing to fight for lower prescription drug costs for every American.
My best,
Dick Durbin
****** ******** ******
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59626045/394657076/1524706325?refcode=dd_em_230303_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230303_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NiMDYwMi0wY2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9-9RVvYVwLvf5MPwqLi5wZT9lu6O0nWy7xhwWleLWw=&emci=ad7b6c81-05ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=93cb0602-0cba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2727974)****

name: Ron Wyden
subject: It’s time to reign in these greedy corporations
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59626278/394657999/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGFhM2UzZS0wZWJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCuO-XdUjk5IE3GEpJ1yJ_R3khobFUUaNcxnBA0LpUQ=&emci=58b678ae-0cba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=70aa3e3e-0eba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)

| | The last few years, our country has experienced an unprecedented economic crisis. During the COVID-19 pandemic, millions of American families were forced to make difficult choices between paying rent and buying groceries. Meanwhile, our nation's biggest corporations raked in record profits and rewarded their wealthiest shareholders and CEOs with even bigger stock buybacks. **This corporate greed can't continue to go unchecked.** Under Democrats' historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which passed into law last year, I was thrilled to secure a brand new tax on corporate stock buybacks. This is a great start, but more needs to be done to hold corporations accountable for their profiteering. Each week, there's a new headline about a record-breaking stock buyback, while the same companies continue to raise their prices on household necessities and force working families to foot the bill. **That's why I'm continuing the fight in the Senate by introducing brand new legislation to QUADRUPLE taxes on corporate stock buybacks.** _You read that right._ It's past time that corporations paid their fair share, and I won't stop leading the way on this important fight in the Senate to level the playing field for working families. Together we can create an economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: clean_body: tonight is our must-hit deadline to save our Senate majority | | Peter, tonight is our crucial deadline to save our Senate majority in Arizona — and we’re still $2,149 short of our MUST-HIT goal! = IF we fail to meet this goal, we can kiss goodbye any chance of replacing traitorous Kyrsten Sinema – and the MAGA machine will flip Sinema’s seat RED! BUT IF 430 Democrats from PA chip in just $5, we’ll be in a great place to launch Democratic heroes like Ruben Gallego to victory! = | = Everything is on the line in 2024, Peter. Meeting this deadline — and protecting our majority — is our key to: 1️⃣ Ensuring that reproductive healthcare is accessible and safe for all 2️⃣ Enacting life-saving gun control policies across the country 3️⃣ Protecting voting rights... and saving our democracy! Failing to get 430 donations by midnight tonight would be disastrous for Democrats, Peter! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for stepping up, — Team UTS | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, did you see this??? Democrats have been CRUSHING in special elections — from Jenn McClellan who outperformed 2020 margins by 13 POINTS, to state legislative seats where their Democratic champions have outperformed 2020 by an average of 4-points! This confirms what we already knew, Peter. Voters are sick and tired of the GOP playing political games instead of getting things done for their constituents. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The stakes have truly never been higher than they are right now, and we need every single one of you to step up to the plate. Every dollar we raise right now will affect our ability to elect MORE Black progressive champions throughout the rest of 2023 and in 2024, who can enact the changes that Americans are clearly asking for. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for being on our team, Peter. The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . body:

You’re going to love this, team.
Jon Stewart just had far-right Oklahoma State Senator and NRA poster-child Nathan Dahm on his show, and he didn’t hold back in proving Dahm’s views about gun violence wrong with cold, hard facts.
[**Click here to watch the interview—and if you’re able to—make a donation to Giffords today so we can work to vote out elected officials who want to put guns over people’s safety.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-mar23-vid.dGpGn8&refcode=em230303-1-15&t=1&akid=4357%2E3935704%2E2So-Aq)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Who Runs the World (Women)
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Happy Women's History Month from the DNC Coalitions & Community Engagement Team!** As we continue our celebration of amazing women during Women’s History Month, we are highlighting our phenomenal Vice President Kamala Harris. Vice President Harris IS women’s history - and as her mother used to say:**[‘You may be the first to do many things, but make sure you’re not the last.’”](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5cd1c33684&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** Thank you to Vice President Harris for the work you have done to make history and move our country forward. We are so grateful for your perseverance and leadership! For a look at some of the amazing accomplishments that Vice President Harris has had since taking her office in 2020, check out this great article from Donna Brazile in**[The New York Times](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8072120f9b&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
---
| [Read Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5aaa250d16&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Read Here")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **DNC Statement in Celebration of Women’s History Month** In celebration of Women's History Month DNC Chair Jaime Harrison and DNC Women’s Caucus Chair Lottie Shackelford**[released the following statement:](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=815e913857&e=d6c5c7d7ec) ** _“Women’s History Month is a time to celebrate the invaluable contributions of all women to our country, and to rededicate ourselves to continuing to build on all of the progress we have made. From the suffragettes who fought and won the right to vote with the 19th Amendment, to the Black women who were at the forefront of the civil rights movement and passing the Voting Rights Act and the trailblazers in all fields who have fought to shatter glass ceilings – undoubtedly, women’s contributions to our country are immeasurable. This year, we’re proud that Democratic women have achieved historic milestones, including the most Democratic female governors ever elected. _ _“The Biden-Harris administration is committed to defending and strengthening women’s rights, and lifting up their voices. President Biden reauthorized and strengthened the Violence Against Women Act, which includes expanded legal services for survivors and support for underserved communities, and signed a bill to end forced arbitration for workers who are victims of sexual assault and harrassment. _ _“President Biden has also made elevating women to key positions a hallmark of his administration, as he’s appointed the most diverse cabinet in our nation’s history and nominated more women to judicial appointments than any of his predecessors. And at a time when women’s fundamental rights to make their own health care decisions are under siege, this administration has taken executive action to defend choice. _ _“This Women’s History Month, we carry with us the incredible accomplishments of women everywhere, and recommit ourselves to the important work ahead to fight for the advancement and progress of all women and girls.”_
---
|
---
|
---
| Antjuan Seawright, a Senior Advisor to the DNC, also wrote an amazing**[article about Representative Marcy Kaptur from Ohio. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f01e79a184&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**Representative Kaptur is the longest serving woman in congress.
---
| [Read Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=159e4cb338&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Read Here")
---
|
---
|
---
| Anti-abortion rights activists and politicians are trying to block access to mifepristone, one of the two medications more commonly used in medication abortion in the United States, NATIONWIDE - even in states that have protected abortion access. Mifepristone is safe, effective, and has been used by more than 5 million people in the U.S. since the FDA approved it more than 20 years ago. The consequences of this federal case could be incredibly far reaching - and go as far as taking mifepristone entirely off the market nationwide - even in states where abortion is accessible and protected. Take action with Planned Parenthood by**[signing up for an upcoming event ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9385209cf2&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**and pledging to **[fight abortion bans and restrictions.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=685148ab5b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) **
---
|
---
|
---
| As we have celebrated a couple of the women leaders in the government we want to encourage more women to run for public office. Now, more than ever, young women of color who care about their communities need to run for office. By serving as an elected official they can help ensure we have the tools to build a good life, like quality education and access to affordable healthcare. If you self-identify as a progressive woman of color and want to run for office, Run for Something wants to help. Join them on **March 7 at 8:00 PM** to discuss the realities of running as a woman of color for state and local office. **[RSVP today.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=03fb400c03&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
---
|
---
|
---
| Come learn about organizations that you can easily join to get involved in civic engagement in the Washington DC Area! The WNDC Public Liaison Committee is delighted to report that five organizations have agreed to co-host the Sisterhood in Democracy Meet & Greet. The co-host are: Black Women for Positive Change, DC Federation of Democratic Women(comprising the Metropolitan Women’s Democratic Club and the DC Democratic Women’s Club), United Democratic Women, Capital Women’s Investment Network, and the National Women’s Political Caucus. The need for collaboration and mobilization across organizations could not be more urgent. We must do what we can to protect reproductive freedoms, voting rights, the environment, Social Security and Medicare, and advocate for common sense gun safety reform. The event will take place on **Thursday, March 23, 2023 from 5:30 PM - 7:30 PM,** and will feature light fare and a cash bar. The cost is $10.00 for guests. This is an opportunity to meet members from these organizations and explore ways that we can collaborate on projects and programs in the future. We hope that you will join us in expanding our collective reach and influence on the American democratic process. We also hope that our commitment to educating our communities and promoting civic engagement can lead to joint programming in the future.
---
| | | _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Happy Women's History Month from the DNC Coalitions & Community Engagement Team! As we continue our celebration of amazing women during Women’s History Month, we are highlighting our phenomenal Vice President Kamala Harris. Vice President Harris IS women’s history - and as her mother used to say: Thank you to Vice President Harris for the work you have done to make history and move our country forward. We are so grateful for your perseverance and leadership! For a look at some of the amazing accomplishments that Vice President Harris has had since taking her office in 2020, check out this great article from Donna Brazile in. | "Read Here" | | | | DNC Statement in Celebration of Women’s History Month In celebration of Women's History Month DNC Chair Jaime Harrison and DNC Women’s Caucus Chair Lottie Shackelford “Women’s History Month is a time to celebrate the invaluable contributions of all women to our country, and to rededicate ourselves to continuing to build on all of the progress we have made. From the suffragettes who fought and won the right to vote with the 19th Amendment, to the Black women who were at the forefront of the civil rights movement and passing the Voting Rights Act and the trailblazers in all fields who have fought to shatter glass ceilings – undoubtedly, women’s contributions to our country are immeasurable. This year, we’re proud that Democratic women have achieved historic milestones, including the most Democratic female governors ever elected. “The Biden-Harris administration is committed to defending and strengthening women’s rights, and lifting up their voices. President Biden reauthorized and strengthened the Violence Against Women Act, which includes expanded legal services for survivors and support for underserved communities, and signed a bill to end forced arbitration for workers who are victims of sexual assault and harrassment. “President Biden has also made elevating women to key positions a hallmark of his administration, as he’s appointed the most diverse cabinet in our nation’s history and nominated more women to judicial appointments than any of his predecessors. And at a time when women’s fundamental rights to make their own health care decisions are under siege, this administration has taken executive action to defend choice. “This Women’s History Month, we carry with us the incredible accomplishments of women everywhere, and recommit ourselves to the important work ahead to fight for the advancement and progress of all women and girls.” | | | Antjuan Seawright, a Senior Advisor to the DNC, also wrote an amazing Kaptur is the longest serving woman in congress. | "Read Here" | | | Anti-abortion rights activists and politicians are trying to block access to mifepristone, one of the two medications more commonly used in medication abortion in the United States, NATIONWIDE - even in states that have protected abortion access. Mifepristone is safe, effective, and has been used by more than 5 million people in the U.S. since the FDA approved it more than 20 years ago. The consequences of this federal case could be incredibly far reaching - and go as far as taking mifepristone entirely off the market nationwide - even in states where abortion is accessible and protected. Take action with Planned Parenthood by pledging to | | | As we have celebrated a couple of the women leaders in the government we want to encourage more women to run for public office. Now, more than ever, young women of color who care about their communities need to run for office. By serving as an elected official they can help ensure we have the tools to build a good life, like quality education and access to affordable healthcare. If you self-identify as a progressive woman of color and want to run for office, Run for Something wants to help. Join them on March 7 at 8:00 PM to discuss the realities of running as a woman of color for state and local office. | | | Come learn about organizations that you can easily join to get involved in civic engagement in the Washington DC Area! The WNDC Public Liaison Committee is delighted to report that five organizations have agreed to co-host the Sisterhood in Democracy Meet & Greet. The co-host are: Black Women for Positive Change, DC Federation of Democratic Women(comprising the Metropolitan Women’s Democratic Club and the DC Democratic Women’s Club), United Democratic Women, Capital Women’s Investment Network, and the National Women’s Political Caucus. The need for collaboration and mobilization across organizations could not be more urgent. We must do what we can to protect reproductive freedoms, voting rights, the environment, Social Security and Medicare, and advocate for common sense gun safety reform. The event will take place on Thursday, March 23, 2023 from 5:30 PM - 7:30 PM, and will feature light fare and a cash bar. The cost is $10.00 for guests. This is an opportunity to meet members from these organizations and explore ways that we can collaborate on projects and programs in the future. We hope that you will join us in expanding our collective reach and influence on the American democratic process. We also hope that our commitment to educating our communities and promoting civic engagement can lead to joint programming in the future. | | | Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. This is a test distribution list. Our mailing address is: DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
If we can block voter suppression bills from passing through a Senate vote by the legislature's Monday deadline, we can keep them off the table for the rest of the year. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59627367/394661566/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230303_f_galeg2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJiMzg3NC0xMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCgfSCg4mDL7bRB3v5myXCc2rN8qz5O-8ebkxuXMAF4=&emci=73bb3874-12ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7abb3874-12ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | In a moment, we’ll outline the dangerous voter suppression bills that extremists are trying to ram through the Georgia legislature _right now_ — restricting the freedom to vote and undermining our elections. **But first, we have to ask if you can help stop them, because the clock is ticking.** If we can block SB 221 and SB 222 — which would eliminate ballot drop boxes, make it easier to kick Georgians off of voter rolls, and add felony penalties for counties that accept external funding for elections — from passing through a Senate vote by the legislature's Monday deadline, we may keep them off the table for the rest of the year. Until then, we’re spending every possible minute organizing and advocating against them. [_**Will you please make a donation right away to help fund our organizing efforts as we mobilize activists to stop SB 221 and SB 222 from becoming law? Every dollar makes a critical difference as we approach Monday’s legislative deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59627368/394661567/2057023037?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230303_f_galeg2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJiMzg3NC0xMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCgfSCg4mDL7bRB3v5myXCc2rN8qz5O-8ebkxuXMAF4=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59627369/394661568/641727787?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230303_f_galeg2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJiMzg3NC0xMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCgfSCg4mDL7bRB3v5myXCc2rN8qz5O-8ebkxuXMAF4=)

SB 221 and SB 222 are blatant attacks on our freedom to vote — and would disproportionately affect young voters and voters of color.
Esosa Osa, Deputy Executive Director of Fair Fight Action, said it best: **“It encourages vigilante intimidation and disenfranchisement.”**
The Fair Fight Action team is deploying every possible resource to block these bills and support proposals that would help Georgia voters access the ballot box — not stop them from making their voices heard. We’re organizing activists to contact their representatives and working with our allies in the legislature and our partners on the ground to speak out.
[_**But we need your help as we continue to go all-out to stop SB 221 and SB 222 before Monday’s legislative deadline. Please chip in today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59627370/394661569/2057023037?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230303_f_galeg2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJiMzg3NC0xMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCgfSCg4mDL7bRB3v5myXCc2rN8qz5O-8ebkxuXMAF4=)

Our first End-of-Quarter of the year will be our make or break moment for the rest of 2023.

Unfortunately, it's not looking good. Running the numbers shows us already coming up short on our End-of-Quarter fundraising.

This is our first big milestone of the year, and how well we perform at the end of this month will set the tone for the rest of 2023. With every race coming up in 2024 looking tight – from County Recorders to Senate seats to Presidential victories – we need to ensure that we will not fall behind. Not when we have so much on the line.

**[We will need to rely on some of our best supporters, like you, to help us raise our numbers and meet our goal. subject: ALERT: IL GOP Postal audit reaches DC **Weekly News Recap**
body:
Lori Lightfoot defeated, the USPS Inspector General reviewing the IL GOP postage discount, Keith Pekau lying about "illegal" records leak, and more.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/46966487e785/alert-il-gop-postal-audit-reaches-dc-weekly-news-recap?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Sources: Senior US Postal Service Officials Probing Potential IL GOP Postage Discount Abuse, Reaches the Inspector General's Office in Washington (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-senior-us-post-office-officials-probing-potential-il-gop-postage-discount-abuse-reaches-the-inspector-generals-office-in-washington.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Recently, sources confirmed that senior US Postal Service officials have been digging into the potential postage abuse by the IL GOP, and the information gathered during an initial “due diligence” phase has made its way to the Inspector General’s office in Washington, DC. – where the information is currently being reviewed.

If the Inspector General calls for a more substantive investigation from the information that they are currently reviewing, then a full audit of the IL GOP postage discount will be conducted. And that reality is very concerning to many IL GOP officials – with many GOP leaders fearing that such an audit could drive the party into bankruptcy if substantial abuse is uncovered.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-senior-us-post-office-officials-probing-potential-il-gop-postage-discount-abuse-reaches-the-inspector-generals-office-in-washington.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-senior-us-post-office-officials-probing-potential-il-gop-postage-discount-abuse-reaches-the-inspector-generals-office-in-washington.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Grassroots Parents and School Board Candidates Under Attack, While Pritzker Directs $500K to Fund Liberal Extremists with a Partisan Agenda (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/grassroots-parents-and-school-board-candidates-under-attack-while-pritzker-directs-500k-to-fund-liberal-extremists-with-a-partisan-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

With school board races dominating local headlines, the Democratic Party of Illinois just reported a $500,000 contribution from the JB for Governor campaign, in an effort to boost a liberal extremist agenda that promotes inappropriate sexual education curriculum and divisive concepts that only further deepen racial divides. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/grassroots-parents-and-school-board-candidates-under-attack-while-pritzker-directs-500k-to-fund-liberal-extremists-with-a-partisan-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/grassroots-parents-and-school-board-candidates-under-attack-while-pritzker-directs-500k-to-fund-liberal-extremists-with-a-partisan-agenda.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Mayor Keith Pekau Released His Own Military Records in 2022, Now Lies and Claims They Were "Illegally" Released After Erasing the Evidence, Calls for Investigation (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-released-his-own-military-records-in-2022-now-lies-and-claims-they-were-illegally-released-after-erasing-the-evidence-calls-for-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau released a statement on Thursday responding to a story about the improper release of US Air Force military records of eleven people, including several Republican members of Congress and former Republican congressional candidates. Although Pekau is not on the list, he sent an email to supporters, stating,

“I am deeply disturbed that my records may have been released illegally. I echo the calls from Reps. Bacon and Nunn for further investigation...”

But archived data and social media posts prove that in June of 2022, Pekau happily released his own military records, even tweeting on June 14, 2022,

“Unfounded rumors continue to swirl about my military service...It is unfortunate that people who have never worn the uniform would stoop to this level. However, I am more than happy to make my service record public so you can judge for yourself.” Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-released-his-own-military-records-in-2022-now-lies-and-claims-they-were-illegally-released-after-erasing-the-evidence-calls-for-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-released-his-own-military-records-in-2022-now-lies-and-claims-they-were-illegally-released-after-erasing-the-evidence-calls-for-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"We Can't Help You:" IL GOP Leaders Abandon Conservative School Board Candidates While Pritzker Goes on the Attack and Funds Their Opponents (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/we-cant-help-you-il-gop-leaders-abandon-conservative-school-board-candidates-while-pritzker-goes-on-the-attack-and-funds-their-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
When it comes to supporting conservative school board candidates who are running in the upcoming April 4th election, the IL GOP is silent – despite messages from candidates to Republican leaders asking for help in the form of infrastructure support, walk lists and voter data.

And candidates have confirmed that IL GOP leaders replied to emails asking for help with messages that included,

“Sorry, we can’t help you.”

Meanwhile, Gov. JB Pritzker, D, is publicly attacking conservative grassroots organizations that recruit and support local school board candidates, calling them “racists” and “anti-LGBTQ” among other things.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/we-cant-help-you-il-gop-leaders-abandon-conservative-school-board-candidates-while-pritzker-goes-on-the-attack-and-funds-their-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/we-cant-help-you-il-gop-leaders-abandon-conservative-school-board-candidates-while-pritzker-goes-on-the-attack-and-funds-their-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot Loses Re-Election as Democrats Paul Vallas and Brandon Johnson Advance to Runoff (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-chicago-mayor-lori-lightfoot-loses-re-election-as-democrats-paul-vallas-and-brandon-johnson-advance-to-runoff.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot became the first mayor since 1983 to lose re-election, coming in third place behind Cook County Commissioner Brandon Johnson and former Chicago Public Schools CEO Paul Vallas, who led the pack with over 34 percent of the vote.

Crime was the number one issue in the race, and defined Lightfoot’s tenure as Mayor – with violent crime skyrocketing under her leadership. In 2021, Chicago saw the deadliest year in over 25 years with nearly 800 homicides.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-chicago-mayor-lori-lightfoot-loses-re-election-as-democrats-paul-vallas-and-brandon-johnson-advance-to-runoff.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-chicago-mayor-lori-lightfoot-loses-re-election-as-democrats-paul-vallas-and-brandon-johnson-advance-to-runoff.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau's Power Grab Could Give Him Unlimited Power Like Richard Irvin, and Include a Security Detail Similar to Lori Lightfoot's (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekaus-power-grab-could-give-him-unlimited-power-like-ricahrd-irvin-and-include-a-security-detail-similar-to-lori-lightfoots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ab4d86aa4c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_03_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ab4d86aa4c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In Chicago, which has a mayor-council form of government, Mayor Lori Lightfoot has enormous power and influence over city matters. She even has a full-time security detail.

During the pandemic, Lightfoot exercised her powers and instructed the Chicago Police Department to quietly create a special unit of over 70 police officers to protect her home and office – in addition to the 20 police officers that were already part of her security detail.

Under a mayor-council form of government, Pekau could do the same, instructing the Orland Park police chief to quietly assemble a special unit of officers to provide full-time protection – including a motorcade of SUVs, officers at his home and office, and guarding him around the clock, no matter where he is. Click to read more. subject: A quick update from Jake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Here's what House Republicans are up to >> | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. The House was back in session this week and Republicans wasted no time holding the Biden administration accountable for their failed, un-American policies.

This week I was focused on getting the truth about the origins of COVID-19, demanding accountability for Ukraine aid, holding Pete Buttigieg accountable for his failure to adequately address the East Palestine crisis, fighting Big Tech censorship, and reining in Biden's reckless spending that's fueled inflation.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **WE NEED ANSWERS ON COVID ORIGINS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=faa3dfa9b9&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL NEWSMAX INTERVIEW**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=876a659b4c&e=1050d051da)
---
| This week the Department of Energy **AND** the FBI said they believe the COVID-19 pandemic likely originated from a lab leak in Wuhan, China. **UNBELIEVABLE!**

**For two years, Fauci, the mainstream media, and Big Tech lied to the American people and censored anyone who disagreed with their woke agenda. I have a message for Anthony Fauci and Big Tech: Americans DON'T need your help in determining the truth.**

The American people deserve answers on this issue so we can better protect ourselves in the future. I am fighting to hold Communist China and Biden bureaucrats accountable for this disaster. I shared my thoughts with Newsmax. [**Click here to watch the full interview.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c3d4a0e945&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **DEMANDING ACCOUNTABILITY FOR UKRAINE AID**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c4d23da840&e=1050d051da)
---
| We **CANNOT** care more about Ukraine than we do our own country. Our southern border is wide open, crime is rampant in America's cities, Communist China is knocking on our doorstep, fentanyl is plaguing our communities, and inflation continues to crush family budgets.
Joe Biden has put **UKRAINE FIRST** and **AMERICA LAST**.
Joe has already sent **$113 BILLION** to Ukraine. That's American tax dollars we could have used to finish Trump's border wall, fund our brave police officers, and strengthen our military to protect America's sovereignty.

I sent a letter to the White House demanding that **EVERY SINGLE PENNY** of Ukraine funding America has sent be fully accounted for. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6f44d8675f&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **GETTING ANSWERS FROM PRIVATE JET PETE**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0a3582b677&e=1050d051da)
---
| Following the toxic train derailment in East Palestine, it took Joe Biden and Mayor Pete **OVER A WEEK** to respond to this crisis.

This is just another failure from Secretary Pete Buttigieg. While the Biden administration was MIA, Ohio residents were reporting dead animals, strong odors, burning sensations, rashes, and watery eyes.

Mayor Pete didn't even bother to visit the East Palestine community until last week—over 20 days after the accident. This is completely unacceptable. I joined my colleagues in launching an **INVESTIGATION** into Pete Buttiegig's pathetic response. We simply want to know **WHAT** caused this accident and **WHY** it took the White House so long to respond. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5c2530df3a&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
|
---
| **PROTECTING FREE SPEECH**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a985032ea5&e=1050d051da)
---
| It's no surprise that Joe Biden and his liberal staffers in the White House have bullied social media companies into censoring conservatives online.

We saw it with the New York Post's reporting on the Hunter Biden laptop and we saw it with COVID-19 origins.

Big Tech and Biden bureaucrats have **NO BUSINESS** telling Americans what is and isn't "disinformation." This week, I voted to advance two bills in the Oversight Committee that push back on Big Tech censorship and help protect Americans' right to free speech. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b7cfc4bae5&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **FIGHTING BIDEN'S TAX AND SPEND AGENDA**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5e764cd26e&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe Biden has recklessly spent trillions of taxpayer dollars over the past two years and issued more harmful executive orders than any president since Gerald Ford. (107 to be exact!)

As a result, inflation reached the highest level in four decades and American families have paid the price. Inflation cost the average household **OVER $10,000** since Biden took office.

I promised Kansans that I would work to get federal spending under control. This week I voted for the REIN IN Inflation Act—a bill to hold the White House accountable for their disastrous tax and spend agenda. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1008fc6648&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Protect America’s emergency oil reserves
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency
✅ End COVID-19 vax mandates for healthcare workers
✅ Condemn socialism

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8afd97379d&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")

name: Adam Frisch
subject: it didn’t take long for Boebert’s allies to attack me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59627898/394663477/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg5NDRkOS0xNmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M6lzym187YEDR3vutG7xQz51oYY1Y-i6QPExmGdl8uo=&emci=fba5c337-5ab8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9e8944d9-16ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**

It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.

**We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**

[**_Please, if you’re able to, will you split $15 or more right now between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59627899/394663478/729998634?refcode=20230303.2_AF_3F&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg5NDRkOS0xNmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M6lzym187YEDR3vutG7xQz51oYY1Y-i6QPExmGdl8uo=)

Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You.

Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign.

With gratitude -
Adam

There is a serious Communist Chinese spyware that you need to know about. And no, I’m not talking about that dadgum [spy balloon](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c504bf8ffa34413f8281d11f66d6c68e&_e=FWX5hT1hQvdj3m0SZP1zluT9z8EPUkDBGHfK81Bkt-AC4EyBCqnHsQxIDCqXlyYfrwHyxPObDcZ-hL968suINFdWhmM-_bsqB79yu11fH0XDzUrN18eHVBo1KN5hXiICxzjbyqfgaBnw9FE2p7Jh4KNvfnXTFpO3NOFugLl78ZGJZAde_ozFVDaAZzkJH7qyPLCDdWN5hhFw1eF3a0w74QqBFny8yeq1ku7R6tJYVXrcEkV4A4D-koEcC9KbGVo8FZbz41EkOYRMwyApq6-F-ghtc01qxLZwUSTzr8qU_QN_I4kCGp5a98cRlXsnFYHseuoPqNTK16w7ah0Fy5CQwpupEC0OZIn28R5ShDO5xm_BT6m7Of9_V0K8zDJvnnv639b16C_5U3Dy7vnTOHppsXDYswjshUisU5dqW-NbMB6aAFLANn_YwtvSs4iohUbOFIcCC_ou3yt4AwboLNTSjvpprE9Uj3knZ6CSSDhccFYe-3FVXRzn0KUyGxrkXpqqYxFVRmiGApiJxxVmUME-QiC0_RJn02ceL8pnNHHLMTVYCeB5rP29w_Bs-J1NvrMfHHnCXp2D2N9_6SyJHbYufA%3D%3D) (at least not in this newsletter). I’m talking about Communist China’s most popular social media platform, TikTok. The video-sharing app has been downloaded more than 210 million times in the United States alone, which has caused a massive [threat](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c504bf8ffa34413f8281d11f66d6c68e&_e=FWX5hT1hQvdj3m0SZP1zliZa8dSFvDmNd6xW-HPQEuC2js7b4fpHHRMbUbMtC1_Ryhs8AHPnxDXvFILNYZ1Xvv47a4fyl96M021c1jimO-VCf5oxJnmMKmSYz-07FpnxIttjKbaZygKPjSWkiVOAg38JYTFGZrgzC7XbgW5E-6f0urBmZSMxjMm7OcSohJRKO2nwI_KDokSLY1ysJP0fNkSmd0GnS11Popb8IXO76WwVd4Q8VuxFPVkOvGFaJphdyYlDqQzho8LfsCN2EighMt4WNssr0iE6ga6seU8I71gQgfIpyGPuX-dUfYRwlRKO) to our national security, and I’ll tell you why. TikTok is built to bug your phone and [mine all of your data](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c504bf8ffa34413f8281d11f66d6c68e&_e=FWX5hT1hQvdj3m0SZP1zlgrTMTqs1ZNWnZfec66onYTNJEoROqtSRvUCFLqXXQY1Oyh9OJzjrgIE3U89B5oDt3KhxDalH8AIsYtfroTkprvm0U1OQGvoJREJce8VXizu8QkQPsYYP74COP8cz5vhlpG_VjntTicBFZ32vGZIrYQpBuxGzBilEfljaLxoevE7GFCRXeg60OlwWPw_i1Hm6Jg09mEqu-tVdnlSeCgYZgRSn1lZ06lfZz8RYKovLn5L)—from learning what you’re thinking to knowing what trends you follow—they’re watching and turning that [information](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c504bf8ffa34413f8281d11f66d6c68e&_e=FWX5hT1hQvdj3m0SZP1zlmvHy-_VEWq1QLs0FAJ2LC8NWx3oLODyITLRpqRNPSLgKtvlMqJHBjKyr3_UWDxX6mPHD5ey_ZfVxry-8aeG22HWUKNn26t7DMnt-QJtLEPp4gKGyFwXKD-KFsYaMtonPVqC6BUZNgm-yrPq1Pyk6sEPeleSv5tWMDWCaDFQK7FcNbOfM8xo0UhnM-x0oW0b8_K8Xl3AeVYLgMZZeJ8MmWqL3AuNdoBAQrOpao-Mh79E) over to Beijing. The SHIELD Act would address the online exploitation of private images. Survivors of image-based abuse like myself have been waiting for Congress to take action here — it’s long overdue. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m just a dirt farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59628601/394666132/-460704023?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230303_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NGEyYTM5LTE5YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=88RGDailVwTboEIFkP7di6m1PDu1kZ9a_MovRdWz5TE=) Peter, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**

[I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor by splitting $10 between my campaign and UniteDemocrats to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59628602/394666133/-460704023?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230303_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NGEyYTM5LTE5YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=88RGDailVwTboEIFkP7di6m1PDu1kZ9a_MovRdWz5TE=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59628608/394666140/-460704023?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230303_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NGEyYTM5LTE5YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=88RGDailVwTboEIFkP7di6m1PDu1kZ9a_MovRdWz5TE=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59628609/394666141/-460704023?amount=15&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230303_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NGEyYTM5LTE5YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=88RGDailVwTboEIFkP7di6m1PDu1kZ9a_MovRdWz5TE=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59628610/394666142/-460704023?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=UD_20230303_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NGEyYTM5LTE5YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=88RGDailVwTboEIFkP7di6m1PDu1kZ9a_MovRdWz5TE=)
You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,

Jon
